question: Find the official names of cities with population bigger than 1500 or smaller than 500.
query_text: db.city.find({$or: [{Population: {$gt: 1500}}, {Population: {$lt: 500}}]}, { Official_Name: 1})
template_key: find the official names of cities with population bigger than <num> or smaller than <num>

question: For each city, return the highest latitude among its stations.
query_text: db.station.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$city", maxLat: { $max: "$lat" } } } ])
template_key: for each city, return the highest latitude among its stations

question: For each city, what is the highest latitude for its stations?
query_text: db.station.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$city", maxLat: { $max: "$lat" } } } ])
template_key: for each city, what is the highest latitude for its stations

question: Give me the start station and end station for the trips with the three oldest id.
query_text: db.trip.find({}, { start_station_name: 1, end_station_name: 1}).sort({id: 1}).limit(3)
template_key: give me the start station and end station for the trips with the three oldest id

question: Count the number of trips that did not end in San Francisco city.
query_text: db.trip.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "station", localField: "end_station_id", foreignField: "id", as: "end_station" } }, { $match: { "end_station.city": { $ne: "San Francisco" } } }, { $count: "total" } ])
template_key: count the number of trips that did not end in san francisco city

question: Find the ids and names of stations from which at least 200 trips started.
query_text: db.trip.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: { start_station_id: "$start_station_id", start_station_name: "$start_station_name" }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 200 } } }, { $project: { start_station_id: "$_id.start_station_id", start_station_name: "$_id.start_station_name" } } ])
template_key: find the ids and names of stations from which at least <num> trips started

question: Find the zip code in which the average mean visibility is lower than 10.
query_text: db.weather.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$zip_code", avgVisibility: { $avg: "$mean_visibility_miles" } } }, { $match: { avgVisibility: { $lt: 10 } } }, { $project: { zip_code: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the zip code in which the average mean visibility is lower than <num>

question: For each zip code, select all those that have an average mean visiblity below 10.
query_text: db.weather.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$zip_code", avgVisibility: { $avg: "$mean_visibility_miles" } } }, { $match: { avgVisibility: { $lt: 10 } } }, { $project: { zip_code: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: for each zip code, select all those that have an average mean visiblity below <num>

question: For each city, list their names in decreasing order by their highest station latitude.
query_text: db.station.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$city", maxLat: { $max: "$lat" } } }, { $sort: { maxLat: -1 } }, { $project: { city: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: for each city, list their names in decreasing order by their highest station latitude

question: Find all the zip codes in which the max dew point have never reached 70.
query_text: db.weather.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$zip_code", maxDew: { $max: "$max_dew_point_f" } } }, { $match: { maxDew: { $lt: 70 } } }, { $project: { zip_code: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find all the zip codes in which the max dew point have never reached <num>

question: Give me the zip code where the average mean humidity is below 70 and at least 100 trips took place.
query_text: db.trip.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$zip_code", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 100 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "weather", localField: "_id", foreignField: "zip_code", as: "weather_data" } }, { $unwind: "$weather_data" }, { $group: { _id: "$_id", avgHumidity: { $avg: "$weather_data.mean_humidity" } } }, { $match: { avgHumidity: { $lt: 70 } } } , { $project: { zip_code: 1 } } ])
template_key: give me the zip code where the average mean humidity is below <num> and at least <num> trips took place

question: How many actors have appeared in each musical?
query_text: db.actor.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Musical_ID", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "musical", localField: "_id", foreignField: "Musical_ID", as: "musical_info" } }, { $project: { Name: { $arrayElemAt: ["$musical_info.Name", 0] }, count: 1 } } ])
template_key: how many actors have appeared in each musical

question: For each origin, how many flights came from there?
query_text: db.flight.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$origin", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: for each origin, how many flights came from there

question: Give the city that the student whose family name is Kim lives in.
query_text: db.Student.findOne({LName: 'Kim'}, {city_code: 1})
template_key: give the city that the student whose family name is kim lives in

question: Give the advisor with the most students.
query_text: db.Student.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Advisor", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { Advisor: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: give the advisor with the most students

question: Find the last name and age of the student who has allergy to both milk and cat.
query_text: db.Student.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Has_Allergy", localField: "StuID", foreignField: "StuID", as: "allergies" } }, { $match: { "allergies.Allergy": { $all: ["Milk", "Cat"] } } }, { $project: { LName: 1, Age: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the last name and age of the student who has allergy to both milk and cat

question: Find the different first names and cities of the students who have allergy to milk or cat.
query_text: db.Student.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Has_Allergy", localField: "StuID", foreignField: "StuID", as: "Allergies" } }, { $match: { "Allergies.Allergy": { $in: ["Milk", "Cat"] } } }, { $group: { _id: { Fname: "$Fname", City_code: "$city_code" } } }, { $project: { Fname: "$_id.Fname", City_code: "$_id.City_code" } } ])
template_key: find the different first names and cities of the students who have allergy to milk or cat

question: A list of the top 5 countries by number of invoices. List country name and number of invoices.
query_text: db.invoices.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$billing_country", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 5 } ])
template_key: a list of the top <num> countries by number of invoices. list country name and number of invoices

question: Find out 5 customers who most recently purchased something. List customers' first and last name.
query_text: db.customers.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "invoices", localField: "id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "invoices" } }, { $unwind: "$invoices" }, { $sort: { "invoices.invoice_date": -1 } }, { $limit: 5 }, { $project: { first_name: 1, last_name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find out <num> customers who most recently purchased something. list customers' first and last name

question: Find out the top 10 customers by total number of orders. List customers' first and last name and the number of total orders.
query_text: db.customers.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "invoices", localField: "id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "orders" } }, { $project: { first_name: 1, last_name: 1, totalOrders: { $size: "$orders" } } }, { $sort: { totalOrders: -1 } }, { $limit: 10 } ])
template_key: find out the top <num> customers by total number of orders. list customers' first and last name and the number of total orders

question: How many albums does Billy Cobham has?
query_text: db.artists.aggregate([ { $match: { name: "Billy Cobham" } }, { $lookup: { from: "albums", localField: "id", foreignField: "artist_id", as: "albums" } }, { $project: { albums: { $size: "$albums" } } } ])
template_key: how many albums does billy cobham has

question: How many albums has Billy Cobam released?
query_text: db.artists.aggregate([ { $match: { name: 'Billy Cobham' } }, { $lookup: { from: "albums", localField: "id", foreignField: "artist_id", as: "albums" }}, { $project: { numberOfAlbums: { $size: "$albums" } } } ])
template_key: how many albums has billy cobam released

question: Eduardo Martins is a customer at which company?
query_text: db.customers.find( { first_name: 'Eduardo', last_name: 'Martins' }, { company: 1 } )
template_key: eduardo martins is a customer at which company

question: find the full name of employees who report to Nancy Edwards?
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "employees", localField: "id", foreignField: "reports_to", as: "reporting_employees" } }, { $match: { first_name: "Nancy", last_name: "Edwards" } }, { $unwind: "$reporting_employees" }, { $project: { first_name: "$reporting_employees.first_name", last_name: "$reporting_employees.last_name" } } ])
template_key: find the full name of employees who report to nancy edwards

question: Find the full name of employee who supported the most number of customers.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "customers", localField: "id", foreignField: "support_rep_id", as: "support_customers" } }, { $project: { first_name: 1, last_name: 1} }, { $sort: { support_customer_count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 } ])

question: Find the number of employees whose title is IT Staff from each city?
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $match: { title: "IT Staff" } }, { $group: { _id: "$city", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])

question: How long does track Fast As a Shark has?
query_text: db.tracks.find({name: 'Fast As a Shark'}, {milliseconds: 1})
template_key: how long does track fast as a shark has

question: Give the full name and phone of the customer who has the account name 162.
query_text: db.Accounts.aggregate([ { $match: { account_name: "162" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Customers", localField: "customer_id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "customer_info" } }, { $unwind: "$customer_info" }, { $project: { customer_first_name: "$customer_info.customer_first_name", customer_last_name: "$customer_info.customer_last_name", customer_phone: "$customer_info.customer_phone" } } ])

question: How many accounts does the customer with first name Art and last name Turcotte have?

question: How many accounts are there for each customer id?
query_text: db.Accounts.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$customer_id", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])

question: How many customers do not have an account?

question: Count the number of customers who hold an account.
query_text: db.Accounts.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$customer_id" } }, { $count: "unique_customers" } ])

question: Count the number of customers.
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $count: "numberOfCustomers" } ])

question: How many cards does customer Art Turcotte have?

question: How many credit cards does customer Blanche Huels have?
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $match: { customer_first_name: "Blanche", customer_last_name: "Huels" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Customers_Cards", localField: "customer_id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "cards" } }, { $unwind: "$cards" }, { $match: { "cards.card_type_code": "Credit" } }, { $count: "credit_card_count" } ])

question: Count the number of credit cards that the customer with first name Blanche and last name Huels has.
query_text: db.Customers_Cards.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Customers", localField: "customer_id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "customer_info" } }, { $match: { "customer_info.customer_first_name": "Blanche", "customer_info.customer_last_name": "Huels", "card_type_code": "Credit" } }, { $group: { _id: null, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { count: 1} } ])

question: Find the cities corresponding to employees who help customers with the postal code 70174.

question: Find the first names of all customers that live in Brazil and have an invoice.
query_text: db.Customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Invoice", localField: "CustomerId", foreignField: "CustomerId", as: "invoices" } }, { $match: { Country: "Brazil", "invoices.0": { $exists: true } } }, { $group: { _id: "$FirstName" } }, { $project: { FirstName: "$_id" } } ])

question: Find the address of all customers that live in Germany and have invoice.
query_text: db.Customer.aggregate([ { $match: { Country: "Germany" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Invoice", localField: "CustomerId", foreignField: "CustomerId", as: "invoices" } }, { $match: { "invoices.0": { $exists: true } } }, { $project: { Address: 1 } } ])

question: Count the number of tracks that are of the media type 'AAC audio file'.
query_text: db.MediaType.aggregate([ { $match: { Name: "AAC audio file" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Track", localField: "MediaTypeId", foreignField: "MediaTypeId", as: "tracks" } }, { $project: { count: { $size: "$tracks" } } } ])

question: Find the average millisecond length of Latin and Pop tracks.
query_text: db.Genre.aggregate([ { $match: { $or: [ { Name: "Latin" }, { Name: "Pop" } ] } }, { $lookup: { from: "Track", localField: "GenreId", foreignField: "GenreId", as: "tracks" } }, { $unwind: "$tracks" }, { $group: { _id: null, averageMilliseconds: { $avg: "$tracks.Milliseconds" } } }, { $project: { averageMilliseconds:1 } } ])
template_key: find the average millisecond length of latin and pop tracks

question: Find the maximum and minimum millisecond lengths of pop tracks.
query_text: db.Genre.aggregate([ { $match: { Name: "Pop" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Track", localField: "GenreId", foreignField: "GenreId", as: "pop_tracks" } }, { $unwind: "$pop_tracks" }, { $group: { _id: null, max_milliseconds: { $max: "$pop_tracks.Milliseconds" }, min_milliseconds: { $min: "$pop_tracks.Milliseconds" } } }, { $project: { max_milliseconds:1, min_milliseconds:1 } } ])
template_key: find the maximum and minimum millisecond lengths of pop tracks

question: Cound the number of artists who have not released an album.
query_text: db.Artist.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Album", localField: "ArtistId", foreignField: "ArtistId", as: "Albums" } }, { $match: { Albums: { $size: 0 } } }, { $count: "NumberOfArtistsWithoutAlbums" } ])

question: Find all the phone numbers.

question: Find the name of services that have been used for more than 2 times in first notification of loss.
query_text: db.First_Notification_of_Loss.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Services", localField: "Service_ID", foreignField: "Service_ID", as: "service_info" } }, { $unwind: "$service_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$service_info.Service_name", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 2 } } }, { $project: { service_name: "$_id" } } ])

question: Find the claim that has the largest total settlement amount. Return the effective date of the claim.
query_text: db.Claims.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Settlements", localField: "Claim_ID", foreignField: "Claim_ID", as: "settlements" } }, { $unwind: "$settlements" }, { $group: { _id: "$Claim_ID", Effective_Date: { $first: "$Effective_Date" }, totalSettlementAmount: { $sum: "$settlements.Settlement_Amount" } } }, { $sort: { totalSettlementAmount: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { Effective_Date: 1 } } ])

question: Count the total number of policies used by the customer named 'Dayana Robel'.

question: Find the names of customers who have used either the service 'Close a policy' or the service 'Upgrade a policy'.

question: Give the total money requested by entrepreneurs who are taller than 1.85.
query_text: db.entrepreneur.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "people", localField: "People_ID", foreignField: "People_ID", as: "people_info" } }, { $unwind: "$people_info" }, { $match: { "people_info.Height": { $gt: 1.85 } } }, { $group: { _id: null, totalMoneyRequested: { $sum: "$Money_Requested" } } } , { $project: { totalMoneyRequested: 1 } }])
template_key: give the total money requested by entrepreneurs who are taller than <num>

question: Find all the campuses opened in 1958.
query_text: db.Campuses.find({ Year: 1958 }, { Campus: 1 })
template_key: find all the campuses opened in <num>

question: Find the name of the campuses that is in Northridge, Los Angeles or in San Francisco, San Francisco.
query_text: db.Campuses.find( { $or: [ { Location: 'Northridge', County: 'Los Angeles' }, { Location: 'San Francisco', County: 'San Francisco' } ] }, { Campus: 1 } )
template_key: find the name of the campuses that is in northridge, los angeles or in san francisco, san francisco

question: Find the average fee on a CSU campus in 1996
query_text: db.csu_fees.aggregate([ { $match: { Year: 1996 } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageFee: { $avg: "$CampusFee" } } }, { $project: { averageFee: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the average fee on a csu campus in <num>

question: Find the id of the candidate who got the lowest oppose rate.
query_text: db.candidate.find({}, {Candidate_ID: 1}).sort({Oppose_rate: 1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the id of the candidate who got the lowest oppose rate

question: Find the average height and weight for all males (sex is M).
query_text: db.people.aggregate([ { $match: { Sex: "M" } }, { $group: { _id: null, avgHeight: { $avg: "$Height" }, avgWeight: { $avg: "$Weight" } } }, { $project: { avgHeight: 1, avgWeight:1 } } ])
template_key: find the average height and weight for all males (sex is m)

question: Find the average and minimum weight for each gender.
query_text: db.people.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Sex", avgWeight: { $avg: "$Weight" }, minWeight: { $min: "$Weight" } } } ])
template_key: find the average and minimum weight for each gender

question: Find the name and gender of the candidate who got the highest support rate.
query_text: db.candidate.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "people", localField: "People_ID", foreignField: "People_ID", as: "candidate_info" } }, { $unwind: "$candidate_info" }, { $sort: { "Support_rate": -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { name: "$candidate_info.Name", sex: "$candidate_info.Sex" } } ])
template_key: find the name and gender of the candidate who got the highest support rate

question: Give the names of people who did not participate in the candidate election.
query_text: db.people.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "candidate", localField: "People_ID", foreignField: "People_ID", as: "candidate_data" } }, { $match: { "candidate_data": { $size: 0 } } }, { $project: { Name: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the names of people who did not participate in the candidate election

question: find the highest support percentage, lowest consider rate and oppose rate of all candidates.
query_text: db.candidate.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, maxSupportRate: { $max: "$Support_rate" }, minConsiderRate: { $min: "$Consider_rate" }, minOpposeRate: { $min: "$Oppose_rate" } } }, { $project: { maxSupportRate: 1, minConsiderRate: 1, minOpposeRate: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the highest support percentage, lowest consider rate and oppose rate of all candidates

question: find the name of people whose height is lower than the average.
query_text: db.people.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, avgHeight: { $avg: "$Height" } } }, { $lookup: { from: "people", let: { avgHeight: "$avgHeight" }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $lt: ["$Height", "$$avgHeight"] } } }, { $project: { Name: 1 } } ], as: "peopleWithLowerHeight" }}, { $unwind: "$peopleWithLowerHeight" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$peopleWithLowerHeight" } } ])
template_key: find the name of people whose height is lower than the average

question: Find the titles of all movies directed by steven spielberg.
query_text: db.Movie.find({director: 'Steven Spielberg'}, {title: 1})
template_key: find the titles of all movies directed by steven spielberg

question: Find all years that have a movie that received a rating of 4 or 5, and sort them in increasing order of year.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "ratings" } }, { $match: { "ratings.stars": { $gte: 4 } } }, { $project: { year: 1 } }, { $sort: { year: 1 } } ])
template_key: find all years that have a movie that received a rating of <num> or <num>, and sort them in increasing order of year

question: Find the titles of all movies that have no ratings.
query_text: db.Movie.find( { mID: { $nin: db.Rating.distinct("mID") } }, { title: 1 } )
template_key: find the titles of all movies that have no ratings

question: For the oldest movie listed, what is its average rating and title?
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $sort: { year: 1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "ratings" } }, { $project: { title: 1, averageRating: { $avg: "$ratings.stars" } } } ])
template_key: for the oldest movie listed, what is its average rating and title

question: Find the names of all reviewers who have contributed three or more ratings.
query_text: db.Rating.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$rID", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 3 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "Reviewer", localField: "_id", foreignField: "rID", as: "reviewer" } }, { $unwind: "$reviewer" }, { $project: { name: "$reviewer.name" } } ])
template_key: find the names of all reviewers who have contributed three or more ratings

question: Find the names of all reviewers who rated Gone with the Wind.
query_text: db.Reviewer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "rID", foreignField: "rID", as: "rating_info" } }, { $unwind: "$rating_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "Movie", localField: "rating_info.mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "movie_info" } }, { $unwind: "$movie_info" }, { $match: { "movie_info.title": "Gone with the Wind" } }, { $group: { _id: "$name" } }, { $project: { name: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the names of all reviewers who rated gone with the wind

question: Find the names of all directors whose movies are rated by Sarah Martinez.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "ratings" } }, { $unwind: "$ratings" }, { $lookup: { from: "Reviewer", localField: "ratings.rID", foreignField: "rID", as: "reviewers" } }, { $unwind: "$reviewers" }, { $match: { "reviewers.name": "Sarah Martinez" } }, { $group: { _id: "$director" } }, { $project: { director: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the names of all directors whose movies are rated by sarah martinez

question: For any rating where the name of reviewer is the same as the director of the movie, return the reviewer name, movie title, and number of stars.
query_text: db.Rating.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Movie", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "movie_info" } }, { $unwind: "$movie_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "Reviewer", localField: "rID", foreignField: "rID", as: "reviewer_info" } }, { $unwind: "$reviewer_info" }, { $match: { $expr: { $eq: ["$movie_info.director", "$reviewer_info.name"] } } }, { $group: { _id: { name: "$reviewer_info.name", title: "$movie_info.title", stars: "$stars" } } }, { $project: { "reviewer name": "$_id.name", "movie title": "$_id.title", "number of stars": "$_id.stars" } } ])
template_key: for any rating where the name of reviewer is the same as the director of the movie, return the reviewer name, movie title, and number of stars

question: Find the titles of all movies not reviewed by Chris Jackson.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "ratings" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Reviewer", localField: "ratings.rID", foreignField: "rID", as: "reviewers" } }, { $match: { "reviewers.name": { $ne: "Chris Jackson" } } }, { $project: { "_id": 0, "title": 1 } } ])
template_key: find the titles of all movies not reviewed by chris jackson

question: For all directors who directed more than one movie, return the titles of all movies directed by them, along with the director name. Sort by director name, then movie title.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$director", movies: { $push: "$title" }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 1 } } }, { $unwind: "$movies" }, { $project: { title: "$movies", director: "$_id" } }, { $sort: { director: 1, title: 1 } } ])
template_key: for all directors who directed more than one movie, return the titles of all movies directed by them, along with the director name. sort by director name, then movie title

question: For all directors who have directed more than one movie, what movies have they directed and what are their names?
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$director", movies: { $addToSet: { title: "$title" } }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 1 } } }, { $unwind: "$movies" }, { $project: { director: "$_id", title: "$movies.title" } }, { $sort: { director: 1, title: 1 } } ])
template_key: for all directors who have directed more than one movie, what movies have they directed and what are their names

question: For directors who had more than one movie, return the titles and produced years of all movies directed by them.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$director", movies: { $push: { title: "$title", year: "$year" } }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 1 } } }, { $unwind: "$movies" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$movies" } }, { $project: { title: 1, year: 1 } } ])
template_key: for directors who had more than one movie, return the titles and produced years of all movies directed by them

question: For each director who directed more than one movie, what are the titles and dates of release for all those movies?
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$director", movies: { $push: { title: "$title", year: "$year" } }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 1 } } }, { $unwind: "$movies" }, { $project: { title: "$movies.title", year: "$movies.year" } } ])
template_key: for each director who directed more than one movie, what are the titles and dates of release for all those movies

question: Find the movies with the highest average rating. Return the movie titles and average rating.
query_text: db.Rating.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$mID", averageRating: { $avg: "$stars" } } }, { $sort: { averageRating: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $lookup: { from: "Movie", localField: "_id", foreignField: "mID", as: "movieDetails" } }, { $unwind: "$movieDetails" }, { $project: { title: "$movieDetails.title", averageRating: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the movies with the highest average rating. return the movie titles and average rating

question: For each director, return the director's name together with the title of the movie they directed that received the highest rating among all of their movies, and the value of that rating. Ignore movies whose director is NULL.
query_text: db.Movie.aggregate([ { $match: { director: {$ne: null} } }, { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "ratingInfo" } }, { $unwind: "$ratingInfo" }, { $sort: { "ratingInfo.stars": -1 } }, { $group: { _id: "$director", title: {$first: "$title"}, maxRating: {$first: "$ratingInfo.stars"} } }, { $project: { director: "$_id", title: 1, highestRating: "$maxRating" } } ])
template_key: for each director, return the director's name together with the title of the movie they directed that received the highest rating among all of their movies, and the value of that rating. ignore movies whose director is null

question: For each reviewer id, what is the title and rating for the movie with the smallest rating?
query_text: db.Rating.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Movie", localField: "mID", foreignField: "mID", as: "movie_info" } }, { $unwind: "$movie_info" }, { $sort: { "stars": 1 } }, { $group: { _id: "$rID", title: { $first: "$movie_info.title" }, stars: { $first: "$stars" } } }, { $project: { title: 1, rID: "$_id", stars: 1 } } ])
template_key: for each reviewer id, what is the title and rating for the movie with the smallest rating

question: Find the names of reviewers who had given higher than 3 star ratings.
query_text: db.Reviewer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Rating", localField: "rID", foreignField: "rID", as: "ratingInfo" } }, { $unwind: "$ratingInfo" }, { $match: { "ratingInfo.stars": { $gt: 3 } } }, { $project: { name: 1 } }, { $group: { _id: "$name" } }, { $project: { name: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the names of reviewers who had given higher than <num> star ratings

question: Find the average rating star for each movie that received at least 2 ratings.
query_text: db.Rating.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$mID", avgStars: { $avg: "$stars" }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 2 } } }, { $project: { mID: "$_id", avgStars: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the average rating star for each movie that received at least <num> ratings

question: How many cities are in counties that have populations of over 20000?
query_text: db.city.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "county_public_safety", localField: "County_ID", foreignField: "County_ID", as: "county_info" } }, { $match: { "county_info.Population": { $gt: 20000 } } }, { $count: "number_of_cities" } ])
template_key: how many cities are in counties that have populations of over <num>

question: How many counties correspond to each police force?
query_text: db.county_public_safety.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Police_force", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: how many counties correspond to each police force

question: Find the names of all modern rooms with a base price below $160 and two beds.
query_text: db.Rooms.find( { basePrice: { $lt: 160 }, beds: 2, decor: 'modern' }, { roomName: 1 } )
template_key: find the names of all modern rooms with a base price below $<num> and two beds

question: Find all the rooms that have a price higher than 160 and can accommodate more than 2 people. Report room names and ids.
query_text: db.Rooms.find({basePrice: {$gt: 160}, maxOccupancy: {$gt: 2}}, {roomName: 1, RoomId: 1})
template_key: find all the rooms that have a price higher than <num> and can accommodate more than <num> people. report room names and ids

question: Find the most popular room in the hotel. The most popular room is the room that had seen the largest number of reservations.
query_text: db.Reservations.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Room", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $lookup: { from: "Rooms", localField: "_id", foreignField: "RoomId", as: "roomInfo" } }, { $unwind: "$roomInfo" }, { $project: { roomName: "$roomInfo.roomName" } } ])
template_key: find the most popular room in the hotel. the most popular room is the room that had seen the largest number of reservations

question: Find the number of kids staying in the rooms reserved by a person called ROY SWEAZ.
query_text: db.Reservations.find( { FirstName: 'ROY', LastName: 'SWEAZY' }, { Kids: 1 } )
template_key: find the number of kids staying in the rooms reserved by a person called roy sweaz

question: Find the total number of king beds available.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $match: { bedType: "King" } }, { $group: { _id: null, totalBeds: { $sum: "$beds" } } }, { $project: { totalBeds: 1} } ])
template_key: find the total number of king beds available

question: For each bed type, find the average base price of different bed type.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$bedType", averageBasePrice: { $avg: "$basePrice" } } } ])
template_key: for each bed type, find the average base price of different bed type

question: Find the number of rooms for each bed type.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$bedType", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: find the number of rooms for each bed type

question: Find the name of the room with the maximum occupancy.
query_text: db.Rooms.find({}, { roomName: 1}).sort({maxOccupancy: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the name of the room with the maximum occupancy

question: Find the id and name of the most expensive base price room.
query_text: db.Rooms.find({}, { RoomId: 1, roomName: 1}).sort({basePrice: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the id and name of the most expensive base price room

question: Find the number of rooms with king bed for each decor type.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $match: { bedType: 'King' } }, { $group: { _id: '$decor', count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: find the number of rooms with king bed for each decor type

question: Find the average and minimum price of the rooms in different decor.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$decor", averagePrice: { $avg: "$basePrice" }, minimumPrice: { $min: "$basePrice" } } } ])
template_key: find the average and minimum price of the rooms in different decor

question: Find the number of rooms with price higher than 120 for different decor.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $match: { basePrice: { $gt: 120 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$decor", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: find the number of rooms with price higher than <num> for different decor

question: For each bed type, find the average room price.
query_text: db.Rooms.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$bedType", averagePrice: { $avg: "$basePrice" } } } ])
template_key: for each bed type, find the average room price

question: Find the names of rooms that have been reserved for more than 60 times.
query_text: db.Reservations.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Room", reservationCount: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { reservationCount: { $gt: 60 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "Rooms", localField: "_id", foreignField: "RoomId", as: "roomDetails" } }, { $unwind: "$roomDetails" }, { $project: { roomName: "$roomDetails.roomName" } } ])
template_key: find the names of rooms that have been reserved for more than <num> times

question: Find the delegates who are from counties with population below 100000.
query_text: db.county.aggregate([ { $match: { Population: { $lt: 100000 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "election", localField: "County_Id", foreignField: "District", as: "election_info" } }, { $unwind: "$election_info" }, { $project: { Delegate: "$election_info.Delegate" } } ])
template_key: find the delegates who are from counties with population below <num>

question: Count the number of distinct delegates who are from counties with population above 50000.
query_text: db.county.aggregate([ { $match: { Population: { $gt: 50000 } } }, { $lookup: { from: "election", localField: "County_Id", foreignField: "District", as: "election_info" } }, { $unwind: "$election_info" }, { $group: { _id: null, distinctDelegates: { $addToSet: "$election_info.Delegate" } } }, { $project: { count: { $size: "$distinctDelegates" } } } ])
template_key: count the number of distinct delegates who are from counties with population above <num>

question: Find the parties associated with the delegates from district 1. Who served as governors of the parties?
query_text: db.election.aggregate([ { $match: { District: 1 } }, { $lookup: { from: "party", localField: "Party", foreignField: "Party_ID", as: "party_info" } }, { $unwind: "$party_info" }, { $project: { Governor: "$party_info.Governor" } } ])
template_key: find the parties associated with the delegates from district <num>. who served as governors of the parties

question: Find the parties associated with the delegates from district 1 or 2. Who served as comptrollers of the parties?
query_text: db.election.aggregate([ { $match: { District: { $in: [1, 2] } } }, { $lookup: { from: "party", localField: "Party", foreignField: "Party_ID", as: "party_info" } }, { $unwind: "$party_info" }, { $project: { Comptroller: "$party_info.Comptroller" } } ])
template_key: find the parties associated with the delegates from district <num> or <num>. who served as comptrollers of the parties

question: Give the phone and postal code corresponding to the address '1031 Daugavpils Parkway'.
query_text: db.address.find({address: '1031 Daugavpils Parkway'}, {phone: 1, postal_code: 1})
template_key: give the phone and postal code corresponding to the address <value>

question: How many cities are in Australia?
query_text: db.city.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "country", localField: "country_id", foreignField: "country_id", as: "country_info" } }, { $match: { "country_info.country": "Australia" } }, { $count: "count" } ])
template_key: how many cities are in australia

question: Count the number of cities in Australia.
query_text: db.city.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "country", localField: "country_id", foreignField: "country_id", as: "country_info" } }, { $match: { "country_info.country": "Australia" } }, { $count: "count" } ])
template_key: count the number of cities in australia

question: Count the number of different film ratings.
query_text: db.film.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$rating" } }, { $count: "distinct_ratings" } ])
template_key: count the number of different film ratings

question: How many customers are there?
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, totalCustomers: { $sum: "$no_of_customers" } } }, { $project: { totalCustomers: 1 } } ])
template_key: how many customers are there

question: Find the number of customers in the banks at New York City.
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $match: { city: "New York City" } }, { $group: { _id: null, totalCustomers: { $sum: "$no_of_customers" } } }, { $project: { totalCustomers: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the number of customers in the banks at new york city

question: Find the average number of customers in all banks of Utah state.
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $match: { state: "Utah" } }, { $group: { _id: null, avgNoOfCustomers: { $avg: "$no_of_customers" } } }, { $project: { avgNoOfCustomers: 1} } ])
template_key: find the average number of customers in all banks of utah state

question: Find the average number of customers cross all banks.
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, averageCustomers: { $avg: "$no_of_customers" } } } , { $project: { averageCustomers: 1 } }])
template_key: find the average number of customers cross all banks

question: Find the city and state of the bank branch named morningside.
query_text: db.bank.find({bname: 'morningside'}, { city: 1, state: 1})
template_key: find the city and state of the bank branch named morningside

question: Find the branch names of banks in the New York state.
query_text: db.bank.find({state: 'New York'}, {bname: 1})
template_key: find the branch names of banks in the new york state

question: Find the state, account type, and credit score of the customer whose number of loan is 0.
query_text: db.customer.find( { no_of_loans: 0 }, { state: 1, acc_type: 1, credit_score: 1 } )
template_key: find the state, account type, and credit score of the customer whose number of loan is <num>

question: Find the number of different cities which banks are located at.
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$city" } }, { $count: "distinct_cities_count" } ])
template_key: find the number of different cities which banks are located at

question: Find the name and account balance of the customer whose name includes the letter ‘a’.
query_text: db.customer.find( {cust_name: {$regex: /a/}}, {cust_name: 1, acc_bal: 1} )
template_key: find the name and account balance of the customer whose name includes the letter ‘a’

question: Find the total account balance of each customer from Utah or Texas.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $match: { state: { $in: ["Utah", "Texas"] } } }, { $group: { _id: null, totalAccountBalance: { $sum: "$acc_bal" } } }, { $project: { totalAccountBalance: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the total account balance of each customer from utah or texas

question: Find the name of customers who do not have an saving account.
query_text: db.customer.find( { acc_type: { $ne: 'saving' } }, { cust_name: 1 } )
template_key: find the name of customers who do not have an saving account

question: Find the name of customers who do not have a loan with a type of Mortgages.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loan_info" } }, { $match: { "loan_info.loan_type": { $ne: "Mortgages" } } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of customers who do not have a loan with a type of mortgages

question: Find the name of customers who have loans of both Mortgages and Auto.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loans" } }, { $match: { "loans.loan_type": { $in: ["Mortgages", "Auto"] } } }, { $unwind: "$loans" }, { $match: { "loans.loan_type": { $in: ["Mortgages", "Auto"] } } }, { $group: { _id: "$cust_name", uniqueLoanTypes: { $addToSet: "$loans.loan_type" } } }, { $match: { uniqueLoanTypes: { $size: 2 } } }, { $project: { cust_name: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the name of customers who have loans of both mortgages and auto

question: Find the name of customers whose credit score is below the average credit scores of all customers.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, averageCreditScore: { $avg: "$credit_score" } } }, { $lookup: { from: "customer", let: { avgCreditScore: "$averageCreditScore" }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $lt: [ "$credit_score", "$$avgCreditScore" ] } } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1 } } ], as: "below_average_customers" } }, { $unwind: "$below_average_customers" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$below_average_customers" } } ])
template_key: find the name of customers whose credit score is below the average credit scores of all customers

question: Find the branch name of the bank that has the most number of customers.
query_text: db.bank.find({}, {bname: 1}).sort({no_of_customers: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the branch name of the bank that has the most number of customers

question: Find the name of customer who has the lowest credit score.
query_text: db.customer.find({}, {cust_name: 1}).sort({credit_score: 1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the name of customer who has the lowest credit score

question: Find the name, account type, and account balance of the customer who has the highest credit score.
query_text: db.customer.find({}, {cust_name: 1, acc_type: 1, acc_bal: 1}).sort({credit_score: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the name, account type, and account balance of the customer who has the highest credit score

question: Find the name of customer who has the highest amount of loans.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loans" } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1 } }, { $sort: { totalLoanAmount: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 } ])
template_key: find the name of customer who has the highest amount of loans

question: Find the state which has the most number of customers.
query_text: db.bank.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$state", totalCustomers: { $sum: "$no_of_customers" } } }, { $sort: { totalCustomers: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { state: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the state which has the most number of customers

question: For each account type, find the average account balance of customers with credit score lower than 50.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $match: { credit_score: { $lt: 50 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$acc_type", avg_acc_bal: { $avg: "$acc_bal" } } } ])
template_key: for each account type, find the average account balance of customers with credit score lower than <num>

question: For each state, find the total account balance of customers whose credit score is above 100.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $match: { credit_score: { $gt: 100 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$state", total_acc_bal: { $sum: "$acc_bal" } } } ])
template_key: for each state, find the total account balance of customers whose credit score is above <num>

question: Find the name of customers who have more than one loan.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loans" } }, { $match: { "loans.1": { $exists: true } } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of customers who have more than one loan

question: Find the name and credit score of the customers who have some loans.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loan_info" } }, { $match: { "loan_info.cust_ID": { $exists: true } } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1, credit_score: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name and credit score of the customers who have some loans

question: Find the the name of the customers who have a loan with amount more than 3000.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loan_info" } }, { $unwind: "$loan_info" }, { $match: { "loan_info.amount": { $gt: 3000 } } }, { $project: { cust_name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the the name of the customers who have a loan with amount more than <num>

question: Find the average credit score of the customers who have some loan.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loan_info" } }, { $match: { "loan_info.0": { $exists: true } } }, { $group: { _id: null, avgCreditScore: { $avg: "$credit_score" } } } , { $project: { avgCreditScore: 1 } }])
template_key: find the average credit score of the customers who have some loan

question: Find the average credit score of the customers who do not have any loan.
query_text: db.customer.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "loan", localField: "cust_ID", foreignField: "cust_ID", as: "loan_info" } }, { $match: { "loan_info": { $eq: [] } } }, { $group: { _id: null, avgCreditScore: { $avg: "$credit_score" } } } , { $project: { avgCreditScore: 1 } }])
template_key: find the average credit score of the customers who do not have any loan

question: How many classes are professor whose last name is Graztevski has?
query_text: db.EMPLOYEE.aggregate([ { $match: { EMP_LNAME: 'Graztevski' } }, { $lookup: { from: 'CLASS', localField: 'EMP_NUM', foreignField: 'PROF_NUM', as: 'classes' } }, { $unwind: '$classes' }, { $count: 'numberOfClasses' } ])
template_key: how many classes are professor whose last name is graztevski has

question: How many classes does the professor whose last name is Graztevski teach?
query_text: db.EMPLOYEE.aggregate([ { $match: { EMP_LNAME: 'Graztevski' } }, { $lookup: { from: "CLASS", localField: "EMP_NUM", foreignField: "PROF_NUM", as: "classes_taught" }}, { $unwind: "$classes_taught" }, { $count: "num_classes" } ])
template_key: how many classes does the professor whose last name is graztevski teach

question: How many credits does course CIS-220 have, and what its description?
query_text: db.COURSE.find({ CRS_CODE: 'CIS-220' }, { CRS_CREDIT: 1, CRS_DESCRIPTION: 1 })
template_key: how many credits does course cis-<num> have, and what its description

question: Count different addresses of each school.
query_text: db.DEPARTMENT.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$SCHOOL_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { school_code: "$_id", count: "$count" } } ])
template_key: count different addresses of each school

question: Find the description and credit for the course QM-261?
query_text: db.COURSE.find({ CRS_CODE: 'QM-261' }, { CRS_DESCRIPTION: 1, CRS_CREDIT: 1 })
template_key: find the description and credit for the course qm-<num>

question: Find the number of departments in each school.
query_text: db.DEPARTMENT.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$SCHOOL_CODE", numberOfDepartments: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: find the number of departments in each school

question: How many credits does the department offer?
query_text: db.COURSE.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", TotalCredits: { $sum: "$CRS_CREDIT" } } }, { $project: { DEPT_CODE: "$_id", TotalCredits: 1 } } ])
template_key: how many credits does the department offer

question: Find the number of classes offered for all class rooms that held at least 2 classes.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$CLASS_ROOM", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 2 } } }, { $project: { CLASS_ROOM: "$_id", number_of_classes: "$count" } } ])
template_key: find the number of classes offered for all class rooms that held at least <num> classes

question: For each classroom with at least 2 classes, how many classes are offered?
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$CLASS_ROOM", classCount: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { classCount: { $gte: 2 } } }, { $project: { class_room: "$_id", classCount: 1 } } ])
template_key: for each classroom with at least <num> classes, how many classes are offered

question: Find the number of classes in each department.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$course_info.DEPT_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { DEPT_CODE: "$_id", count: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the number of classes in each department

question: How many classes are held in each department?
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$course_info.DEPT_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { dept_code: "$_id", count: 1 } } ])
template_key: how many classes are held in each department

question: Find the number of classes in each school.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "DEPARTMENT", localField: "course_info.DEPT_CODE", foreignField: "DEPT_CODE", as: "dept_info" } }, { $unwind: "$dept_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$dept_info.SCHOOL_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { count: 1, SCHOOL_CODE: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the number of classes in each school

question: How many classes exist for each school?
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "DEPARTMENT", localField: "course_info.DEPT_CODE", foreignField: "DEPT_CODE", as: "dept_info" } }, { $unwind: "$dept_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$dept_info.SCHOOL_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: how many classes exist for each school

question: Find the count and code of the job has most employees.
query_text: db.EMPLOYEE.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$EMP_JOBCODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { emp_jobcode: "$_id", count: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the count and code of the job has most employees

question: Find the number of professors with a Ph.D. degree in each department.
query_text: db.PROFESSOR.aggregate([ { $match: { PROF_HIGH_DEGREE: 'Ph.D.' } }, { $group: { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { dept_code: "$_id", count: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the number of professors with a ph.d. degree in each department

question: Find the number of students for each department.
query_text: db.STUDENT.aggregate([ { $group : { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", numberOfStudents: {$sum: 1} } }, { $project: { dept_code: "$_id", count: "$numberOfStudents" } } ])
template_key: find the number of students for each department

question: Find the total number of hours have done for all students in each department.
query_text: db.STUDENT.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", totalHours: { $sum: "$STU_HRS" } } } ])
template_key: find the total number of hours have done for all students in each department

question: Find the max, average, and minimum gpa of all students in each department.
query_text: db.STUDENT.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", maxGPA: { $max: "$STU_GPA" }, avgGPA: { $avg: "$STU_GPA" }, minGPA: { $min: "$STU_GPA" } } }, { $project: { dept_code: "$_id", maxGPA: 1, avgGPA: 1, minGPA: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the max, average, and minimum gpa of all students in each department

question: How many courses are offered by the Computer Info. Systems department?
query_text: db.COURSE.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "DEPARTMENT", localField: "DEPT_CODE", foreignField: "DEPT_CODE", as: "department_info" } }, { $match: { "department_info.DEPT_NAME": "Computer Info. Systems" } }, { $count: "number_of_courses" } ])
template_key: how many courses are offered by the computer info. systems department

question: Find the total credits of all classes offered by each department.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$course_info.DEPT_CODE", totalCredits: {$sum: "$course_info.CRS_CREDIT"} } }, { $project: { dept_code: "$_id", totalCredits: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the total credits of all classes offered by each department

question: Find the name of the department that offers the largest number of credits of all classes.
query_text: db.COURSE.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "CLASS", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "class_info" } }, { $unwind: "$class_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "DEPARTMENT", localField: "DEPT_CODE", foreignField: "DEPT_CODE", as: "department_info" } }, { $unwind: "$department_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$DEPT_CODE", totalCredits: { $sum: "$CRS_CREDIT" }, DEPT_NAME: { $first: "$department_info.DEPT_NAME" } } }, { $sort: { totalCredits: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { DEPT_NAME: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of the department that offers the largest number of credits of all classes

question: How many credits is the course that the student with the last name Smithson took, and what is its description?
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "ENROLL", localField: "CLASS_CODE", foreignField: "CLASS_CODE", as: "enroll_join" } }, { $unwind: "$enroll_join" }, { $lookup: { from: "STUDENT", localField: "enroll_join.STU_NUM", foreignField: "STU_NUM", as: "student_join" } }, { $unwind: "$student_join" }, { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_join" } }, { $unwind: "$course_join" }, { $match: { "student_join.STU_LNAME": "Smithson" } }, { $project: { "crs_description": "$course_join.CRS_DESCRIPTION", "crs_credit": "$course_join.CRS_CREDIT" } } ])
template_key: how many credits is the course that the student with the last name smithson took, and what is its description

question: Find the first names of all instructors who have taught some course and the course description.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "EMPLOYEE", localField: "PROF_NUM", foreignField: "EMP_NUM", as: "emp_info" } }, { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$emp_info" }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $project: { "emp_fname": "$emp_info.EMP_FNAME", "crs_description": "$course_info.CRS_DESCRIPTION" } } ])
template_key: find the first names of all instructors who have taught some course and the course description

question: Find the first names and offices of all instructors who have taught some course and also find the course description.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "EMPLOYEE", localField: "PROF_NUM", foreignField: "EMP_NUM", as: "emp_info" } }, { $lookup: { from: "COURSE", localField: "CRS_CODE", foreignField: "CRS_CODE", as: "crs_info" } }, { $lookup: { from: "PROFESSOR", localField: "emp_info.EMP_NUM", foreignField: "EMP_NUM", as: "prof_info" } }, { $unwind: "$emp_info" }, { $unwind: "$crs_info" }, { $unwind: "$prof_info" }, { $project: { "emp_fname": "$emp_info.EMP_FNAME", "prof_office": "$prof_info.PROF_OFFICE", "crs_description": "$crs_info.CRS_DESCRIPTION" } } ])
template_key: find the first names and offices of all instructors who have taught some course and also find the course description

question: Find the first names and degree of all professors who are teaching some class in Computer Info. Systems department.
query_text: db.PROFESSOR.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "EMPLOYEE", localField: "EMP_NUM", foreignField: "EMP_NUM", as: "EMPLOYEE_INFO" } }, { $unwind: "$EMPLOYEE_INFO" }, { $lookup: { from: "DEPARTMENT", localField: "DEPT_CODE", foreignField: "DEPT_CODE", as: "DEPARTMENT_INFO" } }, { $unwind: "$DEPARTMENT_INFO" }, { $match: { "DEPARTMENT_INFO.DEPT_NAME": "Computer Info. Systems" } }, { $lookup: { from: "CLASS", localField: "EMP_NUM", foreignField: "PROF_NUM", as: "CLASS_INFO" } }, { $unwind: "$CLASS_INFO" }, { $group: { _id: { EMP_NUM: "$EMP_NUM" }, EMP_FNAME: { $first: "$EMPLOYEE_INFO.EMP_FNAME" }, PROF_HIGH_DEGREE: { $first: "$PROF_HIGH_DEGREE" } } }, { $project: { EMP_FNAME: 1, PROF_HIGH_DEGREE: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the first names and degree of all professors who are teaching some class in computer info. systems department

question: Find the first names of professors who are teaching more than one class.
query_text: db.CLASS.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "EMPLOYEE", localField: "PROF_NUM", foreignField: "EMP_NUM", as: "professor" } }, { $unwind: "$professor" }, { $group: { _id: "$professor.EMP_NUM", emp_fname: { $first: "$professor.EMP_FNAME" }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 1 } } }, { $project: { emp_fname: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the first names of professors who are teaching more than one class

question: For each position, what is the average number of points for players in that position?
query_text: db.player.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Position", avgPoints: { $avg: "$Points" } } } ])
template_key: for each position, what is the average number of points for players in that position

question: find the number of players whose points are lower than 30 in each position.
query_text: db.player.aggregate([ { $match: { Points: { $lt: 30 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$Position", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: find the number of players whose points are lower than <num> in each position

question: Display the first name, and department number for all employees whose last name is 'McEwen'.
query_text: db.employees.find({ "LAST_NAME": "McEwen" }, { "FIRST_NAME": 1, "DEPARTMENT_ID": 1, "_id": 0 })
template_key: display the first name, and department number for all employees whose last name is <value>

question: Display the first and last name, and salary for those employees whose first name is ending with the letter m.
query_text: db.employees.find( { "FIRST_NAME": /m$/ }, { "FIRST_NAME": 1, "LAST_NAME": 1, "SALARY": 1, "_id": 0 } )
template_key: display the first and last name, and salary for those employees whose first name is ending with the letter m

question: display the job title of jobs which minimum salary is greater than 9000.
query_text: db.jobs.find({ MIN_SALARY: { $gt: 9000 }}, { JOB_TITLE: 1 })
template_key: display the job title of jobs which minimum salary is greater than <num>

question: display the employee ID for each employee and the date on which he ended his previous job.
query_text: db.job_history.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$EMPLOYEE_ID", END_DATE: { $max: "$END_DATE" } } }, { $project: { EMPLOYEE_ID: "$_id", END_DATE: "$END_DATE" } } ])
template_key: display the employee id for each employee and the date on which he ended his previous job

question: display those departments where more than ten employees work who got a commission percentage.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $match: { COMMISSION_PCT: { $exists: true, $ne: null } } }, { $group: { _id: "$DEPARTMENT_ID", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gt: 10 } } }, { $project: { DEPARTMENT_ID: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: display those departments where more than ten employees work who got a commission percentage

question: Find the ids of the departments where any manager is managing 4 or more employees.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: { department_id: "$DEPARTMENT_ID", manager_id: "$MANAGER_ID"}, employeeCount: { $sum: 1 } }}, { $match: { employeeCount: { $gte: 4 } }}, { $project: { department_id: "$_id.department_id" }}, { $group: { _id: "$department_id" }}, { $project: { department_id: "$_id" }} ])
template_key: find the ids of the departments where any manager is managing <num> or more employees

question: display the average salary of employees for each department who gets a commission percentage.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $match: { COMMISSION_PCT: { $ne: null } } }, { $group: { _id: "$DEPARTMENT_ID", avgSalary: { $avg: "$SALARY" } } } ])
template_key: display the average salary of employees for each department who gets a commission percentage

question: display the country ID and number of cities for each country.
query_text: db.locations.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$COUNTRY_ID", number_of_cities: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { country_id: "$_id", number_of_cities: 1 } } ])
template_key: display the country id and number of cities for each country

question: Give the country id and corresponding count of cities in each country.
query_text: db.locations.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$COUNTRY_ID", countOfCities: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: give the country id and corresponding count of cities in each country

question: Give the name of each department and the number of employees in each.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "departments", localField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", foreignField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", as: "department_info" } }, { $unwind: "$department_info" }, { $group: { _id: "$department_info.DEPARTMENT_NAME", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { department_name: "$_id", number_of_employees: "$count" } } ])
template_key: give the name of each department and the number of employees in each

question: display job title and average salary of employees.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "jobs", localField: "JOB_ID", foreignField: "JOB_ID", as: "jobDetails" } }, { $unwind: "$jobDetails" }, { $group: { _id: "$jobDetails.JOB_TITLE", averageSalary: { $avg: "$SALARY" } } }, { $project: { job_title: "$_id", averageSalary: 1 } } ])
template_key: display job title and average salary of employees

question: display the employee id and salary of all employees who report to Payam (first name).
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: 'employees', localField: 'MANAGER_ID', foreignField: 'EMPLOYEE_ID', as: 'manager' } }, { $match: { 'manager.FIRST_NAME': 'Payam' } }, { $project: { EMPLOYEE_ID: 1, SALARY: 1 } } ])
template_key: display the employee id and salary of all employees who report to payam (first name)

question: Find the job ID for those jobs which average salary is above 8000.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$JOB_ID", avgSalary: { $avg: "$SALARY" } }}, { $match: { avgSalary: { $gt: 8000 } }}, { $project: { JOB_ID: "$_id" }} ])
template_key: find the job id for those jobs which average salary is above <num>

question: Give the first name and job id for all employees in the Finance department.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "departments", localField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", foreignField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", as: "department" } }, { $match: { "department.DEPARTMENT_NAME": "Finance" } }, { $project: { FIRST_NAME: 1, JOB_ID: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the first name and job id for all employees in the finance department

question: display all the information of the employees whose salary if within the range of smallest salary and 2500.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $match: { $expr: { $and: [ { $gte: ["$SALARY", { $min: "$SALARY" }] }, { $lte: ["$SALARY", 2500] } ] } } } ])
template_key: display all the information of the employees whose salary if within the range of smallest salary and <num>

question: display the department id and the total salary for those departments which contains at least two employees.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$DEPARTMENT_ID", totalSalary: { $sum: "$SALARY" }, numOfEmployees: { $sum: 1 } }}, { $match: { numOfEmployees: { $gte: 2 } }}, { $project: { department_id: "$_id", totalSalary: 1 }} ])
template_key: display the department id and the total salary for those departments which contains at least two employees

question: display the full name (first and last name), and salary of those employees who working in any department located in London.
query_text: db.employees.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "departments", localField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", foreignField: "DEPARTMENT_ID", as: "department_info" } }, { $unwind: "$department_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "locations", localField: "department_info.LOCATION_ID", foreignField: "LOCATION_ID", as: "location_info" } }, { $unwind: "$location_info" }, { $match: { "location_info.CITY": "London" } }, { $project: { FIRST_NAME: 1, LAST_NAME: 1, SALARY: 1 } } ])
template_key: display the full name (first and last name), and salary of those employees who working in any department located in london

question: Find the id of the song that lasts the longest.
query_text: db.files.find({}, {f_id: 1}).sort({duration: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the id of the song that lasts the longest

question: Find the names of all English songs.
query_text: db.song.find({languages: 'english'}, {song_name: 1})
template_key: find the names of all english songs

question: Find the file format that is used by the most files.
query_text: db.files.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$formats", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { formats: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the file format that is used by the most files

question: Find the names of the artists who are from UK and have produced English songs.
query_text: db.artist.aggregate([ { $match: { country: "UK" } }, { $lookup: { from: "song", localField: "artist_name", foreignField: "artist_name", as: "song_info" } }, { $match: { "song_info.languages": "english" } }, { $project: { artist_name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the names of the artists who are from uk and have produced english songs

question: Find the id of songs that are available in mp4 format and have resolution lower than 1000.
query_text: db.files.aggregate([ { $match: { formats: "mp4" } }, { $lookup: { from: "song", localField: "f_id", foreignField: "f_id", as: "song_info" } }, { $unwind: "$song_info" }, { $match: { "song_info.resolution": { $lt: 1000 } } }, { $project: { f_id: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the id of songs that are available in mp4 format and have resolution lower than <num>

question: How many artists are male and how many are female?

question: For each file format, return the number of artists who released songs in that format.

question: Give me a list of the names of all songs ordered by their resolution.

question: Find the names of songs whose genre is modern or language is English.

question: Find the names and number of works of all artists who have at least one English songs.
query_text: db.artist.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "song", localField: "artist_name", foreignField: "artist_name", as: "songs" } }, { $match: { "songs.languages": "english" } }, { $project: { artist_name: 1, song_count: { $size: "$songs" } } } ])

question: Find the name and country of origin for all artists who have release at least one song of resolution above 900.

question: Find the names of the artists who have produced English songs but have never received rating higher than 8.
query_text: db.song.aggregate([ { $match: { languages: 'english', rating: { $lte: 8 } } }, { $group: { _id: '$artist_name' } }, { $lookup: { from: 'song', let: { artist_name: '$_id' }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $and: [ { $gt: ['$rating', 8] }, { $eq: ['$artist_name', '$$artist_name'] } ] } } }, { $project: { artist_name: 1 } } ], as: 'high_rated_songs' } }, { $match: { high_rated_songs: { $eq: [] } } }, { $project: { artist_name: '$_id' } } ])

question: Find the names of the artists who are from Bangladesh and have never received rating higher than 7.
query_text: db.artist.aggregate([ { $match: { country: 'Bangladesh' } }, { $lookup: { from: "song", localField: "artist_name", foreignField: "artist_name", as: "songs" } }, { $unwind: "$songs" }, { $match: { "songs.rating": { $lte: 7 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$artist_name", maxRating: { $max: "$songs.rating" } } }, { $match: { maxRating: { $lte: 7 } } }, { $project: { artist_name: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the names of the artists who are from bangladesh and have never received rating higher than <num>

question: Find the full name and id of the college that has the most baseball players.
