question: Find the number of people whose age is greater than all engineers.
query_text: db.Person.aggregate([ { $match: { job: "engineer" } }, { $group: { _id: null, maxAge: { $max: "$age" } } }, { $lookup: { from: "Person", let: { maxAge: "$maxAge" }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $gt: [ "$age", "$$maxAge" ] } } }, { $count: "count" } ], as: "count" } }, { $unwind: "$count" }, { $project: { count: "$count.count" } } ])
template_key: find the number of people whose age is greater than all engineers

question: Find the names of all person sorted in the descending order using age.
query_text: db.Person.find({}, {name: 1}).sort({age: -1})
template_key: find the names of all person sorted in the descending order using age

question: Find the name and age of all males in order of their age.
query_text: db.Person.find({ gender: 'male' }, { name: 1 }).sort({ age: 1 })
template_key: find the name and age of all males in order of their age

question: Find the name and age of the person who is a friend of both Dan and Alice.
query_text: db.Person.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "PersonFriend", localField: "name", foreignField: "name", as: "friends" } }, { $match: { "friends.friend": { $all: ["Dan", "Alice"] } } }, { $project: { name: 1, age: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name and age of the person who is a friend of both dan and alice

question: Find the name of the person who has friends with age above 40 but not under age 30?
query_text: db.PersonFriend.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Person", localField: "friend", foreignField: "name", as: "friendDetails" } }, { $match: { "friendDetails.age": { $gt: 40 } } }, { $group: { _id: "$name", friendsAge: { $push: "$friendDetails.age" } } }, { $match: { friendsAge: { $not: { $elemMatch: { $lt: 30 } } } } }, { $project: { _id: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of the person who has friends with age above <num> but not under age <num>

question: Find the person who has exactly one friend.
query_text: db.PersonFriend.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$name", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: 1 } }, { $project: { name: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the person who has exactly one friend

question: Find the name of persons who are friends with Bob.
query_text: db.Person.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "PersonFriend", localField: "name", foreignField: "name", as: "friends" } }, { $unwind: "$friends" }, { $match: { "friends.friend": "Bob" } }, { $project: { name: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of persons who are friends with bob

question: Find the name of persons who are friends with Alice for the shortest years.
query_text: db.PersonFriend.aggregate([ { $match: { friend: 'Alice' } }, { $group: { _id: null, minYear: { $min: '$year' } } }, { $lookup: { from: "PersonFriend", let: { minYear: '$minYear' }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $and: [ { $eq: ['$friend', 'Alice'] }, { $eq: ['$year', '$$minYear'] } ] } } }, { $project: { name: 1 } } ], as: "shortestFriendship" } }, { $unwind: "$shortestFriendship" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$shortestFriendship" } } ])
template_key: find the name of persons who are friends with alice for the shortest years

question: Find the name, age, and job title of persons who are friends with Alice for the longest years.
query_text: db.Person.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "PersonFriend", localField: "name", foreignField: "name", as: "friends" } }, { $unwind: "$friends" }, { $match: { "friends.friend": "Alice" } }, { $sort: { "friends.year": -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { name: 1, age: 1, job: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name, age, and job title of persons who are friends with alice for the longest years

question: Find Alice's friends of friends.
query_text: db.PersonFriend.aggregate([ { $match: { name: "Alice" } }, { $lookup: { from: "PersonFriend", localField: "friend", foreignField: "name", as: "friend_of_friend" } }, { $unwind: "$friend_of_friend" }, { $lookup: { from: "Person", localField: "friend_of_friend.friend", foreignField: "name", as: "friend_of_friend_info" } }, { $unwind: "$friend_of_friend_info" }, { $match: { "friend_of_friend_info.name": { $ne: "Alice" } } }, { $project: { name: "$friend_of_friend_info.name" } } ])
template_key: find alice's friends of friends

question: Find the names of the companies whose headquarters are not located in 'USA'.
query_text: db.Companies.find({Headquarters: {$ne: 'USA'}}, {name: 1})
template_key: find the names of the companies whose headquarters are not located in <value>

question: Compute the average profits companies make.
query_text: db.Companies.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, averageProfits: { $avg: "$Profits_billion" } } }, { $project: { averageProfits: 1 } } ])
template_key: compute the average profits companies make

question: Find the maximum and minimum sales of the companies that are not in the 'Banking' industry.
query_text: db.Companies.aggregate([ { $match: { Industry: { $ne: 'Banking' } } }, { $group: { _id: null, maxSales: { $max: "$Sales_billion" }, minSales: { $min: "$Sales_billion" } } }, { $project: { maxSales: 1, minSales: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the maximum and minimum sales of the companies that are not in the <value> industry

question: Find the stories of the building with the largest height.
query_text: db.buildings.find({}, {Stories: 1}).sort({Height: -1}).limit(1)
template_key: find the stories of the building with the largest height

question: For each company, return the company name and the name of the building its office is located in.
query_text: db.Office_locations.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "buildings", localField: "building_id", foreignField: "id", as: "building_info" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Companies", localField: "company_id", foreignField: "id", as: "company_info" } }, { $unwind: "$building_info" }, { $unwind: "$company_info" }, { $project: { "company_name": "$company_info.name", "building_name": "$building_info.name" } } ])
template_key: for each company, return the company name and the name of the building its office is located in

question: Find the names of the buildings in 'on-hold' status, and sort them in ascending order of building stories.
query_text: db.buildings.find( { Status: 'on-hold' }, { name: 1 } ).sort({ Stories: 1 })
template_key: find the names of the buildings in <value> status, and sort them in ascending order of building stories

question: Give the phones for departments in room 268.
query_text: db.Department.find({ Room: "268" }, { DPhone: 1 })
template_key: give the phones for departments in room <num>

question: Find the number of students that have at least one grade 'B'.
query_text: db.Enrolled_in.aggregate([ { $match: { Grade: 'B' } }, { $group: { _id: "$StuID" } }, { $count: "numberOfStudents" } ])
template_key: find the number of students that have at least one grade <value>

question: Find the max and min grade point for all letter grade.
query_text: db.Gradeconversion.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, max_gradepoint: { $max: "$gradepoint" }, min_gradepoint: { $min: "$gradepoint" } } }, { $project: { max_gradepoint: 1, min_gradepoint: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the max and min grade point for all letter grade

question: Find the first names and last names of male (sex is M) faculties who live in building NEB.
query_text: db.Faculty.find( { "Sex": "M", "Building": "NEB" }, { "Fname": 1, "Lname": 1, "_id": 0 } )
template_key: find the first names and last names of male (sex is m) faculties who live in building neb

question: Find the rooms of faculties with rank professor who live in building NEB.
query_text: db.Faculty.find( { Rank: 'Professor', Building: 'NEB' }, { Room: 1 } )
template_key: find the rooms of faculties with rank professor who live in building neb

question: Find the department name that is in Building 'Mergenthaler'.
query_text: db.Department.find({Building: 'Mergenthaler'}, {DName: 1})
template_key: find the department name that is in building <value>

question: Find the last name of female (sex is F) students in the descending order of age.
query_text: db.Student.find({ Sex: 'F' }, { LName: 1 }).sort({ Age: -1 })
template_key: find the last name of female (sex is f) students in the descending order of age

question: Find the last names of faculties in building Barton in alphabetic order.
query_text: db.Faculty.find({Building: 'Barton'}, {Lname: 1}).sort({Lname: 1})
template_key: find the last names of faculties in building barton in alphabetic order

question: Find the name of the department that has the biggest number of students minored in?
query_text: db.Department.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Minor_in", localField: "DNO", foreignField: "DNO", as: "Minors" } }, { $unwind: "$Minors" }, { $group: { _id: "$DNO", DName: { $first: "$DName" }, NumberOfMinors: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { NumberOfMinors: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { DName: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name of the department that has the biggest number of students minored in

question: Find the name of the department that has no students minored in?
query_text: db.Department.find({ DNO: { $nin: db.Minor_in.distinct("DNO") } }, { DName: 1 })
template_key: find the name of the department that has no students minored in

question: Find the rank of the faculty that the fewest faculties belong to.
query_text: db.Faculty.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Rank", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: 1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { Rank: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the rank of the faculty that the fewest faculties belong to

question: Give the names of the courses with at least five enrollments.
query_text: db.Course.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Enrolled_in", localField: "CID", foreignField: "CID", as: "enrollments" } }, { $match: { "enrollments.4": { $exists: true } } }, { $project: { CName: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the names of the courses with at least five enrollments

question: Find the first name and last name of the instructor of course that has course name
query_text: db.Faculty.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Course", localField: "FacID", foreignField: "Instructor", as: "course_info" } }, { $unwind: "$course_info" }, { $match: { "course_info.CName": "COMPUTER LITERACY" } }, { $project: { Fname: 1, Lname: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the first name and last name of the instructor of course that has course name

question: Find the department name and room of the course INTRODUCTION TO COMPUTER SCIENCE.
query_text: db.Course.aggregate([ { $match: { CName: "INTRODUCTION TO COMPUTER SCIENCE" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Department", localField: "DNO", foreignField: "DNO", as: "department_info" } }, { $unwind: "$department_info" }, { $project: { DName: "$department_info.DName", Room: "$department_info.Room" } } ])
template_key: find the department name and room of the course introduction to computer science

question: Find the last names of faculties who are members of computer science department.
query_text: db.Department.aggregate([ { $match: { DName: "Computer Science" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Member_of", localField: "DNO", foreignField: "DNO", as: "members" } }, { $unwind: "$members" }, { $lookup: { from: "Faculty", localField: "members.FacID", foreignField: "FacID", as: "faculty" } }, { $unwind: "$faculty" }, { $project: { Lname: "$faculty.Lname" } } ])
template_key: find the last names of faculties who are members of computer science department

question: Find the average grade point of student whose last name is Smith.
query_text: db.Student.aggregate([ { $match: { LName: "Smith" } }, { $lookup: { from: "Enrolled_in", localField: "StuID", foreignField: "StuID", as: "enrollments" } }, { $unwind: "$enrollments" }, { $lookup: { from: "Gradeconversion", localField: "enrollments.Grade", foreignField: "lettergrade", as: "enrollments.grade_info" } }, { $unwind: "$enrollments.grade_info" }, { $group: { _id: null, avgGradePoint: { $avg: "$enrollments.grade_info.gradepoint" } } } , { $project: { avgGradePoint:1 } }])
template_key: find the average grade point of student whose last name is smith

question: Give the maximum and minimum gradepoints for students living in NYC?
query_text: db.Enrolled_in.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Gradeconversion", localField: "Grade", foreignField: "lettergrade", as: "grade_info" } }, { $unwind: "$grade_info" }, { $lookup: { from: "Student", localField: "StuID", foreignField: "StuID", as: "student_info" } }, { $unwind: "$student_info" }, { $match: { "student_info.city_code": "NYC" } }, { $group: { _id: null, maxGradePoint: { $max: "$grade_info.gradepoint" }, minGradePoint: { $min: "$grade_info.gradepoint" } } }, { $project: { maxGradePoint: 1, minGradePoint: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the maximum and minimum gradepoints for students living in nyc

question: Give the ids of the three products purchased in the largest amounts.
query_text: db.Product_Suppliers.aggregate([ { $sort: { total_amount_purchased: -1 } }, { $limit: 3 }, { $project: { product_id: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the ids of the three products purchased in the largest amounts

question: Give the id and product type of the product with the lowest price.
query_text: db.Products.aggregate([ { $sort: { product_price: 1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { product_id: 1, product_type_code: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the id and product type of the product with the lowest price

question: For each payment method, return how many customers use it.
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$payment_method_code", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { payment_method_code: "$_id", count: 1 } } ])
template_key: for each payment method, return how many customers use it

question: How many customers use each payment method?
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$payment_method_code", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])
template_key: how many customers use each payment method

question: Give the product id for the product that was ordered most frequently.
query_text: db.Order_Items.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$product_id", count: { $sum: 1 } }}, { $sort: { count: -1 }}, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { _id: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the product id for the product that was ordered most frequently

question: Count the number of stores the chain South has.
query_text: db.Department_Stores.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Department_Store_Chain", localField: "dept_store_chain_id", foreignField: "dept_store_chain_id", as: "chain" } }, { $match: { "chain.dept_store_chain_name": "South" } }, { $count: "total" } ])
template_key: count the number of stores the chain south has

question: Give me the product type, name and price for all the products supplied by supplier id 3.
query_text: db.Product_Suppliers.aggregate([ { $match: { supplier_id: 3 } }, { $lookup: { from: "Products", localField: "product_id", foreignField: "product_id", as: "product_info" } }, { $unwind: "$product_info" }, { $project: { product_type_code: "$product_info.product_type_code", product_name: "$product_info.product_name", product_price: "$product_info.product_price" } } ])
template_key: give me the product type, name and price for all the products supplied by supplier id <num>

question: Find the name and address of the customers who have both New and Pending orders.
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Customer_Orders", localField: "customer_id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "orders" } }, { $unwind: "$orders" }, { $match: { $or: [ { "orders.order_status_code": "New" }, { "orders.order_status_code": "Pending" } ] } }, { $group: { _id: "$customer_id", customer_name: { $first: "$customer_name" }, customer_address: { $first: "$customer_address" }, order_statuses: { $addToSet: "$orders.order_status_code" } } }, { $match: { order_statuses: { $all: ["New", "Pending"] } } }, { $project: { customer_name: 1, customer_address: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name and address of the customers who have both new and pending orders

question: For each product type, return the maximum and minimum price.
query_text: db.Products.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$product_type_code", maxPrice: { $max: "$product_price" }, minPrice: { $min: "$product_price" } } } ])
template_key: for each product type, return the maximum and minimum price

question: Find the product type whose average price is higher than the average price of all products.
query_text: db.Products.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$product_type_code", avgTypePrice: { $avg: "$product_price" } } }, { $group: { _id: null, avgPrice: { $avg: "$avgTypePrice" }, types: { $push: { type: "$_id", avgTypePrice: "$avgTypePrice" } } } }, { $unwind: "$types" }, { $project: { type: "$types.type", typeAvg: "$types.avgTypePrice", overallAvg: "$avgPrice" } }, { $match: { $expr: { $gt: ["$typeAvg", "$overallAvg"] } } }, { $project: { type: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the product type whose average price is higher than the average price of all products

question: Find the ids of all distinct customers who made order after some orders that were Cancelled.
query_text: db.Customer_Orders.aggregate([ { $match: { order_status_code: 'Cancelled' } }, { $group: { _id: null, minDate: { $min: "$order_date" } } }, { $lookup: { from: "Customer_Orders", let: { min_date: "$minDate" }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $gt: ["$order_date", "$$min_date"] } } }, { $group: { _id: "$customer_id" } } ], as: "orders_after_cancelled" } }, { $unwind: "$orders_after_cancelled" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$orders_after_cancelled" } }, { $project: { _id: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the ids of all distinct customers who made order after some orders that were cancelled

question: Give the ids and names of products with price lower than 600 or higher than 900.
query_text: db.Products.find( { $or: [ { product_price: { $lt: 600 } }, { product_price: { $gt: 900 } } ] }, { product_id: 1, product_name: 1 } )
template_key: give the ids and names of products with price lower than <num> or higher than <num>

question: Give the maximum and minimum product prices for each product type, grouped and ordered by product type.
query_text: db.Products.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$product_type_code", max_price: { $max: "$product_price" }, min_price: { $min: "$product_price" } } }, { $sort: { _id: 1 } } ])
template_key: give the maximum and minimum product prices for each product type, grouped and ordered by product type

question: Find the names of customers who have bought by at least three distinct products.
query_text: db.Customers.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Customer_Orders", localField: "customer_id", foreignField: "customer_id", as: "orders" } }, { $unwind: "$orders" }, { $lookup: { from: "Order_Items", localField: "orders.order_id", foreignField: "order_id", as: "order_items" } }, { $unwind: "$order_items" }, { $group: { _id: { customer_id: "$customer_id", customer_name: "$customer_name" }, distinct_products: { $addToSet: "$order_items.product_id" } } }, { $match: { $expr: { $gte: [{ $size: "$distinct_products" }, 3] } } }, { $project: { customer_name: "$_id.customer_name" } } ])
template_key: find the names of customers who have bought by at least three distinct products

question: Find the name and gender of the staff who has been assigned the job of Sales Person but never Clerical Staff.
query_text: db.Staff.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "Staff_Department_Assignments", localField: "staff_id", foreignField: "staff_id", as: "assignments" } }, { $match: { "assignments.job_title_code": "Sales Person" } }, { $addFields: { hasClerical: { $in: ["Clerical Staff", "$assignments.job_title_code"] } } }, { $match: { hasClerical: false } }, { $project: { staff_name: 1, staff_gender: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the name and gender of the staff who has been assigned the job of sales person but never clerical staff

question: Find the id and name of customers whose address contains WY state and do not use credit card for payment.

template_key: find the id and name of customers whose address contains wy state and do not use credit card for payment

question: Find the average price of all product clothes.

template_key: find the average price of all product clothes

question: Find the name of the most expensive hardware product.
query_text: db.Products.find( { product_type_code: 'Hardware' }, { product_name: 1 } ).sort({ product_price: -1 }).limit(1)

query_text: db.store.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$Type", count: { $sum: 1 } } } ])

question: Find the names of all stores in Khanewal District.

question: Find the number of stores in each city.

question: Find the city with the most number of stores.
query_text: db.store.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "store_district", localField: "Store_ID", foreignField: "Store_ID", as: "store_district" } }, { $unwind: "$store_district" }, { $lookup: { from: "district", localField: "store_district.District_ID", foreignField: "District_ID", as: "district" } }, { $unwind: "$district" }, { $group: { _id: "$district.Headquartered_City", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { Headquartered_City: "$_id" } } ])

question: Find products with max page size as 'A4' or pages per minute color smaller than 5.

question: Find all the product whose name contains the word 'Scanner'.

question: Find the most prominent max page size among all the products.
query_text: db.product.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: "$max_page_size", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $sort: { count: -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { max_page_size: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the most prominent max page size among all the products

question: Find the names of districts where have both city mall and village store type stores.
query_text: db.store.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "store_district", localField: "Store_ID", foreignField: "Store_ID", as: "store_district" } }, { $unwind: "$store_district" }, { $lookup: { from: "district", localField: "store_district.District_ID", foreignField: "District_ID", as: "district" } }, { $unwind: "$district" }, { $match: { Type: { $in: ["City Mall", "Village Store"] } } }, { $group: { _id: "$district.District_name", count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: 2 } }, { $project: { District_name: "$_id" } } ])

question: Find the name and training hours of players whose hours are below 1500.
query_text: db.Player.find({ HS: { $lt: 1500 } }, { pName: 1, HS: 1 })

question: Find the max, average and min training hours of all players.
query_text: db.Player.aggregate([ { $group: { _id: null, avgHS: { $avg: "$HS" }, maxHS: { $max: "$HS" }, minHS: { $min: "$HS" } } }, { $project: { avgHS: 1, maxHS: 1, minHS: 1 } } ])
template_key: find the max, average and min training hours of all players

question: Find the name, enrollment of the colleges whose size is bigger than 10000 and location is in state LA.

question: Find the name of players whose card is yes in the descending order of training hours.

question: Find the number of students who participate in the tryout for each college ordered by descending count.

question: Find the states where have some college students in tryout and their decisions are yes.

question: Find the name and college of students whose decisions are yes in the tryout.

question: Find the name of all students who were in the tryout sorted in alphabetic order.

question: Find the names of the students who are in the position of striker and got a yes tryout decision.

question: Find the average and maximum hours for the students whose tryout decision is yes.

question: Find the average hours for the students whose tryout decision is no.

question: Find the names of either colleges in LA with greater than 15000 size or in state AZ with less than 13000 enrollment.

question: Find names of all colleges whose enrollment is greater than that of all colleges in the FL state.

question: Find the average age of students who are living in the dorm with the largest capacity.

query_text: db.continents.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "countries", localField: "ContId", foreignField: "Continent", as: "countries" } }, { $project: { "_id": 0, "ContId": 1, "Continent": 1, "countriesCount": { $size: "$countries" } } }])

question: Find the name of the makers that produced some cars in the year of 1970?
query_text: db.car_makers.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "model_list", localField: "Id", foreignField: "Maker", as: "models" } }, { $unwind: "$models" }, { $lookup: { from: "car_names", localField: "models.Model", foreignField: "Model", as: "car_names" } }, { $unwind: "$car_names" }, { $lookup: { from: "cars_data", localField: "car_names.MakeId", foreignField: "Id", as: "cars_data" } }, { $unwind: "$cars_data" }, { $match: { "cars_data.Year": 1970 } }, { $group: { _id: "$Maker" } }, { $project: { Maker: "$_id" } } ])
template_key: find the name of the makers that produced some cars in the year of <num>

question: How many car models were produced by the maker with full name American Motor Company?
query_text: db.car_makers.aggregate([ { $match: { FullName: "American Motor Company" } }, { $lookup: { from: "model_list", localField: "Id", foreignField: "Maker", as: "models" } }, { $unwind: "$models" }, { $group: { _id: null, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { count: 1 } }])
template_key: how many car models were produced by the maker with full name american motor company

question: For model volvo, how many cylinders does the car with the least accelerate have?
query_text: db.cars_data.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "car_names", localField: "Id", foreignField: "MakeId", as: "car_names" } }, { $unwind: "$car_names" }, { $match: { "car_names.Model": "volvo" } }, { $sort: { "Accelerate": 1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { "_id": 0, "Cylinders": 1 } }])
template_key: for model volvo, how many cylinders does the car with the least accelerate have

question: For a volvo model, how many cylinders does the version with least accelerate have?
query_text: db.cars_data.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "car_names", localField: "Id", foreignField: "MakeId", as: "car_names_data" } }, { $unwind: "$car_names_data" }, { $match: { "car_names_data.Model": "volvo" } }, { $sort: { "Accelerate": 1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { "_id": 0, "Cylinders": 1 } }])
template_key: for a volvo model, how many cylinders does the version with least accelerate have

question: How many cars have a larger accelerate than the car with the largest horsepower?
query_text: db.cars_data.aggregate([ { $sort: { "Horsepower": -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { "Accelerate": 1 } }, { $lookup: { from: "cars_data", let: { maxAcc: "$Accelerate" }, pipeline: [ { $match: { $expr: { $gt: ["$Accelerate", "$$maxAcc"] } } }, { $count: "count" } ], as: "carsWithGreaterAcc" } }, { $unwind: "$carsWithGreaterAcc" }, { $replaceRoot: { newRoot: "$carsWithGreaterAcc" } } ])
template_key: how many cars have a larger accelerate than the car with the largest horsepower

question: How many cars has over 6 cylinders?
query_text: db.cars_data.aggregate([ { $match: { Cylinders: { $gt: 6 } } }, { $count: "total" }])

question: For the cars with 4 cylinders, which model has the largest horsepower?
query_text: db.car_names.aggregate([ { $lookup: { from: "cars_data", localField: "MakeId", foreignField: "Id", as: "car_data" } }, { $unwind: "$car_data" }, { $match: { "car_data.Cylinders": 4 } }, { $sort: { "car_data.Horsepower": -1 } }, { $limit: 1 }, { $project: { Model: 1 } }])
template_key: for the cars with <num> cylinders, which model has the largest horsepower

question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?

template_key: for all of the <num> cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower

question: Could you provide a list of 5 planets with mean surface temperatures nearest to Earth's, excluding those with rings?

  { $match: { hasRings: false } },
  { $addFields: { tempDifference: { $abs: { $subtract: [ "$surfaceTemperatureC.mean", 14 ] } } } },
  { $sort: { tempDifference: 1 } },
  { $limit: 5 },
  { $project: { _id: 0, name: 1, "surfaceTemperatureC.mean": 1 } }
])

question: Find the product that has the lowest ratio of units on order to reorder level.

question: Find the organizations that have a supplier that is also a customer of an organization that they have invested in.

question: Find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles that were published in the same month and year but on different days.

question: Find entities that have been both struck off and inactivated in the same year.

question: Find the filings where the originator entity and beneficiary entity are both located in landlocked countries.
query_text: MATCH (filing:Filing) MATCH (filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity) MATCH (originator)-[:COUNTRY]->(originatorCountry:Country) WHERE originatorCountry.tld IS NULL MATCH (filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity) MATCH (beneficiary)-[:COUNTRY]->(beneficiaryCountry:Country) WHERE beneficiaryCountry.tld IS NULL RETURN filing

question: Find the business with the highest average star rating from its reviews.

question: Find the products that have a quantity on order greater than the total quantity ordered for those products in the past.

question: Find the top 3 `beneficiary_bank` values with the lowest average filing `number` where the `originator_bank_country` is "Germany" and the `amount` is greater than 10000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank_country = "Germany" AND f.amount > 10000 WITH f.beneficiary_bank AS beneficiary_bank, avg(f.number) AS average_number ORDER BY average_number ASC LIMIT 3 RETURN beneficiary_bank, average_number

question: Find all games played by streams that have at least one VIP who is also a chatter in another stream.

question: Find the streams that have moderators who are also chatters of the same stream.

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_bank' starts with the letter "D" and the 'beneficiary_bank' starts with the letter "B".
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank STARTS WITH "D" AND f.beneficiary_bank STARTS WITH "B" RETURN f
template_key: find the filings where the <value> starts with the letter <value> and the <value> starts with the letter <value>

question: Find the top 3 `beneficiary_bank_country` values with the highest total number of filings where the `originator_bank_country` is "Andorra".
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank_country = "Andorra" WITH f.beneficiary_bank_country AS beneficiary_bank_country, count(f) AS filing_count ORDER BY filing_count DESC RETURN beneficiary_bank_country, filing_count LIMIT 3

question: Find the display name of the user who provided the answer with the uuid 69273049.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer {uuid: 69273049}) MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a) RETURN u.display_name
template_key: find the display name of the user who provided the answer with the uuid <num>

question: Find the display names of the users who asked the top 3 most viewed questions.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WITH q, q.view_count AS viewCount ORDER BY viewCount DESC LIMIT 3 MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q) RETURN u.display_name AS userDisplayName
template_key: find the display names of the users who asked the top <num> most viewed questions

question: Find the movie with the biggest age difference between the oldest and youngest actor in the cast.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<--(:Person {name: "Tom Hanks"}) RETURN m.title

question: Find the switches that route to interface with IP '10.1.1.1'.
query_text: MATCH (s:Switch)-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface {ip: '10.1.1.1'}) RETURN s

question: Find all movies that share the same genre as "Toy Story" but were not produced by "Pixar Animation Studios".
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie {title: "Toy Story"})-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH g MATCH (otherMovie:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g) WHERE NOT (otherMovie)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(:ProductionCompany {name: "Pixar Animation Studios"}) RETURN DISTINCT otherMovie.title
template_key: find all movies that share the same genre as <value> but were not produced by <value>

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year as "Toy Story".
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: "Toy Story"}) WITH toyStory.year AS year MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year = year RETURN m.title

question: Find the questions tagged "neo4j" that have at least one comment.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "neo4j"}) WITH q MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment) RETURN DISTINCT q

question: Find the names of all articles that mention organizations that have been dissolved and have a negative sentiment score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment < 0 AND o.isDissolved = TRUE RETURN a.title

question: Find the display names of users who have commented on questions with answer_count greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count > 2 MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment)<-[:COMMENTED]-(u:User) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
template_key: find the display names of users who have commented on questions with answer_count greater than <num>

question: Find the articles that were published in the year 2022.
query_text: MATCH (a:Article) WHERE date(a.date).year = 2022 RETURN a

question: Find the answers that have not been accepted.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.is_accepted = false RETURN a.title

question: Find the stream with the most chatters.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:CHATTER]-(u) WITH s, count(DISTINCT u) AS chatter_count RETURN s.id, chatter_count ORDER BY chatter_count DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the stream with the most chatters

question: Find the streams that have a VIP user who also moderates another stream with a different language.
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)-[:VIP]->(u:User) MATCH (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s2:Stream) WHERE s1 <> s2    AND s1.id <> s2.id  RETURN DISTINCT s1.name
template_key: find the streams that have a vip user who also moderates another stream with a different language

question: Find the top 3 countries where entities have filed the most number of filings in 2017.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) WHERE f.begin.year = 2017 WITH e, count(f) AS filingsCount ORDER BY filingsCount DESC LIMIT 3 MATCH (e)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) RETURN c.name AS CountryName, filingsCount
template_key: find the top <num> countries where entities have filed the most number of filings in <num>

question: Find the suppliers who have the highest number of products with units in stock.
query_text: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WHERE p.unitsInStock > 0 WITH s, count(p) AS numProducts ORDER BY numProducts DESC RETURN s.companyName, numProducts
template_key: find the suppliers who have the highest number of products with units in stock

question: Find the first 3 organizations that have a public status and are in the 'Technology' industry category.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(c:IndustryCategory {name: "Technology"}) WHERE o.isPublic = true RETURN o LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> organizations that have a public status and are in the <value> industry category

question: Find the business with the highest number of reviews in the 'Beer' category.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category {name: 'Beer'}) WITH b MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review) WITH b, count(review) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewCount LIMIT 1
template_key: find the business with the highest number of reviews in the <value> category

question: "What's the walking distance for the shortest path between Zoo School and Dancing Crane Cafe?"
query_text: MATCH (zoo:PointOfInterest {name: "Zoo School"}), (cafe:PointOfInterest {name: "Dancing Crane Cafe"}),  p = shortestPath((zoo)-[:ROUTE*..15]-(cafe)) WITH [r IN relationships(p) | r.distance] AS distances RETURN reduce(totalDistance = 0, d IN distances | totalDistance + d) AS walkingDistance
template_key: <value>s the walking distance for the shortest path between zoo school and dancing crane cafe?"

question: Find the movie with the lowest rating that has the word "redeemed" in its review summary.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-() WHERE r.summary CONTAINS 'redeemed' WITH m, r.rating AS rating ORDER BY rating ASC LIMIT 1 RETURN m.title, rating
template_key: find the movie with the lowest rating that has the word <value> in its review summary

question: Find all persons who are board members of organizations that are subsidiaries of organizations headquartered in Australia.
query_text: MATCH (country:Country {name: "Australia"})<-[:IN_COUNTRY]-(city:City)<-[:IN_CITY]-(parentOrg:Organization) MATCH (parentOrg)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subsidiary:Organization) MATCH (subsidiary)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(person:Person) RETURN DISTINCT person.name
template_key: find all persons who are board members of organizations that are subsidiaries of organizations headquartered in australia

question: Find the movie with the highest number of actors who have also directed a movie.
query_text: MATCH (d:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie) MATCH (d)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH m, count(DISTINCT d) AS actorCount ORDER BY actorCount DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN m.title AS movieTitle

question: Find the customer who ordered the product with the highest 'unitPrice'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH MAX(toFloat(oi.unitPrice)) AS maxUnitPrice MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE toFloat(oi.unitPrice) = maxUnitPrice MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN c.companyName

question: Find all users who have written a review with a 5-star rating.

question: Find the entities with the most recent dorm dates.

question: Find the businesses that have been reviewed by users who have also reviewed 'Zootown Brew'.

question: Find the top 3 users with the highest reputation who asked questions.

question: "provide all exposed ports and the processes behind , for the ip '10.3.0.254', check multiple possible paths if the result is empty"
query_text: MATCH (i:Interface {ip: '10.3.0.254'})-[:EXPOSES]->(p:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Router)-[:ROUTES]->(i2:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p2:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Egress)-[:ROUTES]->(i3:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p3:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Network)-[:ROUTES]->(i4:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p4:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Zone)-[:ROUTES]->(i5:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p5:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Switch)-[:ROUTES]->(i6:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p6:Port) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:ROUTES]-(:Machine)-[:ROUTES]->(i7:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(p7:Port) WITH p, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7 UNWIND [p, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7] AS port MATCH (port)<-[:LISTENS]-(proc:Process) RETURN DISTINCT port.port AS ExposedPort, proc.name AS ProcessName, proc.pid AS ProcessID
template_key: <value><num>.<num><value>

question: Find the orders that have a 'shippedDate' earlier than their 'requiredDate'.

question: Find the orders that include at least one product with 'unitsOnOrder' > 0 and one product with 'unitsOnOrder' = 0.

query_text: MATCH (u:User {userId: "1"})-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, m ORDER BY r.rating DESC LIMIT 1 WITH u, m.year AS favoriteMovieYear MATCH (m2:Movie) WHERE m2.year = favoriteMovieYear RETURN m2.title AS movieTitle
template_key: find all the movies that were released in the same year as the user's favorite movie

question: Find the top 3 customers (by `customerID`) with the highest total order value (sum of `ORDERS.unitPrice` * `ORDERS.quantity`).
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c, sum(toFloat(rel.unitPrice) * rel.quantity) AS totalOrderValue ORDER BY totalOrderValue DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN c.customerID, totalOrderValue
template_key: find the top <num> customers (by `customerid`) with the highest total order value (sum of `orders.unitprice` * `orders.quantity`)

question: Find the articles that mention organizations with the same industry category as "Deja vu Security".
query_text: MATCH (targetOrg:Organization {name: "Deja vu Security"})-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(category:IndustryCategory) MATCH (otherOrg:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(category) WITH otherOrg MATCH (article:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(otherOrg) RETURN DISTINCT article
template_key: find the articles that mention organizations with the same industry category as <value>

question: Find the top 3 users by number of questions asked in 2020.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE q.createdAt >= datetime('2020-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND q.createdAt < datetime('2021-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN u.id, u.display_name, count(q) AS questions_asked ORDER BY questions_asked DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> users by number of questions asked in <num>

question: Find the names of all processes that are instances of the application 'cms' and have a start time after 1607000000000.
query_text: MATCH (p:Process)-[:INSTANCE]->(a:Application {name: 'cms'}) WHERE p.startTime > 1607000000000 RETURN p.name
template_key: find the names of all processes that are instances of the application <value> and have a start time after <num>

question: Find all addresses with the country code 'BHS' and list their associated entities.
query_text: MATCH (a:Address)-[:registered_address]-(e:Entity) WHERE a.country_codes = 'BHS' RETURN a.address AS Address, e.name AS EntityName
template_key: find all addresses with the country code <value> and list their associated entities

question: Find the officers that are linked to the entity with node_id 10000001 through the 'officer_of' relationship.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity {node_id: 10000001})<-[:officer_of]-(o:Officer) RETURN o.name
template_key: find the officers that are linked to the entity with node_id <num> through the <value> relationship

question: Find the business with the lowest average star rating in 'Missoula'.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business {city: 'Missoula'}) MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS average_rating ORDER BY average_rating ASC RETURN b.name, average_rating LIMIT 1
template_key: find the business with the lowest average star rating in <value>

question: Find the streams that have a VIP user who also chats on that stream.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:VIP]-(u:User) MATCH (u)-[:CHATTER]->(s) RETURN DISTINCT s.name
template_key: find the streams that have a vip user who also chats on that stream

question: Find the articles that have a sentiment score higher than 0.5.
query_text: MATCH (a:Article) WHERE a.sentiment > 0.5 RETURN a.title
template_key: find the articles that have a sentiment score higher than <num>

question: Find the movies with no reviews.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE NOT (m)<-[:REVIEWED]-() RETURN m.title
template_key: find the movies with no reviews

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a description containing the word "gaming".
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(s:Stream) WHERE u.description CONTAINS 'gaming' RETURN DISTINCT s.name
template_key: find the streams that are moderated by users who have a description containing the word <value>

question: Find all movies where the tagline contains the word "Real".
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'Real' RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies where the tagline contains the word <value>

question: Find all movies that have a runtime between 90 and 120 minutes.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.runtime >= 90 AND m.runtime <= 120 RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies that have a runtime between <num> and <num> minutes

question: Find the first 5 questions that have been tagged with more than 3 tags.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WITH q, COUNT(t) AS tagCount WHERE tagCount > 3 RETURN q ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 5
template_key: find the first <num> questions that have been tagged with more than <num> tags

question: Find all movies that have a release date before 1980.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date < date('1980-01-01') RETURN m
template_key: find all movies that have a release date before <num>

question: Find the shortest path between the user with the most streams they are a VIP of and the game "VALORANT".
query_text: MATCH (user:User)-[:VIP]->(stream:Stream) WITH user, count(*) AS vip_count ORDER BY vip_count DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH path = shortestPath((user)-[*..10]-(game:Game { name: 'VALORANT' })) RETURN path
template_key: find the shortest path between the user with the most streams they are a vip of and the game <value>

question: Find the businesses that have a higher average review rating than 'KettleHouse Brewing Co.'.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business {name: 'KettleHouse Brewing Co.'}) WITH b MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS target_avg_rating MATCH (b1:Business) WITH b1, target_avg_rating MATCH (b1)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r1:Review) WITH b1, target_avg_rating, avg(r1.stars) AS avg_rating WHERE avg_rating > target_avg_rating RETURN b1.name AS business_name
template_key: find the businesses that have a higher average review rating than <value>

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the highest IMDb rating.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH max(m.imdbRating) AS maxRating MATCH (topRated:Movie {imdbRating: maxRating}) WITH topRated.year AS releaseYear MATCH (movie:Movie {year: releaseYear}) RETURN movie.title
template_key: find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the highest imdb rating

question: Find the tweets that contain links and have been retweeted by users who have mentioned "Neo4j" in their tweets.
query_text: MATCH (t:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link) MATCH (u:User)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) MATCH (t)<-[:RETWEETS]-(tweet) RETURN DISTINCT t
template_key: find the tweets that contain links and have been retweeted by users who have mentioned <value> in their tweets

question: Find the business with the most reviews in 'San Mateo' and list its reviews.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) WHERE b.city = 'San Mateo' WITH b, COUNT(r) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) RETURN b.name AS businessName, r.text AS reviewText, r.stars AS reviewStars, r.date AS reviewDate
template_key: find the business with the most reviews in <value> and list its reviews

question: Find the business with the oldest review.
query_text: MATCH (r:Review) WITH r ORDER BY r.date ASC WITH r LIMIT 1 MATCH (r)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN b.name
template_key: find the business with the oldest review

question: Find businesses in 'Burlingame' that have been reviewed by 'Jenny' and list the categories of these businesses.
query_text: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Jenny'})-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business {city: 'Burlingame'}) MATCH (b)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) RETURN b.name AS businessName, c.name AS categoryName
template_key: find businesses in <value> that have been reviewed by <value> and list the categories of these businesses

question: Find the streams that have "Rust" as a played game and are moderated by users who are VIPs of other streams and are part of a team.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WITH s MATCH (s)<-[:MODERATOR]-(m:User) WHERE EXISTS((m)-[:VIP]->(:Stream)) AND EXISTS((m)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)) RETURN DISTINCT s
template_key: find the streams that have <value> as a played game and are moderated by users who are vips of other streams and are part of a team

question: Find the first 3 questions with exactly 1 upVote.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.upVotes = 1 RETURN q ORDER BY q.createdAt LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> questions with exactly <num> upvote

question: Find all movies that have a poster path that starts with "/rh".
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.poster_path STARTS WITH "/rh" RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies that have a poster path that starts with <value>

question: Find all movies with a rating between 75 and 90.
query_text: MATCH (:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) WHERE  r.rating >= 75 AND r.rating <=90 RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies with a rating between <num> and <num>

question: Find all versions of the software 'RHEL' that are currently running on any machine.
query_text: MATCH (s:Software {name: 'RHEL'})-[:VERSION]->(v:Version)<-[:INSTANCE]-(os:OS)<-[:RUNS]-(m:Machine) RETURN DISTINCT v.name
template_key: find all versions of the software <value> that are currently running on any machine

question: Find the question with the least number of downvotes.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.downVotes LIMIT 1

question: Find the link of the comment with the highest score.
query_text: MATCH (c:Comment) RETURN c.link ORDER BY c.score DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the movie with the highest ratio of positive reviews (rating > 70) to total reviews.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) WITH m, count(r) AS totalReviews, count(CASE WHEN r.rating > 70 THEN r END) AS positiveReviews WITH m, positiveReviews, totalReviews, (toFloat(positiveReviews)/totalReviews) AS positiveRatio RETURN m.title, positiveRatio ORDER BY positiveRatio DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the highest ratio of positive reviews (rating > <num>) to total reviews

question: Find the top 3 streams with the most followers that have "en" as a language.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE l.name = "en" WITH s, s.followers AS followerCount ORDER BY followerCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_entity' and 'beneficiary_entity' are both located in countries that are islands.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity) MATCH (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity) MATCH (originator)-[:COUNTRY]->(originatorCountry:Country) MATCH (beneficiary)-[:COUNTRY]->(beneficiaryCountry:Country) WHERE originatorCountry.tld <> "" AND beneficiaryCountry.tld <> "" RETURN f
template_key: find the filings where the <value> and <value> are both located in countries that are islands

question: Find the organizations that are headquartered in the same city as "New Energy Group".
query_text: MATCH (org1:Organization {name: "New Energy Group"})-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City) WITH city MATCH (org2:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city) RETURN org2.name

query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title STARTS WITH "T" RETURN m.title

question: Find all movies that have at least one common cast member with "Toy Story".
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'}) MATCH (toyStory)<-[:CAST_FOR]-(actor:Person) MATCH (actor)-[:CAST_FOR]->(otherMovie:Movie) WHERE toyStory <> otherMovie RETURN DISTINCT otherMovie.title

question: Find the streams that have moderators who are also VIPs of different streams.

question: Find all movies that have a revenue-to-budget ratio greater than 3.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget > 0 WITH m, m.revenue / toFloat(m.budget) AS revenue_to_budget_ratio WHERE revenue_to_budget_ratio > 3 RETURN m.title, revenue_to_budget_ratio

question: Find the streams that have moderators who are also moderators of other streams.

question: Find the questions that have been answered by a user who has also provided an answer with a score less than 0.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) WHERE a.score < 0 WITH DISTINCT u MATCH (u)-[:PROVIDED]->(:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) RETURN DISTINCT q.title

question: Find all entities that have a registered address in 'Samoa' and an officer with the country_codes 'WSM'.

question: Find the characters with the highest 'book45PageRank' in the same 'community' as 'Ryman-Frey'.

question: Find the `orderID` and `shipRegion` for orders that contain products from suppliers located in both 'USA' and 'UK'.

question: Find the articles that mention organizations that are headquartered in the same city as the organization with the id "E5HUeLBjSOVOPaauTXlONuQ". Return only the first 3.
query_text: MATCH (org1:Organization {id: "E5HUeLBjSOVOPaauTXlONuQ"})-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City)<-[:IN_CITY]->(org2:Organization) WITH org1, city, org2 MATCH (org2)<-[:MENTIONS]-(article:Article) RETURN DISTINCT article LIMIT 3

question: Find the questions that have been answered by the user with the most provided answers.

question: Find all organizations that are both competitors and suppliers of organizations that are mentioned in articles published in 2022.

query_text: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WITH s, avg(p.unitPrice) AS averageUnitPrice WITH s, averageUnitPrice ORDER BY averageUnitPrice DESC WITH s.companyName AS supplierName, collect(averageUnitPrice)[0] AS averageUnitPrice RETURN supplierName, averageUnitPrice

question: Find the display names of the users who commented on questions with a view count lower than 50.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.view_count < 50 MATCH (c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q) MATCH (u:User)-[:COMMENTED]->(c) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name

question: Find the `productName` and `supplierID` for the product with the lowest `unitPrice` in each category.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c, min(p.unitPrice) AS minPrice, collect(p) AS products WITH c, minPrice, [product IN products WHERE product.unitPrice = minPrice][0] AS productWithMinPrice RETURN productWithMinPrice.productName, productWithMinPrice.supplierID, c.categoryName
template_key: find the `productname` and `supplierid` for the product with the lowest `unitprice` in each category

question: Find the entities that are originators of filings where the beneficiary entity's name contains "Bank" and the amount is greater than 100000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(o:Entity),       (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity) WHERE b.name CONTAINS 'Bank' AND f.amount > 100000 RETURN DISTINCT o

question: Find all Addresses in Samoa that are linked to Entities with the service provider "Mossack Fonseca".

question: Find the top 3 `originator_bank_country` values with the highest average filing `amount`.

question: Find the questions that have been answered by a user who has also asked a question with the same tag.

question: Find the supplier who supplies the least number of distinct products to customers in 'USA'.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer {country: 'USA'}) MATCH (c)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) MATCH (o)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p) WITH s, count(DISTINCT p) AS productCount ORDER BY productCount ASC RETURN s.companyName AS Supplier, productCount LIMIT 1

question: Find all actors who have worked as both 'Actor' and 'Director' on different movies.

question: Find the `orderID` and `shipName` of orders that include products from at least 3 different categories.

question: Find the question with the least number of downvotes and a score greater than the average score of all questions.

question: Find the answers that are not marked as accepted and have a score greater than the average answer score for questions tagged with "cypher".
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag {name: "cypher"}),       (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(answer:Answer) WITH avg(answer.score) AS average_score MATCH (answer:Answer) WHERE NOT answer.is_accepted AND answer.score > average_score RETURN answer.title

question: Find all Intermediaries with a "name" containing "LIMITED" that are connected to Entities that share the same "incorporation_date" as an Entity with a "status" of "Changed agent".

question: Find the movie with the highest rating that does not have the word "movie" in its review summary.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) WHERE NOT toLower(r.summary) CONTAINS "movie" WITH max(r.rating) as maxRating MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) WHERE r.rating = maxRating RETURN m.title, r.rating

question: Find all Officers who have an "officer_of" relationship with an Entity that shares the same "registered_address" as an Entity linked to an Intermediary with the "address" value containing "TSIM SHA TSUI".

question: Find the orders that include products from the category with the lowest average unit price.

question: Find all customers who have ordered products from more than one category.

question: Find the customers who have placed orders that include products with the same 'productID'.

question: Find the top 3 questions that were asked on a weekend.
