question: Find the top 5 countries where entities have filed the most filings that began in 2017.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e) WHERE f.begin >= datetime('2017-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND f.begin < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') MATCH (e)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) RETURN c.name AS country, COUNT(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> countries where entities have filed the most filings that began in <num>

question: Find the businesses in 'San Mateo' that have been reviewed by 'Jenny' and list the categories of these businesses.
query_text: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Jenny'})-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business {city: 'San Mateo'}) MATCH (b)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) RETURN b.name, collect(c.name) AS categories
template_key: find the businesses in <value> that have been reviewed by <value> and list the categories of these businesses

question: Find the orders that include products from categories with an average unit price greater than 20.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avg_price WHERE avg_price > 20 MATCH (c)<-[:PART_OF]-(p2:Product)<-[:ORDERS]-(o:Order) RETURN DISTINCT o.orderID
template_key: find the orders that include products from categories with an average unit price greater than <num>

question: Find all streams that have a VIP who also chats in a stream with the word "Creative" in its description.
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)-[:VIP]->(vip) MATCH (s2:Stream) WHERE s2.description CONTAINS 'Creative' MATCH (vip)-[:CHATTER]->(s2) RETURN DISTINCT s1.name
template_key: find all streams that have a vip who also chats in a stream with the word <value> in its description

question: Find all movies that have been directed by a person who has also directed a stage play. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m LIMIT 3
template_key: find all movies that have been directed by a person who has also directed a stage play. (first <num>)

question: Find the actors who have played the same role in different movies.
query_text: MATCH (a:Actor)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH a, ai.role AS role, count(DISTINCT m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount > 1 RETURN a.name AS actorName, role
template_key: find the actors who have played the same role in different movies

question: Find all Intermediaries with a status of "SUSPENDED" that are linked to Entities that share the same "registered_address" as an Entity with a status of "Defaulted".
query_text: MATCH (defaulted:Entity {status: 'Defaulted'})-[:registered_address]->(sharedAddress:Address)<-[:registered_address]-(entity:Entity)<-[:intermediary_of]-(intermediary:Intermediary {status: 'SUSPENDED'}) RETURN DISTINCT intermediary.name
template_key: find all intermediaries with a status of <value> that are linked to entities that share the same <value> as an entity with a status of <value>

question: Find all movies that have a revenue greater than the combined revenue of the bottom 10 movies.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH m ORDER BY m.revenue ASC WITH m.revenue AS tenth_lowest_revenue SKIP 9 LIMIT 1  MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.revenue <= tenth_lowest_revenue WITH sum(m.revenue) AS combined_revenue MATCH (m:Movie)  WHERE m.revenue > combined_revenue RETURN m.title, m.revenue
template_key: find all movies that have a revenue greater than the combined revenue of the bottom <num> movies

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a total view count greater than the average total view count of all streams playing the same game.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) WITH g, avg(s.total_view_count) AS avg_view_count MATCH (u:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(other:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g) WHERE u.total_view_count > avg_view_count RETURN DISTINCT other.name
template_key: find the streams that are moderated by users who have a total view count greater than the average total view count of all streams playing the same game

question: Find the question with the most downvotes and is tagged with 'node.js'.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'node.js'}) WITH q, t ORDER BY q.downVotes DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN q.title
template_key: find the question with the most downvotes and is tagged with <value>

question: Find the questions tagged with both 'apollo' and 'graphql' and have a score greater than 0.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t1:Tag) WHERE t1.name = 'apollo' MATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t2:Tag) WHERE t2.name = 'graphql' AND q.score > 0 RETURN q
template_key: find the questions tagged with both <value> and <value> and have a score greater than <num>

question: Find the question with the least number of upvotes.
query_text: MATCH (question:Question) WITH question, question.upVotes AS upvotes ORDER BY upvotes ASC LIMIT 1 RETURN question.title, upvotes
template_key: find the question with the least number of upvotes

question: Find the movie with the highest number of actors who have also written a movie.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Person)-[:WROTE]->(:Movie) WITH m, count(DISTINCT a) AS writer_actor_count RETURN m.title, writer_actor_count ORDER BY writer_actor_count DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the highest number of actors who have also written a movie

question: Find all Addresses that are linked to both an Entity and an Intermediary that have different "lastEditTimestamp" values.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[r1:registered_address]->(a:Address) MATCH (i:Intermediary)-[r2:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE e.lastEditTimestamp <> i.lastEditTimestamp RETURN DISTINCT a
template_key: find all addresses that are linked to both an entity and an intermediary that have different <value> values

question: Find all applications that have a dependency on a process that listens on port 80.
query_text: MATCH (app:Application)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(process:Process)-[:LISTENS]->(port:Port {port: 80}) RETURN app.name AS application_name
template_key: find all applications that have a dependency on a process that listens on port <num>

question: Find all people who have both acted in and directed the same movie.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person) MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH DISTINCT p RETURN p.name AS personName
template_key: find all people who have both acted in and directed the same movie

question: Find all movies that have a revenue greater than the average revenue of all movies.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH avg(m.revenue) AS avg_revenue MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.revenue > avg_revenue RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies that have a revenue greater than the average revenue of all movies

question: Find streams that play the game "Rust" and have more than 5000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) WHERE g.name = "Rust" AND s.followers > 5000 RETURN s
template_key: find streams that play the game <value> and have more than <num> followers

question: Find the businesses with the highest and lowest average review lengths.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, avg(size(r.text)) AS averageReviewLength WITH max(averageReviewLength) AS maxAvgLength,       min(averageReviewLength) AS minAvgLength MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, avg(size(r.text)) AS averageReviewLength, maxAvgLength, minAvgLength WHERE averageReviewLength = maxAvgLength OR averageReviewLength = minAvgLength RETURN b.name, averageReviewLength
template_key: find the businesses with the highest and lowest average review lengths

question: Find 3 characters with the most diverse fastrf_embedding values (considering range between max and min in the list).
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.fastrf_embedding IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name, c.fastrf_embedding,         max(c.fastrf_embedding) - min(c.fastrf_embedding) AS diversity ORDER BY diversity DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find <num> characters with the most diverse fastrf_embedding values (considering range between max and min in the list)

question: Find the organizations that have been acquired by organizations with more than 10,000 employees.
query_text: MATCH (acquirer:Organization)<-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-(acquired:Organization)  WHERE acquirer.nbrEmployees > 10000 RETURN DISTINCT acquired.name
template_key: find the organizations that have been acquired by organizations with more than <num>,<num> employees

question: Find the filings where the originator entity is located in the same city as the beneficiary entity.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WITH f, [(f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(o) | o] AS originatorEntity, [(f)-[:BENEFITS]->(b) | b] AS beneficiaryEntity WHERE size(originatorEntity) > 0 AND size(beneficiaryEntity) > 0 AND originatorEntity[0].location = beneficiaryEntity[0].location RETURN f.sar_id, f.amount
template_key: find the filings where the originator entity is located in the same city as the beneficiary entity

question: Can you name 3 people who are both investors and CEOs of different organizations?
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_CEO]->(org1:Organization), (p)-[:HAS_INVESTOR]->(org2:Organization) WHERE org1.id <> org2.id RETURN p.name LIMIT 3
template_key: can you name <num> people who are both investors and ceos of different organizations

question: Find the processes that are running on the same machine as the application 'cms'.
query_text: MATCH (app:Application {name: 'cms'})-[:RUNS]-(m:Machine) MATCH (m)-[:RUNS]->(p:Process) RETURN p.name AS processName
template_key: find the processes that are running on the same machine as the application <value>

question: Find the first 5 people born after 1980 who directed a movie released before 2000.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born > 1980 AND m.released < 2000 RETURN p LIMIT 5
template_key: find the first <num> people born after <num> who directed a movie released before <num>

question: Find all movies where the director also has a writing credit.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(p:Person)-[:WROTE]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT m.title
template_key: find all movies where the director also has a writing credit

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from both 'Will' and 'Jenny'.
query_text: MATCH (u1:User {name: 'Will'})-[:WROTE]->(r1:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH u1, collect(b) AS businesses1 MATCH (u2:User {name: 'Jenny'})-[:WROTE]->(r2:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH businesses1, collect(b) AS businesses2 RETURN apoc.coll.intersection(businesses1, businesses2) AS businessesReviewedByBoth
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from both <value> and <value>

question: Find the answers that have been accepted and have a score less than the average answer score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH avg(a.score) AS average_score MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.is_accepted = TRUE AND a.score < average_score RETURN a
template_key: find the answers that have been accepted and have a score less than the average answer score

question: Find characters with a book1PageRank above 5 and a community of 578.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1PageRank > 5 AND c.community = 578 RETURN c
template_key: find characters with a book1pagerank above <num> and a community of <num>

question: Find the streams that have a followers to total view count ratio greater than 0.1.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WITH s, s.followers / toFloat(s.total_view_count) AS ratio WHERE ratio > 0.1 RETURN s.name AS stream_name, ratio
template_key: find the streams that have a followers to total view count ratio greater than <num>

question: Find the questions with the tag "neo4j" and a view count greater than 100.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = "neo4j" AND q.view_count > 100 RETURN q
template_key: find the questions with the tag <value> and a view count greater than <num>

question: Find the review with the highest star rating for each business.
query_text: MATCH (rev:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(bus:Business) WITH bus, rev ORDER BY rev.stars DESC WITH bus, collect(rev)[0] AS topReview RETURN bus.name AS businessName, topReview
template_key: find the review with the highest star rating for each business

question: Find the movies that have an average vote greater than 8.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.average_vote > 8 RETURN m.title
template_key: find the movies that have an average vote greater than <num>

question: Find all users who are VIPs for at least two different streams that play the game "Rust".
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:VIP]->(s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WITH u, count(DISTINCT s) AS vipCount WHERE vipCount >= 2 RETURN u.name
template_key: find all users who are vips for at least two different streams that play the game <value>

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who created their accounts before 2018.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u:User) WHERE u.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN s.name
template_key: find the streams that are moderated by users who created their accounts before <num>

question: Find all users who have written reviews for businesses in more than one category.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) WITH u.userId AS userId, count(DISTINCT c.name) AS distinctCategories WHERE distinctCategories > 1 RETURN userId
template_key: find all users who have written reviews for businesses in more than one category

question: Find the top 3 tweets with the most favorites posted by "Neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WITH t  ORDER BY t.favorites DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN t.id_str
template_key: find the top <num> tweets with the most favorites posted by <value>

question: Find 3 movies that were both directed and reviewed by the same person.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[:REVIEWED]-(p) RETURN m.title AS Movie, p.name AS Director_Reviewer LIMIT 3
template_key: find <num> movies that were both directed and reviewed by the same person

question: Find the streams that have a moderator who also moderates a stream with the language "ru" and has more than 5,000 followers and have the language "en".
query_text: MATCH (stream1:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(language1:Language {name: "en"}) MATCH (stream1)<-[:MODERATOR]-(moderator:User) MATCH (moderator)-[:MODERATOR]->(stream2:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(language2:Language {name: "ru"}) WHERE moderator.followers > 5000 RETURN DISTINCT stream1
template_key: find the streams that have a moderator who also moderates a stream with the language <value> and has more than <num>,<num> followers and have the language <value>

question: Find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime shorter than their age.
query_text: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WITH a, m,  m.year - date(a.born).year  AS age, m.runtime AS runtime WHERE runtime < age RETURN DISTINCT a.name
template_key: find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime shorter than their age

question: Find the titles of questions answered by the user with display name "Anu".
query_text: MATCH (u:User {display_name: "Anu"})-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) RETURN q.title
template_key: find the titles of questions answered by the user with display name <value>

question: Find all people who have directed movies with Keanu Reeves.
query_text: MATCH (kr:Person {name: "Keanu Reeves"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(director:Person) RETURN DISTINCT director.name
template_key: find all people who have directed movies with keanu reeves

question: Find the filings where the beneficiary bank is located in a country with a 'code' of 'GBR' and the amount is less than 100000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE c.code = 'GBR' AND f.amount < 100000 RETURN f.sar_id, f.amount
template_key: find the filings where the beneficiary bank is located in a country with a <value> of <value> and the amount is less than <num>

question: Find all users who have the same 'description' as the user with name 'itsbigchase'.
query_text: MATCH (targetUser:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}) WITH targetUser.description AS targetDescription MATCH (otherUser:User) WHERE otherUser.description = targetDescription RETURN otherUser.name AS user_with_same_description
template_key: find all users who have the same <value> as the user with name <value>

question: Find all people who have acted in movies directed by Lana Wachowski.
query_text: MATCH (director:Person {name: "Lana Wachowski"})-[:DIRECTED]->(movie:Movie) WITH movie MATCH (actor:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie) RETURN DISTINCT actor
template_key: find all people who have acted in movies directed by lana wachowski

question: Find all movies where the director's birth country is the same as the movie's primary filming location.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Director) WHERE d.bornIn = m.countries[0] RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies where the director<value>s primary filming location

question: Find the customer who placed the order with the highest freight cost.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order) WITH o ORDER BY toFloat(o.freight) DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN c.companyName
template_key: find the customer who placed the order with the highest freight cost

question: Find all movies that have a revenue greater than the average revenue of movies in the same genre.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH g, avg(m.revenue) AS average_revenue MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g) WHERE m.revenue > average_revenue RETURN m.title AS movie_title, m.revenue AS movie_revenue, average_revenue
template_key: find all movies that have a revenue greater than the average revenue of movies in the same genre

question: Find the top 3 tweets with the most retweets that mention users followed by "Neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) MATCH (me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(followed:User) MATCH (tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(followed) MATCH (retweet:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(tweet) WITH tweet, count(retweet) AS retweet_count ORDER BY retweet_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN tweet.id, retweet_count
template_key: find the top <num> tweets with the most retweets that mention users followed by <value>

question: Find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles that also mention their competitors.
query_text: MATCH (o1:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2:Organization) WHERE (o1)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(o2) RETURN DISTINCT o1.name
template_key: find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles that also mention their competitors

question: Find all businesses that have received reviews from users who have also visited businesses in the same neighborhood.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH u, b MATCH (b2:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r2:Review)<-[:WROTE]-(u) WHERE b.city = b2.city AND b.businessId <> b2.businessId RETURN DISTINCT b.name
template_key: find all businesses that have received reviews from users who have also visited businesses in the same neighborhood

question: Find the body_markdown of comments made on questions that have an answer marked as is_accepted and have a view count greater than 100.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.view_count > 100 MATCH (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WHERE a.is_accepted = True MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) RETURN c.body_markdown
template_key: find the body_markdown of comments made on questions that have an answer marked as is_accepted and have a view count greater than <num>

question: Find the business with the highest average star rating.
query_text: MATCH (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS average_rating ORDER BY average_rating DESC RETURN b.name AS business_name, average_rating LIMIT 1
template_key: find the business with the highest average star rating

question: Find the answers with the lowest score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) RETURN a ORDER BY a.score ASC LIMIT 10
template_key: find the answers with the lowest score

question: Find the address with the country_codes 'WSM'.
query_text: MATCH (a:Address {country_codes: 'WSM'}) RETURN a.address
template_key: find the address with the country_codes <value>

question: Find the titles of questions that have been commented on by more than one user.
query_text: MATCH (user:User)-[:COMMENTED]->(comment:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(question:Question) WITH question, count(DISTINCT user) AS distinct_commenters WHERE distinct_commenters > 1 RETURN question.title
template_key: find the titles of questions that have been commented on by more than one user

question: Find the names and review texts of businesses with a rating less than 4.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.stars < 4.0 RETURN b.name AS businessName, r.text AS reviewText
template_key: find the names and review texts of businesses with a rating less than <num>

question: Find the body_markdown of the comment with the lowest score.
query_text: MATCH (c:Comment) RETURN c.body_markdown ORDER BY c.score LIMIT 1
template_key: find the body_markdown of the comment with the lowest score

question: Find the questions that have no upvotes and no downvotes.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.upVotes = 0 AND q.downVotes = 0 RETURN q.title
template_key: find the questions that have no upvotes and no downvotes

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews with both positive and negative sentiment.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(positiveReview:Review) WHERE positiveReview.stars >= 4 WITH b, collect(positiveReview) AS positiveReviews MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(negativeReview:Review) WHERE negativeReview.stars < 4 WITH b, positiveReviews, collect(negativeReview) AS negativeReviews WHERE size(positiveReviews) > 0 AND size(negativeReviews) > 0 RETURN b.name AS businessName
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews with both positive and negative sentiment

question: Find all movies that have been released during the summer blockbuster season. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date.month >= 5 AND m.release_date.month <= 8 RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
template_key: find all movies that have been released during the summer blockbuster season. (first <num>)

question: Find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime shorter than the average human attention span.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.runtime < 480 WITH m MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT a.name
template_key: find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime shorter than the average human attention span

question: Find the orders that include the product with the highest quantity ordered.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH p, max(orders.quantity) AS maxQuantity MATCH (o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE orders.quantity = maxQuantity  RETURN o
template_key: find the orders that include the product with the highest quantity ordered

question: Find the products that have a higher quantity on order than units in stock.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder > p.unitsInStock RETURN p.productName
template_key: find the products that have a higher quantity on order than units in stock

question: Find the questions with the same score as the question with id 62220732.
query_text: MATCH (question:Question {id: 62220732}) WITH question.score AS targetScore MATCH (otherQuestion:Question) WHERE otherQuestion.score = targetScore RETURN otherQuestion.id
template_key: find the questions with the same score as the question with id <num>

question: Find the movies that have been rated by more than 100 users.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH m, count(u) AS ratingCount WHERE ratingCount > 100 RETURN m
template_key: find the movies that have been rated by more than <num> users

question: Find the entities that share the same officer as the entity with `internal_id` '1001263'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity {internal_id: '1001263'})-[:officer_of]-(o:Officer) WITH o MATCH (o)-[:officer_of]-(other:Entity) WHERE other.internal_id <> '1001263' RETURN DISTINCT other
template_key: find the entities that share the same officer as the entity with `internal_id` <value>

question: Find the `orderID` and `orderDate` for orders placed by the customer with `customerID` 'VINET' that include a product with `productID` '72'.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer {customerID: 'VINET'})-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WHERE EXISTS {   MATCH (o)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product {productID: '72'}) } RETURN o.orderID, o.orderDate
template_key: find the `orderid` and `orderdate` for orders placed by the customer with `customerid` <value> that include a product with `productid` <value>

question: Find the questions with an answer count greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count > 2 RETURN q
template_key: find the questions with an answer count greater than <num>

question: Find the character with the name 'Stevron-Frey' and return their louvain value.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Stevron-Frey'}) RETURN c.louvain
template_key: find the character with the name <value> and return their louvain value

question: "What is the tagline of the movie \"Forrest Gump\"?"
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie {title: "Forrest Gump"}) RETURN m.tagline
template_key: <value>forrest gump\<value>

question: Find the 'Type' nodes (with their 'type' and 'ram') used by 'Machine' nodes within the 'Rack' named "DC1-RCK-1-1".
query_text: MATCH (r:Rack {name: "DC1-RCK-1-1"})-[:HOLDS]->(m:Machine)-[:TYPE]->(t:Type) RETURN DISTINCT t.type, t.ram
template_key: find the <value> nodes (with their <value> and <value>) used by <value> nodes within the <value> named <value>

question: Display the first 5 officers who have addresses in South Korea.
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.countries = "South Korea" RETURN o.name AS OfficerName, a.address AS Address LIMIT 5
template_key: display the first <num> officers who have addresses in south korea

question: "What's the average interactions a user has?"
query_text: MATCH (:User)-[r:INTERACTED]->(:User) RETURN AVG(r.weight) AS averageInteractions
template_key: <value>s the average interactions a user has?"

question: Find the actors who have acted in movies with the tagline containing "beginning".
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'beginning' MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
template_key: find the actors who have acted in movies with the tagline containing <value>

question: Find all movies that Joel Silver produced.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person {name: "Joel Silver"})-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m
template_key: find all movies that joel silver produced

question: Find the top 3 longest reviews for businesses in 'Missoula' and the corresponding businesses names.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) WHERE b.city = 'Missoula' WITH r, b ORDER BY size(r.text) DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN r.text AS reviewText, b.name AS businessName
template_key: find the top <num> longest reviews for businesses in <value> and the corresponding businesses names

question: Find all games played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator for a stream with more than 10,000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(s2:Stream) WHERE s2.followers > 10000 WITH s1 MATCH (s1)<-[:CHATTER]-(u:User) WITH s1 MATCH (s1)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
template_key: find all games played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator for a stream with more than <num>,<num> followers

question: Find entities that have a 'registered address' in Samoa.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE e.jurisdiction_description = 'Samoa' RETURN e.name AS entity_name, e.address AS entity_address, a.address AS registered_address
template_key: find entities that have a <value> in samoa

question: "What are the sentiment scores of articles mentioning Clarity Insights, and how do they correlate with the organization's revenue?"
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization {name: "Clarity Insights"})-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) RETURN a.sentiment AS SentimentScore, o.revenue AS Revenue

question: Find the customers who have placed orders with a total value greater than 1000.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(toFloat(rel.quantity) * toFloat(rel.unitPrice)) AS totalOrderValue WITH o, totalOrderValue WHERE totalOrderValue > 1000 MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN DISTINCT c.companyName
template_key: find the customers who have placed orders with a total value greater than <num>

question: Find the business with the most reviews and display its name and the average rating of its reviews.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review) WITH b, count(review) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC WITH b, reviewCount LIMIT 1 MATCH (b)<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review) RETURN b.name, avg(review.stars) AS averageRating

question: Find the customer who has placed orders for the highest number of different products.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c, count(DISTINCT p) AS distinctProductCount ORDER BY distinctProductCount DESC RETURN c.companyName, distinctProductCount LIMIT 1

question: Find the top 3 organizations that have been invested in by more than one person.

question: Find all users who rated a movie on its release date.

question: Find the streams that have "Rust" as a played game and are moderated by users who are part of a team and are VIPs of other streams.

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the highest budget.
query_text: MATCH (m1:Movie) WITH m1 ORDER BY m1.budget DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (m2:Movie) WHERE m2.year = m1.year AND m2.movieId <> m1.movieId RETURN m2.title

query_text: MATCH (u:User {userId: "1"})-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, m.countries AS userCountries UNWIND userCountries AS userCountry MATCH (movie:Movie) WHERE userCountry IN movie.countries RETURN DISTINCT movie.title

question: Find the questions that have been commented on by multiple users.

question: Find the orders that include products from all categories.
query_text: MATCH (c:Category) WITH collect(distinct c.categoryID) AS allCategoryIds MATCH (o:Order) -[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, collect(distinct p.categoryID) AS orderCategoryIds, allCategoryIds WHERE size(orderCategoryIds) = size(allCategoryIds) RETURN o.orderID AS OrdersWithProductsFromAllCategories

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses with a different name.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r1:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b1:Business) MATCH (u)-[:WROTE]->(r2:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b2:Business) WHERE b1.businessId <> b2.businessId AND b1.name <> b2.name RETURN DISTINCT b1.name AS businesses

question: Find the tweets posted by 'Neo4j' that have been replied to by at least 3 different users.

question: Find all games played by streams that have at least one VIP who is also a chatter in a stream that belongs to a team created before 2018 and has "Gaming" in its name.

question: Find the questions with the least number of answers.

question: Find all businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses in a different state.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r1:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b1:Business),       (u)-[:WROTE]->(r2:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b2:Business) WHERE b1.state <> b2.state WITH DISTINCT u MATCH (u)-[:WROTE]->(:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN DISTINCT b.name

question: Find the top 5 switches by rack number in zone 4.

question: Find the body_markdown of comments made on questions with the lowest answer_count.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WITH min(q.answer_count) AS lowest_answer_count MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count = lowest_answer_count MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) RETURN c.body_markdown

question: Find the characters with the lowest `pagerank` who interact with "Cersei-Lannister" in any book.
query_text: MATCH (cersei:Character {name: "Cersei-Lannister"})-[:INTERACTS*1..2]-(other) WITH other, min(other.pagerank) AS minPagerank WHERE other.pagerank = minPagerank RETURN DISTINCT other.name AS character_name, minPagerank ORDER BY minPagerank ASC
template_key: find the characters with the lowest `pagerank` who interact with <value> in any book

question: Find the movie with the highest ratio of votes to its release year.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH m, m.votes / m.released AS ratio ORDER BY ratio DESC RETURN m.title, ratio LIMIT 1

question: Find the screen names of the top 3 users with the most followers who follow the user with screen name "neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: "neo4j"}) MATCH (follower:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(u) WITH follower, u ORDER BY follower.followers DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN follower.screen_name

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have never given a rating below 4 stars.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review) WHERE r.stars >= 4 WITH DISTINCT u MATCH (u)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN DISTINCT b.name AS businessName
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have never given a rating below <num> stars

question: Find the top 5 filings based on the number of different countries involved as either originator or beneficiary.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(o:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(oc:Country) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(bc:Country) WITH f, collect(DISTINCT oc.code) + collect(DISTINCT bc.code) AS countries WITH f, size(apoc.coll.toSet(countries)) AS country_count RETURN f.sar_id AS filing_id, country_count ORDER BY country_count DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> filings based on the number of different countries involved as either originator or beneficiary

question: Find the product that has the highest difference between its unit price and the average unit price of products in the same category.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c.categoryID AS categoryID, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avgPrice MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category {categoryID: categoryID}) WITH p, avgPrice, abs(p.unitPrice - avgPrice) AS priceDiff  ORDER BY priceDiff DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN p.productName, priceDiff
template_key: find the product that has the highest difference between its unit price and the average unit price of products in the same category

question: Find the streams that have a total view count greater than the average total view count of all streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WITH avg(s.total_view_count) AS average_view_count MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.total_view_count > average_view_count RETURN s

question: Find the customers who have a 'fax' number that starts with '030'.

question: Find the names of all articles that mention organizations that have been acquired and have a positive sentiment score.

question: Find the top 5 orders with the longest shipping time from order date to shipped date.

question: Find the top 3 characters with the lowest 'book45PageRank' and a 'community' value greater than 600.

question: Find the movie with the highest difference in the number of votes between any two movies the same actor has worked on.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie) MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Movie) WHERE m1 <> m2 WITH m1, m2, abs(m1.votes - m2.votes) AS vote_diff WITH max(vote_diff) AS max_vote_diff MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie) MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Movie) WHERE m1 <> m2 AND abs(m1.votes - m2.votes) = max_vote_diff RETURN m1.title, m2.title, max_vote_diff
template_key: find the movie with the highest difference in the number of votes between any two movies the same actor has worked on

question: Find all movies that have a budget in the top 10% of all movie budgets.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH percentileCont(m.budget, 0.9) AS budget_threshold MATCH (m:Movie)  WHERE m.budget >= budget_threshold RETURN m.title AS movie_title, m.budget AS movie_budget ORDER BY m.budget DESC
template_key: find all movies that have a budget in the top <num>% of all movie budgets

question: Find the top 5 characters with the highest 'centrality' who interact with characters with a 'degree' less than 10.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WITH c, [(c)-[:INTERACTS]->(c2:Character) WHERE c2.degree < 10 | c2.name] AS interacting_with_low_degree WHERE size(interacting_with_low_degree) > 0 RETURN c.name, c.centrality  ORDER BY c.centrality DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the top 5 customers who have ordered the product with the highest unit price.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p ORDER BY p.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p) RETURN c.companyName, COUNT(*) AS ordersCount ORDER BY ordersCount DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find all people who have acted in movies with a historical setting and have a rating above 90.

question: Find the movies produced by people who have also directed a movie.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(d:Movie) WITH p MATCH (p)-[:PRODUCED]->(m:Movie) RETURN DISTINCT m.title

question: Find all movies released between 1990 and 2000 that have a revenue greater than 100 million dollars. (first 5)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date >= date('1990-01-01') AND m.release_date <= date('2000-12-31') AND m.revenue > 100000000 RETURN m.title LIMIT 5

question: Display tweets that use the source named 'Buffer'.

question: Find the `productName` and `supplierID` for the product with the highest difference between its `unitPrice` and the average `unitPrice` of its category.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avgCategoryPrice MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c) WITH p, avgCategoryPrice, abs(p.unitPrice - avgCategoryPrice) AS priceDifference ORDER BY priceDifference DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN p.productName, p.supplierID
template_key: find the `productname` and `supplierid` for the product with the highest difference between its `unitprice` and the average `unitprice` of its category

question: Find the top 5 organizations with the highest revenue.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization) RETURN o.name AS organizationName, o.revenue AS organizationRevenue ORDER BY organizationRevenue DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> organizations with the highest revenue

question: Find the 'name' of the character with the lowest 'book45PageRank'.

question: Find the suppliers who supply products with a 'reorderLevel' greater than 20 and are based in 'Germany'.

question: Find the movie with the largest number of different roles for a single actor.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[ai:ACTED_IN]-(p:Person) WITH m, size(ai.roles) AS roleCount WITH max(roleCount) AS maxRoleCount MATCH (m:Movie)<-[ai:ACTED_IN]-(p:Person) WHERE size(ai.roles) = maxRoleCount RETURN m.title, maxRoleCount

question: Can you list the first 4 dependencies of the 'webserver' application?

question: Find the tweets posted by users who have more than 10000 followers and have been retweeted by 'Neo4j'.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)  WHERE u.followers > 10000 MATCH (u)-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) MATCH (t)<-[:RETWEETS]-(:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(user:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'}) RETURN DISTINCT t

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a URL in their description.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.description CONTAINS 'http' OR u.description CONTAINS 'www' MATCH (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s:Stream) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS stream_name

question: Find all movies that have a soundtrack composed by Hans Zimmer.

question: Find all movies where the director's previous movie had a lower IMDb rating.
query_text: MATCH (d)--(m1:Movie) WITH d, m1 ORDER BY m1.year WITH d, collect(m1) AS movies UNWIND range(1, size(movies) - 1) AS i WITH movies[i] AS m2, movies[i - 1] AS m1 WHERE m1.imdbRating < m2.imdbRating RETURN DISTINCT m2.title
template_key: find all movies where the director's previous movie had a lower imdb rating

question: Find the filings where the difference between the 'begin' and 'end' dates is greater than 6 months.

query_text: MATCH (startUser:User {screen_name: "neo4j"})-[:FOLLOWS]->(followingUser:User)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link) MATCH (retweetUser:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(tweet) RETURN DISTINCT retweetUser.screen_name

question: Find the business with the oldest review that also has the word 'on' in its name.

question: Find all persons who are CEOs of organizations that are subsidiaries of organizations headquartered in Europe.
query_text: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.name IN ['Austria', 'Belgium', 'Bulgaria', 'Croatia', 'Cyprus', 'Czech Republic', 'Denmark', 'Estonia', 'Finland', 'France', 'Germany', 'Greece', 'Hungary', 'Iceland', 'Ireland', 'Italy', 'Latvia', 'Lithuania', 'Luxembourg', 'Malta', 'Netherlands', 'Norway', 'Poland', 'Portugal', 'Romania', 'Slovakia', 'Slovenia', 'Spain', 'Sweden', 'Switzerland', 'Ukraine', 'United Kingdom'] MATCH (parentOrg:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(org) MATCH (parentOrg)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) RETURN DISTINCT ceo

question: Find all movies that have the same languages as "Toy Story".
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: "Toy Story"})-[:IN_GENRE]->(genre:Genre) WITH toyStory, collect(genre.name) AS toyStoryGenres MATCH (otherMovie:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(genre) WHERE genre.name IN toyStoryGenres AND otherMovie.title <> "Toy Story" RETURN DISTINCT otherMovie.title

question: Find all movies that have been directed by a person who has also written the screenplay. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[crew:CREW_FOR]-(p:Person) WHERE crew.job = "Director" WITH collect(m) AS directed_movies  MATCH (m:Movie)<-[crew:CREW_FOR]-(p:Person) WHERE crew.job = "Screenplay" WITH directed_movies, collect(m) AS written_movies  RETURN [m IN directed_movies WHERE m IN written_movies][..3] AS movies

question: Find the answers that have been accepted and have a score greater than the average answer score.

question: Find all Officers who have an "officer_of" relationship with an Entity that shares the same "ibcRUC" as another Entity linked to an Intermediary with the name "LOYAL PORT LIMITED".
query_text: MATCH (i:Intermediary {name: "LOYAL PORT LIMITED"})-[]-(e1:Entity) WITH DISTINCT e1.ibcRUC AS sharedIbcRUC MATCH (e2:Entity {ibcRUC: sharedIbcRUC}) WITH DISTINCT e2 MATCH (o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(e2) RETURN DISTINCT o

question: Find the answers that are marked as accepted and have a score less than the average answer score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH avg(a.score) AS average_score MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.is_accepted = TRUE AND a.score < average_score RETURN a
template_key: find the answers that are marked as accepted and have a score less than the average answer score

question: Find the movie with the highest difference between its budget and revenue.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH m, m.revenue - m.budget AS profit RETURN m { .*, profit: profit } ORDER BY profit DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the highest difference between its budget and revenue

question: Find movies with fewer than 50 votes.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.votes < 50 RETURN m.title, m.votes
template_key: find movies with fewer than <num> votes

question: Find the 'name' of the character with the lowest 'book1BetweennessCentrality' value among characters with a 'pagerank' greater than 0.2.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.pagerank > 0.2 WITH min(c.book1BetweennessCentrality) AS min_centrality MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1BetweennessCentrality = min_centrality RETURN c.name
template_key: find the <value> of the character with the lowest <value> value among characters with a <value> greater than <num>

question: Find the supplier who has the most products with a reorder level greater than 15.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) WHERE p.reorderLevel > 15 WITH s, count(p) AS productCount ORDER BY productCount DESC RETURN s.companyName AS supplierName, productCount LIMIT 1
template_key: find the supplier who has the most products with a reorder level greater than <num>

question: Find all games played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator for a stream with more than 10,000 followers and uses the English language.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:CHATTER]-(user:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(ms:Stream) WHERE ms.followers > 10000 MATCH (ms)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(lang:Language) WHERE lang.name = 'en' MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
template_key: find all games played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator for a stream with more than <num>,<num> followers and uses the english language

question: Find the `customerID` and total number of distinct products they ordered.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c.customerID AS customerID, COLLECT(DISTINCT p.productID) AS distinctProducts RETURN customerID, size(distinctProducts) AS totalDistinctProducts ORDER BY totalDistinctProducts DESC
template_key: find the `customerid` and total number of distinct products they ordered

question: Find the entities that have been incorporated on '23-MAR-2006'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.incorporation_date = '23-MAR-2006' RETURN e.name, e.countries, e.service_provider, e.status, e.jurisdiction_description
template_key: find the entities that have been incorporated on <value>

question: Find the `customerID` and `contactName` of customers who have placed orders that were shipped to a different country than the one they are located in.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WHERE c.country <> o.shipCountry RETURN c.customerID, c.contactName

question: Find the movie with the highest rating that also has the lowest number of votes.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH m ORDER BY m.rating DESC, m.votes ASC RETURN m.title LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the highest rating that also has the lowest number of votes

question: Find the officers with `sourceID` "Panama Papers" and a connection to an entity with `status` "Defaulted".
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer {sourceID: "Panama Papers"})-[:officer_of]->(e:Entity {status: "Defaulted"}) RETURN DISTINCT o.name

question: Find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles published in the year 2022 and have a sentiment score greater than 0.8.
query_text: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.date.year = 2022 AND a.sentiment > 0.8 RETURN DISTINCT o.name

question: Find the officers who are 'officer_of' entities that have a 'same_as' relationship with other entities.
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(e:Entity)-[:same_as]->() RETURN DISTINCT o.name

question: Find the movies released in the same decade as "The Matrix" but with a lower number of votes.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie {title: "The Matrix"}) MATCH (other:Movie) WHERE (other.released / 10) * 10 = (m.released / 10) * 10 AND other.votes < m.votes RETURN other.title

question: Find the screen names of users mentioned in tweets posted by users with a betweenness centrality greater than 1000.

question: Find the top 5 types of machines by CPU in racks located in zone 2.
query_text: MATCH (dc:DataCenter)-[:CONTAINS]->(rack:Rack {zone: 2})-[:HOLDS]->(machine:Machine)-[:TYPE]->(type:Type) RETURN type.name AS machineType, type.cpu AS cpu ORDER BY cpu DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the tweets that are replies to tweets that mention Neo4j.

question: Find the top 3 businesses with the most reviews in 'Missoula'.

question: Find the questions tagged with "neo4j" where the user who asked the question has also answered a question with a score greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "neo4j"}) MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q) MATCH (u)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) WHERE a.score > 2 RETURN DISTINCT q

question: Find the products that have a unit price within 10% of the average unit price of products in their category.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avgPrice MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c) WHERE p.unitPrice <= 1.1 * avgPrice AND p.unitPrice >= 0.9 * avgPrice RETURN p.productName

question: Find the character with the name 'Ryman-Frey' and return their book45PageRank.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.name = 'Ryman-Frey' RETURN c.book45PageRank

question: Find the streams that have a VIP who also plays the game "Rust" and has more than 1,000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (vip:User)-[:VIP]->(stream:Stream) MATCH (vip)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(game:Game) WHERE game.name = "Rust" AND vip.followers > 1000 RETURN DISTINCT stream.name

question: Find all people who have acted in movies with Keanu Reeves.

question: Find all movies where a single person is credited as both director and actor.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m) RETURN m.title

question: Find all questions where the 'link' property includes 'stackoverflow' and the score is more than 2.

query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity),        (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity) WHERE originator.name CONTAINS 'Bank' AND beneficiary.name CONTAINS 'Corp' RETURN f.id

query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) RETURN s.createdAt, s.name ORDER BY s.createdAt LIMIT 1

query_text: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WHERE t.created_at >= datetime('2021-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND t.created_at <= datetime('2021-02-28T23:59:59Z') RETURN t

question: Find the streams that have more VIPs than moderators.
query_text: MATCH (stream:Stream)-[:VIP]->(vip) WITH stream, count(vip) AS vipCount MATCH (stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(moderator) WITH stream, vipCount, count(moderator) AS moderatorCount WHERE vipCount > moderatorCount RETURN stream.name

question: Find the product that has the highest ratio of units on order to units in stock.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.unitsInStock > 0 WITH p, (toFloat(p.unitsOnOrder) / toFloat(p.unitsInStock)) AS ratio ORDER BY ratio DESC RETURN p.productName AS productName, ratio LIMIT 1

question: Find the organizations that have a supplier that is also a subsidiary of one of their competitors.
query_text: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(supplier:Organization) MATCH (org)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(competitor:Organization) WHERE (competitor)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(supplier) RETURN DISTINCT org.name

question: Find the movies where the director also acted in a movie directed by one of their own actors.
query_text: MATCH (director:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(movie1:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(director) MATCH (director)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie2:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(actor:Person) WITH DISTINCT movie2 RETURN movie2.title

question: Find the streams that have a description that contains an email address.

question: Can you retrieve the top 5 highest-rated reviews?

question: Find all movies that have a movieId starting with '1' and have been rated by at least one user.

question: Find the screen names of users mentioned in tweets posted by users who follow users with a betweenness centrality greater than 1000.
query_text: MATCH (u1:User) WHERE u1.betweenness > 1000 MATCH (u2:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(u1) MATCH (u2)-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) MATCH (t)-[:MENTIONS]->(u3:User) RETURN DISTINCT u3.screen_name

question: Find the first three movies that have been reviewed with the summary 'Silly, but fun' and were released in the 1990s.

question: Display the top 5 businesses with the highest average review rating.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, AVG(r.stars) AS avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN b.name AS businessName, avgRating

question: Find the entities that filed filings as originators where the beneficiary entity is located in the same country and the amount is greater than 100000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(oe:Entity) MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(be:Entity) MATCH (oe:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) MATCH (be:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE f.amount > 100000 RETURN DISTINCT oe.name

question: Find the organizations that have subsidiaries that are headquartered in a different country than their parent organization. Return only the first 3.
query_text: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(sub:Organization) WITH org, sub MATCH (org)-[:IN_CITY]->(parentCity:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(parentCountry:Country) MATCH (sub)-[:IN_CITY]->(subCity:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(subCountry:Country) WHERE parentCountry.id <> subCountry.id RETURN DISTINCT org.name LIMIT 3

question: Find the streams that have VIPs who are also moderators of different streams.

question: Find the customers who have placed orders that include products with a unit price greater than the average unit price of products in the same order.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, avg(toFloat(orders.unitPrice)) AS avgPrice MATCH (o)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE toFloat(orders.unitPrice) > avgPrice WITH DISTINCT o.customerID AS customerID MATCH (c:Customer {customerID: customerID}) RETURN c.companyName

question: Find the entities that have 'officer_of' relationship with the officer with the name 'MOSSFON SUBSCRIBERS LTD.'.

question: Find the customer who has placed orders with the highest total freight cost.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WITH c, toFloat(o.freight) AS freightValue WITH c, sum(freightValue) AS totalFreightCost WITH max(totalFreightCost) AS maxFreightCost MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WITH c, sum(toFloat(o.freight)) AS totalFreightCost, maxFreightCost WHERE totalFreightCost = maxFreightCost RETURN c.companyName
template_key: find the customer who has placed orders with the highest total freight cost

question: Find all movies that belong to the same collection as a movie with an average vote greater than 8.5. (first 3)

question: Find all characters with a fastrf_embedding value containing a number equal to 0.0.

question: Find the display name of the user who asked the question with the highest answer count.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WITH max(q.answer_count) AS max_answer_count MATCH (q:Question { answer_count: max_answer_count }) MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q) RETURN u.display_name

question: Find the question with the least number of upvotes and a score less than the average score of questions tagged with 'react-apollo'.

question: Find the actors who have starred in both animated and live-action movies.

template_key: find the actors who have starred in both animated and live-action movies

query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c1:Category {categoryName: 'Beverages'}),       (p)-[:PART_OF]->(c2:Category {categoryName: 'Condiments'}) RETURN p.productName, p.productID
template_key: find all products that are both in <value> and <value> categories

question: Find the questions with the same score and the same number of tags as the question with id 62220732.
query_text: MATCH (targetQuestion:Question {id: 62220732}) WITH targetQuestion.score AS targetScore, size([(targetQuestion)-[:TAGGED]->() | null]) AS targetTagCount MATCH (q:Question) WITH q, targetScore, targetTagCount, size([(q)-[:TAGGED]->() | null]) AS qTagCount WHERE q.score = targetScore AND qTagCount = targetTagCount RETURN q.id, q.title
template_key: find the questions with the same score and the same number of tags as the question with id <num>

question: Find persons who have acted in, directed, and produced different movies.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie),        (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie),        (p)-[:PRODUCED]->(m3:Movie) WHERE m1 <> m2 AND m2 <> m3 AND m1 <> m3 RETURN p.name, m1.title AS ActedIn, m2.title AS Directed, m3.title AS Produced
template_key: find persons who have acted in, directed, and produced different movies

question: Find the `supplierID` and `contactName` of suppliers who supply products with a `reorderLevel` equal to 0.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.reorderLevel = 0 MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p) RETURN s.supplierID, s.contactName
template_key: find the `supplierid` and `contactname` of suppliers who supply products with a `reorderlevel` equal to <num>

question: Find the question with the most downvotes and a creation date after June 5, 2020, and a score less than 0.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.createdAt > datetime('2020-06-05T00:00:00Z') AND q.score < 0 RETURN q ORDER BY q.downVotes DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the question with the most downvotes and a creation date after june <num>, <num>, and a score less than <num>

question: Find the streams that have been chatted in by users who also moderate other streams.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(s1:Stream) WITH u MATCH (u)-[:CHATTER]->(s2:Stream) RETURN DISTINCT s2
template_key: find the streams that have been chatted in by users who also moderate other streams

question: Find the top 3 `originator_bank` values with the lowest total number of filings where the `beneficiary_bank_country` is "Cayman Islands" and the `amount` is less than 100000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = "Cayman Islands" AND f.amount < 100000 WITH f.originator_bank AS originator_bank, count(f) AS filing_count ORDER BY filing_count ASC LIMIT 3 RETURN originator_bank, filing_count
template_key: find the top <num> `originator_bank` values with the lowest total number of filings where the `beneficiary_bank_country` is <value> and the `amount` is less than <num>

question: Find the customers who placed orders that were shipped to the same country as the customer with 'customerID' 'ALFKI'.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer {customerID: 'ALFKI'}) WITH c.country AS customerCountry MATCH (o:Order {shipCountry: customerCountry}) MATCH (customer:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN DISTINCT customer.customerID
template_key: find the customers who placed orders that were shipped to the same country as the customer with <value> <value>

question: Find the titles of questions that have answers with score greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) WHERE a.score > 2 RETURN q.title
template_key: find the titles of questions that have answers with score greater than <num>

question: Find the titles of questions that have answers marked as is_accepted and have a score greater than 3.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WHERE a.is_accepted = True AND a.score > 3 RETURN q.title
template_key: find the titles of questions that have answers marked as is_accepted and have a score greater than <num>

question: "What is the shortest distance between the statue of the author of \"Ivanhoe\" and the statue of the poet who wrote \"My Love Is Like A Red Red Rose\"?"
query_text: MATCH (a:PointOfInterest)-[:TAGS]->(at:OSMTags {name: "Ivanhoe"}),       (b:PointOfInterest)-[:TAGS]->(bt:OSMTags {name: "My Love Is Like A Red Red Rose"}),       p = shortestPath((a)-[:ROUTE*]-(b)) RETURN p, reduce(distance = 0, r in relationships(p) | distance + r.distance) AS totalDistance
template_key: <value>ivanhoe\<value>my love is like a red red rose\<value>

question: Find all the users who have asked a question with a score less than -1.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE q.score < -1 RETURN u.display_name, u.id, u.link
template_key: find all the users who have asked a question with a score less than -<num>

question: Find the display names of the users who asked questions tagged with more than one tag.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WITH q, size(collect(t)) AS tag_count WHERE tag_count > 1 MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
template_key: find the display names of the users who asked questions tagged with more than one tag

question: Find the questions tagged with "neo4j" and have a view count greater than 100.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = "neo4j" AND q.view_count > 100 RETURN q
template_key: find the questions tagged with <value> and have a view count greater than <num>

question: Find the top 5 users with the most followers who follow "Neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (n:User {name: "Neo4j"}) MATCH (n)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(follower:User) WITH follower, follower.followers AS follower_count ORDER BY follower_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN follower.screen_name
template_key: find the top <num> users with the most followers who follow <value>

question: "Show me CEO of a company is child of other company's CEO "
query_text: MATCH (childCEO:Person)-[:HAS_PARENT]->(parentCEO:Person),       (organization:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(childCEO),       (parentOrg:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(parentCEO) RETURN organization.name AS ChildCompany, childCEO.name AS ChildCEO, parentOrg.name AS ParentCompany, parentCEO.name AS ParentCEO
template_key: <value>s ceo "

question: "what are the ceo's of all the companies that have categories with the word data in them?"
query_text: MATCH (c:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory), (c)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) WHERE ic.name CONTAINS 'data' RETURN ceo.name AS CEOName
template_key: <value>s of all the companies that have categories with the word data in them?"

question: Find all streams that have a VIP who also chats in a stream with more than 1,000,000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (stream:Stream)-[:VIP]->(vip) MATCH (vip)-[:CHATTER]->(popularStream:Stream) WHERE popularStream.followers > 1000000 RETURN DISTINCT stream
template_key: find all streams that have a vip who also chats in a stream with more than <num>,<num>,<num> followers

question: Display the first 5 questions where the body markdown mentions 'index'.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.body_markdown CONTAINS 'index' RETURN q ORDER BY q.creation_date LIMIT 5
template_key: display the first <num> questions where the body markdown mentions <value>

question: Find the character with the name 'Ryman-Frey' and return their degree.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Ryman-Frey'}) RETURN c.degree
template_key: find the character with the name <value> and return their degree

query_text: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WHERE p.unitsInStock < 10 RETURN DISTINCT s.companyName
template_key: find the suppliers who supply products with a <value> value less than <num>

query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE g.name = "Animation" RETURN DISTINCT m
template_key: find the movies that have the genre <value>

question: Find the questions with an answer count greater than 1 and less than 5.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count > 1 AND q.answer_count < 5 RETURN q.title

question: Find the streams that have chatters who are also moderators of different streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:CHATTER]-(u:User) MATCH (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(other:Stream) WHERE s <> other RETURN DISTINCT s.name

question: Find the questions with the same number of downvotes as the question with id 62220732.
query_text: MATCH (q1:Question {id: 62220732}) WITH q1.downVotes AS targetDownVotes MATCH (q2:Question) WHERE q2.downVotes = targetDownVotes AND q2.id <> 62220732 RETURN q2.id, q2.text

question: Find the questions that have been both answered and commented on by the same user.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) MATCH (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q) RETURN DISTINCT q

question: Find the movies with the lowest rating that were released after 2000.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-(p:Person) WHERE m.released > 2000 WITH m, avg(r.rating) AS average_rating ORDER BY average_rating  RETURN m.title, average_rating LIMIT 1

question: Find the movies that have at least one keyword in common with "Toy Story". (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (ts:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'})-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(keywords) MATCH (ts)-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(k)<-[:HAS_KEYWORD]-(otherMovies:Movie) WHERE otherMovies <> ts WITH DISTINCT otherMovies.title AS otherMoviesTitle RETURN otherMoviesTitle LIMIT 3
template_key: find the movies that have at least one keyword in common with <value>. (first <num>)

question: Find the questions tagged with "cypher" that have an answer with a score less than 0.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = "cypher" MATCH (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WHERE a.score < 0 RETURN DISTINCT q

question: Find all paths of length 3 starting from the country with code "GBR" and ending at an Entity node.
query_text: MATCH (start:Country {code: "GBR"})-[*3]-(end:Entity) RETURN DISTINCT end
template_key: find all paths of length <num> starting from the country with code <value> and ending at an entity node

question: Find the businesses in 'CA' that have reviews with text containing 'graph database'.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category),        (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b),        (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r) WHERE b.state = 'CA' AND r.text CONTAINS 'graph database' RETURN b.name AS businessName, b.address AS businessAddress, r.text AS reviewText

question: Find all users who are 'MODERATOR' to streams that have a 'HAS_LANGUAGE' relationship with a language other than 'en'.
query_text: MATCH (l:Language) WHERE l.name <> 'en' MATCH (l)<-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]-(s:Stream) MATCH (s)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u:User) RETURN DISTINCT u.name
template_key: find all users who are <value> to streams that have a <value> relationship with a language other than <value>

question: Find the customer who has ordered the lowest quantity of products with a unit price less than 10.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE toFloat(orders.unitPrice) < 10 WITH c, o, sum(orders.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder WITH c, min(totalQuantityPerOrder) AS minQuantityForCustomer MATCH (c)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE toFloat(orders.unitPrice) < 10 WITH c, minQuantityForCustomer, sum(orders.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder WHERE minQuantityForCustomer = totalQuantityPerOrder RETURN c.companyName
template_key: find the customer who has ordered the lowest quantity of products with a unit price less than <num>

question: Can you find three suppliers who supply 'Chang'?
query_text: MATCH (p:Product {productName: 'Chang'})<-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) RETURN s.companyName LIMIT 3

question: Find the latest review written for each business.

question: Find characters with a centrality less than 0.1 and a book1PageRank above 5.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality < 0.1 AND c.book1PageRank > 5 RETURN c

question: Find all movies that have a similar plot to 'Toy Story'.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'})-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(k:Keyword) WITH m, collect(k.name) AS toyStoryKeywords MATCH (m2:Movie)-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(k2:Keyword) WHERE k2.name IN toyStoryKeywords AND m2.title <> 'Toy Story' RETURN DISTINCT m2.title AS similar_movie_titles

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a follower count greater than the average follower count of all users.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WITH avg(u.followers) AS average_followers MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.followers > average_followers MATCH (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s:Stream) RETURN DISTINCT s.name

question: Find the customers who have placed orders that include products with a reorder level lower than the average reorder level of all products.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WITH avg(p.reorderLevel) AS avgReorderLevel MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE p.reorderLevel < avgReorderLevel RETURN DISTINCT c.companyName

question: Find the movies that have been rated by more than one user. (first 3)

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_bank' is located in a country with a 'name' that starts with the letter "S" and the 'beneficiary_bank' is located in a country with a 'name' that starts with the letter "U".
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(o:Country) WHERE o.name STARTS WITH "S" MATCH (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(b:Country) WHERE b.name STARTS WITH "U" RETURN f.sar_id
template_key: find the filings where the <value> is located in a country with a <value> that starts with the letter <value> and the <value> is located in a country with a <value> that starts with the letter <value>

question: Find the streams that have "Rust" as a played game and are moderated by users who are VIPs of other streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Rust'}) MATCH (s)-[:MODERATOR]->(u:User) WHERE EXISTS {   MATCH (s2:Stream)-[:VIP]->(u) } RETURN DISTINCT s.name

question: Find all movies that share the same genres as "Toy Story".
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: "Toy Story"})-[:IN_GENRE]->(genre:Genre) WITH toyStory, genre MATCH (genre)<-[:IN_GENRE]-(otherMovie:Movie) WHERE toyStory <> otherMovie RETURN DISTINCT otherMovie.title

question: Find the questions with the lowest number of comments.

query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[:WROTE]-(w:Person {name: 'Nancy Meyers'}) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
template_key: find all people who have acted in movies with nancy meyers as a writer

question: Find the articles that mention organizations that are located in the same city as the organization with id "E0ZU8eCc5OaqS1LU9qE3n3w".
query_text: MATCH (org1:Organization {id: "E0ZU8eCc5OaqS1LU9qE3n3w"}) MATCH (org1)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City) MATCH (org2:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city) MATCH (article:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org2) RETURN DISTINCT article
template_key: find the articles that mention organizations that are located in the same city as the organization with id <value>

question: Find the questions tagged with "neo4j" that have a view count greater than the average view count of all questions.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WITH avg(q.view_count) AS average_view_count MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = "neo4j" AND q.view_count > average_view_count RETURN q
template_key: find the questions tagged with <value> that have a view count greater than the average view count of all questions

question: Find the teams that have at least one stream with over 1,000,000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.followers > 1000000 MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) RETURN DISTINCT t.name
template_key: find the teams that have at least one stream with over <num>,<num>,<num> followers

question: Find the titles of the questions with the most comments.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment) WITH q, count(*) AS comment_count ORDER BY comment_count DESC RETURN q.title AS question_title, comment_count LIMIT 1
template_key: find the titles of the questions with the most comments

question: Find the `companyName` and `contactName` of suppliers who supply products with `unitsOnOrder` greater than 50.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder > 50 RETURN s.companyName, s.contactName
template_key: find the `companyname` and `contactname` of suppliers who supply products with `unitsonorder` greater than <num>

question: Find the question with the most favorites.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.favorites DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the question with the most favorites

question: Find all movies that have a complex storyline.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m
template_key: find all movies that have a complex storyline

question: Find the movies that were produced in a country other than the United States of America.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE c.name <> "United States of America" RETURN m.title
template_key: find the movies that were produced in a country other than the united states of america

question: Find the top 3 countries that have entities with the most filings.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) MATCH (e)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WITH c.name AS country, COUNT(f) AS filings_count RETURN country, filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> countries that have entities with the most filings

question: Find all businesses that are highly recommended by users who share similar interests or preferences.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review)<-[:WROTE]-(u:User) WHERE r.stars >= 4 WITH b, collect(DISTINCT u) AS users, count(DISTINCT u) AS userCount WHERE userCount >= 2 RETURN b.name, userCount, users
template_key: find all businesses that are highly recommended by users who share similar interests or preferences

question: Find the questions tagged with "cypher" that have no answers.
query_text: MATCH (t:Tag {name: "cypher"})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WHERE NOT ()-[:ANSWERED]->(q) RETURN q.title
template_key: find the questions tagged with <value> that have no answers

question: Find the organizations that have suppliers that are also competitors.
query_text: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(supplier:Organization) WHERE EXISTS((org)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(supplier)) RETURN DISTINCT org.name AS organizationName
template_key: find the organizations that have suppliers that are also competitors

question: Find the top 5 beneficiary banks that received the highest total amount from filings originating in Singapore.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_iso = "SGP" WITH f.beneficiary_bank AS beneficiaryBank, sum(f.amount) AS totalAmount ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN beneficiaryBank, totalAmount
template_key: find the top <num> beneficiary banks that received the highest total amount from filings originating in singapore

question: Find the top 3 most ordered products in terms of quantity from orders.
query_text: MATCH (:Order)-[o:ORDERS]->(p:Product) RETURN p.productName AS productName, SUM(o.quantity) AS totalQuantity ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> most ordered products in terms of quantity from orders

question: Find the movies that have a tagline.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline IS NOT NULL AND m.tagline <> "" RETURN m.title
template_key: find the movies that have a tagline

question: Find officers who have the same name as other officers.
query_text: MATCH (o1:Officer)-[:same_name_as]->(o2:Officer) RETURN o1, o2
template_key: find officers who have the same name as other officers

question: Find the movie with the longest time gap between the director's birth year and the release year of their last movie.
query_text: MATCH (director:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(movie:Movie) WITH director, movie, movie.released - director.born AS time_gap WITH director, max(time_gap) AS max_time_gap ORDER BY max_time_gap DESC RETURN director.name, max_time_gap LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the longest time gap between the director's birth year and the release year of their last movie

question: Find the characters who have a 'louvain' value other than 1.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.louvain <> 1 RETURN c.name
template_key: find the characters who have a <value> value other than <num>

question: Find the top 3 users who are moderators of streams with the "HAS_LANGUAGE" relationship to the language "en".
query_text: MATCH (l:Language {name: 'en'})<-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]-(s:Stream) WITH s, l MATCH (s)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u:User) WITH u, count(DISTINCT s) AS streamsModerated RETURN u.name AS userName, streamsModerated ORDER BY streamsModerated DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> users who are moderators of streams with the <value> relationship to the language <value>

question: Find all streams that are VIPs of streams that play the game "Resident Evil Village".
query_text: MATCH (stream)-[:VIP]->(target_stream:Stream) MATCH (target_stream)-[:PLAYS]->(game:Game { name: "Resident Evil Village" }) RETURN DISTINCT stream.name
template_key: find all streams that are vips of streams that play the game <value>

question: Find the products that have been ordered by the highest number of distinct customers.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product)<-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, count(DISTINCT o.customerID) AS customerCount ORDER BY customerCount DESC RETURN p.productName, customerCount LIMIT 1
template_key: find the products that have been ordered by the highest number of distinct customers

question: Find all services that listen on port 80.
query_text: MATCH (s:Service)-[:LISTENS]->(p:Port {port: 80}) RETURN s.name
template_key: find all services that listen on port <num>

question: Find the teams that have at least one stream with "Rust" as a played game.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: "Rust"}) WITH s, g MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) RETURN DISTINCT t.name
template_key: find the teams that have at least one stream with <value> as a played game

question: Find the screen names of users mentioned in tweets that contain links shared by the user with screen name "neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (u:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WHERE EXISTS ((t)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)) MATCH (t)-[:MENTIONS]->(mentionedUser:User) RETURN DISTINCT mentionedUser.screen_name
template_key: find the screen names of users mentioned in tweets that contain links shared by the user with screen name <value>

question: Find the first 3 organizations that have a supplier named 'Icon Integration'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(supplier:Organization {name: 'Icon Integration'}) RETURN o LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> organizations that have a supplier named <value>

question: Find the products that have a 'unitPrice' greater than the average 'unitPrice' of products in their category.
query_text: MATCH (c:Category)<-[:PART_OF]-(p:Product) WITH c, avg(p.unitPrice) AS averagePrice MATCH (c)<-[:PART_OF]-(p:Product) WHERE p.unitPrice > averagePrice RETURN p.productName
template_key: find the products that have a <value> greater than the average <value> of products in their category

question: Find the directors who have directed movies in more than 10 different genres.
query_text: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(genre:Genre) WITH d, count(DISTINCT genre) AS distinctGenres WHERE distinctGenres > 10 RETURN d.name AS directorName
template_key: find the directors who have directed movies in more than <num> different genres

question: Find all businesses that have a review with the word "great" in the text.
query_text: MATCH (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE toLower(r.text) CONTAINS 'great' RETURN DISTINCT b.name
template_key: find all businesses that have a review with the word <value> in the text

question: Find the first 3 people who have the role of CEO in more than one organization.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:HAS_CEO]->(o:Organization) WITH p, count(o) AS numOrgs WHERE numOrgs > 1 RETURN p LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> people who have the role of ceo in more than one organization

question: Find the top 5 entities with the highest total amount of filings they benefited from.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity) WITH b, sum(f.amount) AS totalAmount ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN b.name, totalAmount
template_key: find the top <num> entities with the highest total amount of filings they benefited from

question: Find the streams that have a chatter user who is also a VIP of another stream with a higher total view count.
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)<-[:CHATTER]-(u:User) MATCH (u)-[:VIP]->(s2:Stream) WHERE s2.total_view_count > s1.total_view_count RETURN DISTINCT s1.name
template_key: find the streams that have a chatter user who is also a vip of another stream with a higher total view count

question: Find the movies that have been rated by users with an average rating greater than 4.0.
