query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.rating > 4.0 WITH m, avg(r.rating) AS avg_rating WHERE avg_rating > 4.0 RETURN m.title
template_key: find the movies that have been rated by users with an average rating greater than <num>

question: Find entities by their internal id '1001256'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity {internal_id: '1001256'}) RETURN e
template_key: find entities by their internal id <value>

question: Find the top 3 applications by PID running in zone 4.
query_text: MATCH (z:Zone {zone: 4})-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface)-[:CONNECTS]->(m:Machine)-[:RUNS]->(a:Application) RETURN a.name, a.pid ORDER BY a.pid DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> applications by pid running in zone <num>

question: Find the actors who have starred in movies with a budget higher than the GDP of a small country.
query_text: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.budget > 50000000 RETURN DISTINCT a.name
template_key: find the actors who have starred in movies with a budget higher than the gdp of a small country

question: Find the organizations that have more than 100 employees and are located in a city within the United States of America. Return only the first 3.
query_text: MATCH (country:Country {name: "United States of America"})<-[:IN_COUNTRY]-(city:City)<-[:IN_CITY]-(org:Organization) WHERE org.nbrEmployees > 100 RETURN org.name LIMIT 3
template_key: find the organizations that have more than <num> employees and are located in a city within the united states of america. return only the first <num>

question: Find the questions with the highest answer count that are tagged with "neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "neo4j"}) RETURN q.title AS Question, q.answer_count AS AnswerCount ORDER BY AnswerCount DESC  LIMIT 1
template_key: find the questions with the highest answer count that are tagged with <value>

question: Find the movies released between 1990 and 2000 with a rating above 80.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released >= 1990 AND m.released <= 2000 WITH m MATCH (m)<-[r:REVIEWED]-() WHERE r.rating > 80 RETURN DISTINCT m.title
template_key: find the movies released between <num> and <num> with a rating above <num>

question: Find the display name of the user who provided the answer with the highest score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH max(a.score) AS max_score MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.score = max_score MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a) RETURN u.display_name
template_key: find the display name of the user who provided the answer with the highest score

question: Find the top 3 entities that have the most filings where the originator bank country is 'Singapore'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank_country = 'Singapore' WITH e, COUNT(f) AS num_filings ORDER BY num_filings DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN e.name AS entity_name, num_filings
template_key: find the top <num> entities that have the most filings where the originator bank country is <value>

question: Find the creation_date of the question with the title "Neo4j- APOC trigger fires without any reason".
query_text: MATCH (q:Question {title: "Neo4j- APOC trigger fires without any reason"}) RETURN q.creation_date
template_key: find the creation_date of the question with the title <value>

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a creation date before the stream's creation date.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(moderator:User) RETURN s AS stream, moderator
template_key: find the streams that are moderated by users who have a creation date before the stream's creation date

question: Find characters who have 'INTERACTS45' relationships with 'Daenerys-Targaryen' and have a 'centrality' of 0.0.
query_text: MATCH (daenerys:Character {name: 'Daenerys-Targaryen'}) MATCH (daenerys)-[:INTERACTS45]-(other_characters) WHERE other_characters.centrality = 0.0 RETURN DISTINCT other_characters.name
template_key: find characters who have <value> relationships with <value> and have a <value> of <num>

question: Find the intermediaries that deal with entities in Panama.
query_text: MATCH (i:Intermediary)-[:intermediary_of]->(e:Entity) WHERE e.countries CONTAINS "Panama" RETURN i.name AS IntermediaryName, e.name AS EntityName
template_key: find the intermediaries that deal with entities in panama

question: Find the games that are played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(moderator)<-[:CHATTER]-(s) MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
template_key: find the games that are played by streams that have at least one chatter who is also a moderator

question: Find the top 5 products with the least quantity per unit in stock.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) RETURN p.productName, p.unitsInStock ORDER BY p.unitsInStock ASC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> products with the least quantity per unit in stock

question: Find all actors who have worked on movies with a budget greater than 200 million dollars. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:CAST_FOR]-(p:Person) WHERE m.budget > 200000000 RETURN DISTINCT p.name LIMIT 3
template_key: find all actors who have worked on movies with a budget greater than <num> million dollars. (first <num>)

question: Find the first 5 orders made in 1996.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order) WHERE o.orderDate STARTS WITH '1996' RETURN o ORDER BY o.orderDate LIMIT 5
template_key: find the first <num> orders made in <num>

question: Find the countries where both the originator and beneficiary entities of filings are located.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(originCountry:Country) MATCH (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(beneficiaryCountry:Country) WHERE originCountry.code = beneficiaryCountry.code RETURN DISTINCT originCountry.code AS country_code
template_key: find the countries where both the originator and beneficiary entities of filings are located

question: Find all questions with a title containing 'Drupal' and tagged with 'react-apollo'.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE q.title CONTAINS 'Drupal' AND t.name = 'react-apollo' RETURN q
template_key: find all questions with a title containing <value> and tagged with <value>

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have written reviews within a specific date range (e.g., between January 1, 2017, and December 31, 2017).
query_text: MATCH (r:Review) WHERE r.date >= date('2017-01-01') AND r.date <= date('2017-12-31') MATCH (r)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN DISTINCT b.name
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have written reviews within a specific date range (e.g., between january <num>, <num>, and december <num>, <num>)

question: Find the officers who are 'officer_of' entities that have a 'registered_address' with a 'country_codes' value of 'BHS'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.country_codes = 'BHS' MATCH (o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(e) RETURN DISTINCT o.name AS officer_name
template_key: find the officers who are <value> entities that have a <value> with a <value> value of <value>

question: Find all people who have directed movies with Joel Silver as a producer.
query_text: MATCH (d:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[:PRODUCED]-(p:Person {name: "Joel Silver"}) RETURN DISTINCT d.name
template_key: find all people who have directed movies with joel silver as a producer

question: Find the first 3 organizations that have a CEO named 'Julie Spellman Sweet' and have a revenue above 1 billion.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person {name: "Julie Spellman Sweet"}) WHERE o.revenue > 1E9 RETURN o LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> organizations that have a ceo named <value> and have a revenue above <num> billion

question: Find the entities that have a registered address in 'Samoa' and service provider 'Mossack Fonseca'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.jurisdiction_description = 'Samoa' AND e.service_provider = 'Mossack Fonseca' RETURN DISTINCT e
template_key: find the entities that have a registered address in <value> and service provider <value>

question: Find all movies that have a keyword in common with a movie directed by a specific person. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (person:Person)-[:CREW_FOR]->(movie1:Movie) MATCH (movie1)-[:HAS_KEYWORD]->(keyword:Keyword) MATCH (keyword)<-[:HAS_KEYWORD]-(movie2:Movie) WHERE movie1 <> movie2 AND person.name = "Tom Hanks" RETURN DISTINCT movie2.title LIMIT 3
template_key: find all movies that have a keyword in common with a movie directed by a specific person. (first <num>)

question: Find the creation_date of the answer with the lowest score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) RETURN a.creation_date AS creation_date ORDER BY a.score ASC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the creation_date of the answer with the lowest score

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_bank' and 'beneficiary_bank' are both located in countries that are members of the European Union.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(ob:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(oc:Country),       (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(bb:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(bc:Country) WHERE oc.code IN ['AUT', 'BEL', 'BGR', 'HRV', 'CYP', 'CZE', 'DNK', 'EST', 'FIN', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'GRC', 'HUN', 'IRL', 'ITA', 'LVA', 'LTU', 'LUX', 'MLT', 'NLD', 'POL', 'PRT', 'ROU', 'SVK', 'SVN', 'ESP', 'SWE']   AND bc.code IN ['AUT', 'BEL', 'BGR', 'HRV', 'CYP', 'CZE', 'DNK', 'EST', 'FIN', 'FRA', 'DEU', 'GRC', 'HUN', 'IRL', 'ITA', 'LVA', 'LTU', 'LUX', 'MLT', 'NLD', 'POL', 'PRT', 'ROU', 'SVK', 'SVN', 'ESP', 'SWE'] RETURN f.sar_id
template_key: find the filings where the <value> and <value> are both located in countries that are members of the european union

question: Find the officer with the icij_id 'C0FCC85C73FE8405CBF5FD732A6787E5'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer {icij_id: 'C0FCC85C73FE8405CBF5FD732A6787E5'}) RETURN o.name
template_key: find the officer with the icij_id <value>

question: Find the movies that have been directed by directors who have also directed a movie with "Meryl Streep".
query_text: MATCH (actor:Actor {name: "Meryl Streep"})-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(director:Director) WITH DISTINCT director MATCH (director)-[:DIRECTED]->(otherMovie:Movie) RETURN DISTINCT otherMovie.title
template_key: find the movies that have been directed by directors who have also directed a movie with <value>

question: Find the streams that have a followers to total view count ratio greater than 0.05 and are part of a team.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.followers / toFloat(s.total_view_count) > 0.05 AND EXISTS((s)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)) RETURN s.name
template_key: find the streams that have a followers to total view count ratio greater than <num> and are part of a team

question: Find all streams that have at least one 'CHATTER' and one 'MODERATOR'.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->() MATCH (s)-[:MODERATOR]->() RETURN DISTINCT s
template_key: find all streams that have at least one <value> and one <value>

question: Find the characters who interacted with 'Jaime-Lannister' in 'INTERACTS' relationship and have a 'centrality' greater than 0.1.
query_text: MATCH (jaime:Character {name: 'Jaime-Lannister'}) MATCH (jaime)-[:INTERACTS]-(other) WHERE other.centrality > 0.1 RETURN DISTINCT other.name
template_key: find the characters who interacted with <value> in <value> relationship and have a <value> greater than <num>

question: Find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime longer than their age at the time of filming.
query_text: MATCH (actor:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie) WITH actor, movie, toInteger(substring(movie.released, 0, 4)) AS releaseYear WITH actor, movie, releaseYear, releaseYear - toInteger(substring(toString(actor.born), 0, 4)) AS ageAtFilming WHERE movie.runtime > ageAtFilming RETURN DISTINCT actor.name, movie.title UNION MATCH (actor:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie) WITH actor, movie, toInteger(substring(movie.released, 0, 4)) AS releaseYear WITH actor, movie, releaseYear, releaseYear - toInteger(substring(toString(actor.born), 0, 4)) AS ageAtFilming WHERE movie.runtime > ageAtFilming RETURN DISTINCT actor.name, movie.title
template_key: find the actors who have starred in movies with a runtime longer than their age at the time of filming

question: Find the questions that have more downvotes than upvotes.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.downVotes > q.upVotes RETURN q
template_key: find the questions that have more downvotes than upvotes

question: Find all users who have more than 30000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.followers > 30000 RETURN u
template_key: find all users who have more than <num> followers

question: Find the `orderID` and `shipName` of orders that were placed in the year 1997 and contain at least one product from the 'Beverages' category.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WHERE o.orderDate STARTS WITH '1997' AND c.categoryName = 'Beverages' RETURN DISTINCT o.orderID, o.shipName
template_key: find the `orderid` and `shipname` of orders that were placed in the year <num> and contain at least one product from the <value> category

question: Find the streams that have a moderator who also moderates a stream with the game "Rust" and has more than 5,000 followers and have the language "en" and have at least one VIP.
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {name: 'en'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (s1)-[:VIP]->(v) WITH s1, collect(DISTINCT v) AS vips WHERE size(vips) > 0 MATCH (s1)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(s2:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WHERE u.followers > 5000 RETURN DISTINCT s1.name
template_key: find the streams that have a moderator who also moderates a stream with the game <value> and has more than <num>,<num> followers and have the language <value> and have at least one vip

question: Find the actors who have acted in at least 5 movies with an IMDb rating above 7.0.
query_text: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.imdbRating > 7.0 WITH a, count(m) AS moviesCount WHERE moviesCount >= 5 RETURN a.name
template_key: find the actors who have acted in at least <num> movies with an imdb rating above <num>

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses with a specific address (e.g., "121 W Broadway St").
query_text: MATCH (targetBusiness:Business { address: "121 W Broadway St" })<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review)-[:WROTE]-(user:User) MATCH (user)-[:WROTE]-(otherReview:Review)-[:REVIEWS]-(otherBusiness:Business) RETURN DISTINCT otherBusiness.name
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses with a specific address (e.g., <value>)

question: Find the address with the icij_id 'F969D23B2EDF91CAEBE119A675B61AAB'.
query_text: MATCH (a:Address {icij_id: 'F969D23B2EDF91CAEBE119A675B61AAB'}) RETURN a.address
template_key: find the address with the icij_id <value>

question: Find the names of characters who have a 'louvain' value equal to 1.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.louvain = 1 RETURN c.name
template_key: find the names of characters who have a <value> value equal to <num>

question: Find the products that have a quantity on order greater than the average quantity on order for products in the same category.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c.categoryID AS categoryID, avg(p.unitsOnOrder) AS avgQuantityOnOrder MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WHERE p.unitsOnOrder > avgQuantityOnOrder AND c.categoryID = categoryID RETURN p.productName
template_key: find the products that have a quantity on order greater than the average quantity on order for products in the same category

question: Find the questions that have been answered by more than one user.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User) WITH q, count(DISTINCT u) AS answer_user_count WHERE answer_user_count > 1 RETURN q.title AS question_title, answer_user_count
template_key: find the questions that have been answered by more than one user

question: Find the filings where the originator entity's name contains "AG" and the amount is greater than 1000000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[r:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity) WHERE e.name CONTAINS 'AG' AND f.amount > 1000000 RETURN f.id, f.amount
template_key: find the filings where the originator entity<value>ag" and the amount is greater than <num>

question: Find the entities that are connected to the officer with the icij_id 'CB195B5424E13A74A6F3BC719050A2B9' through the 'officer_of' relationship.
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer {icij_id: 'CB195B5424E13A74A6F3BC719050A2B9'})-[r:officer_of]->(e) RETURN e.name
template_key: find the entities that are connected to the officer with the icij_id <value> through the <value> relationship

question: "Which movies have the string \"then\" in them?"
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title CONTAINS "then" RETURN m
template_key: <value>then\<value>

question: Find all movies that have the same original language and spoken language.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) OPTIONAL MATCH (m)-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]->(ol:Language)<-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]-(m) WITH DISTINCT m RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies that have the same original language and spoken language

question: Find the top 3 highest-rated businesses in Missoula.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(:Category), (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b) WHERE b.city = 'Missoula' RETURN b.name AS businessName, AVG(r.stars) AS averageRating ORDER BY averageRating DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> highest-rated businesses in missoula

question: Find the review text for the business with businessId 'b9'.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business {businessId: 'b9'})<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) RETURN r.text
template_key: find the review text for the business with businessid <value>

question: Find the `companyName` and `phone` number of suppliers who supply products that have a `unitsInStock` value lower than their `reorderLevel`.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.unitsInStock < p.reorderLevel MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p) RETURN s.companyName, s.phone
template_key: find the `companyname` and `phone` number of suppliers who supply products that have a `unitsinstock` value lower than their `reorderlevel`

question: Find the first 3 actors who acted in more than one movie with a tagline containing 'beginning'.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'beginning' WITH p, count(m) AS moviesCount WHERE moviesCount > 1 RETURN p LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> actors who acted in more than one movie with a tagline containing <value>

question: Find the characters with the top 3 highest 'centrality' values who interacted with "Aegon-V-Targaryen" in any book.
query_text: MATCH (aegon:Character { name: "Aegon-V-Targaryen" })-[r]->(other) RETURN other.name, other.centrality ORDER BY other.centrality DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the characters with the top <num> highest <value> values who interacted with <value> in any book

question: Find the product that has the lowest difference between its units in stock and its reorder level.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p, abs(p.unitsInStock - p.reorderLevel) AS difference WITH min(difference) AS minDifference MATCH (p:Product) WHERE abs(p.unitsInStock - p.reorderLevel) = minDifference RETURN p.productName
template_key: find the product that has the lowest difference between its units in stock and its reorder level

question: Find the streams that have a VIP who also plays the game "Rust" and has more than 10,000 followers and have the language "en".
query_text: MATCH (stream:Stream)-[:VIP]->(vip:User)-[:PLAYS]->(game:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WHERE vip.followers > 10000 MATCH (stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(language:Language {name: 'en'}) RETURN DISTINCT stream.name
template_key: find the streams that have a vip who also plays the game <value> and has more than <num>,<num> followers and have the language <value>

question: Find all streams that are moderated by users who are also VIPs of those streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(moderator:User) MATCH (s)<-[:VIP]-(vip:User) WHERE moderator = vip RETURN DISTINCT s
template_key: find all streams that are moderated by users who are also vips of those streams

question: Find all users who are both VIPs and moderators for the same stream.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:VIP]->(s:Stream) MATCH (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s) RETURN DISTINCT u.name
template_key: find all users who are both vips and moderators for the same stream

question: Find the title of the question with the most recent creation date.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q.title ORDER BY q.creation_date DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the title of the question with the most recent creation date

question: Find the characters who have 'INTERACTS2' relationships with a 'weight' less than 10.
query_text: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS2]->(c2:Character) WHERE r.weight < 10 RETURN c1.name, c2.name
template_key: find the characters who have <value> relationships with a <value> less than <num>

question: Find the movie with the largest difference in release year between any two movies the director has worked on.
query_text: MATCH (d:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH d, apoc.coll.sort(collect(m.released)) AS releaseYears WITH d, last(releaseYears) - head(releaseYears) AS maxDifference RETURN d.name AS director, maxDifference ORDER BY maxDifference DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the largest difference in release year between any two movies the director has worked on

question: Find the entities that are beneficiaries of filings where the originator entity's name contains "Corp." and the amount is greater than 500000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.amount > 500000 MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(o:Entity) WHERE o.name CONTAINS "Corp." MATCH (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(b:Entity) RETURN DISTINCT b.name
template_key: find the entities that are beneficiaries of filings where the originator entity<value>corp." and the amount is greater than <num>

question: Find the top 5 entities that benefited from filings in 2003.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.begin.year = 2003 RETURN e, count(f) AS filings_count ORDER BY filings_count DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> entities that benefited from filings in <num>

question: Find all movies that share a common genre with the movie 'Toy Story'.
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'}) MATCH (toyStory)-[:IN_GENRE]->(genre:Genre)<-[:IN_GENRE]-(otherMovies:Movie) WHERE otherMovies.title <> 'Toy Story' RETURN DISTINCT otherMovies.title
template_key: find all movies that share a common genre with the movie <value>

question: Find the screen names of users who have retweeted tweets containing links shared by the user with screen name "neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (n:User {screen_name: "neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) MATCH (t)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link) MATCH (u:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(t) RETURN DISTINCT u.screen_name
template_key: find the screen names of users who have retweeted tweets containing links shared by the user with screen name <value>

question: Find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles published before 2020.
query_text: MATCH (article:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org:Organization) WHERE article.date < datetime('2020-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN DISTINCT org.name
template_key: find the names of all organizations that are mentioned in articles published before <num>

question: Find all reviews with a star rating of 5.
query_text: MATCH (r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE r.stars = 5.0 RETURN r.reviewId AS reviewId, r.text AS reviewText, r.date AS reviewDate, b.name AS businessName
template_key: find all reviews with a star rating of <num>

question: "Which movies have the string \"Matrix\" in them?"
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title CONTAINS "Matrix" RETURN m
template_key: <value>matrix\<value>

question: Find all characters with a book45PageRank greater than 5.0.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book45PageRank > 5.0 RETURN c.name
template_key: find all characters with a book45pagerank greater than <num>

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses in a different state.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r1:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b1:Business),       (u)-[:WROTE]->(r2:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b2:Business) WHERE b1.state <> b2.state WITH DISTINCT u MATCH (u)-[:WROTE]->(:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN b.name
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses in a different state

question: Find all organizations that are public and have a CEO named 'Julie Spellman Sweet'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization {isPublic: true})-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person {name: "Julie Spellman Sweet"}) RETURN o
template_key: find all organizations that are public and have a ceo named <value>

question: Find the body_markdown of the question with the lowest score answer.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH a ORDER BY a.score ASC LIMIT 1 MATCH (a)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) RETURN q.body_markdown
template_key: find the body_markdown of the question with the lowest score answer

question: Find the creation_date of the comment with the lowest score.
query_text: MATCH (c:Comment) RETURN c ORDER BY c.score ASC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the creation_date of the comment with the lowest score

question: Find all intermediaries with an active status and their associated entities.
query_text: MATCH (i:Intermediary {status: "ACTIVE"})-[:intermediary_of]->(e:Entity) RETURN i, e
template_key: find all intermediaries with an active status and their associated entities

question: Find all Addresses that are linked to both an Entity and an Intermediary with the same "countries" value.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)-[r1:registered_address]->(a:Address) MATCH (i:Intermediary)-[r2:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE e.countries = i.countries RETURN DISTINCT a.address
template_key: find all addresses that are linked to both an entity and an intermediary with the same <value> value

question: "Who acted in the movie \"The Godfather\"?"
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie {title: "The Godfather"}) RETURN p.name
template_key: <value>the godfather\<value>

question: Find the movies with the shortest tagline.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m.title, size(m.tagline) AS taglineLength ORDER BY taglineLength ASC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movies with the shortest tagline

question: Find the questions with the same number of upvotes as the question with id 62220505.
query_text: MATCH (q1:Question {id: 62220505}) WITH q1.upVotes AS target_upvotes MATCH (q2:Question) WHERE q2.upVotes = target_upvotes RETURN q2
template_key: find the questions with the same number of upvotes as the question with id <num>

question: Find the products that have a higher unit price than the average unit price of products ordered by customers in 'France'.
query_text: MATCH (customer:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(order:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(product:Product) WHERE customer.country = 'France' WITH avg(toFloat(orders.unitPrice)) AS averageUnitPrice MATCH (product:Product) WHERE product.unitPrice > averageUnitPrice RETURN product.productName
template_key: find the products that have a higher unit price than the average unit price of products ordered by customers in <value>

question: Find the screen names of users who have been mentioned by users who follow users with a betweenness centrality greater than 1000.
query_text: MATCH (highBetweennessUser:User) WHERE highBetweennessUser.betweenness > 1000 MATCH (follower:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(highBetweennessUser) MATCH (follower)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet) MATCH (tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(mentionedUser:User) RETURN DISTINCT mentionedUser.screen_name
template_key: find the screen names of users who have been mentioned by users who follow users with a betweenness centrality greater than <num>

question: Find the customer who placed the order with the highest 'freight' cost to 'shipRegion' 'NULL'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order) WHERE o.shipRegion = 'NULL' WITH o, toFloat(o.freight) AS freightFloat  ORDER BY freightFloat DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN c
template_key: find the customer who placed the order with the highest <value> cost to <value> <value>

question: Find businesses in 'Missoula' that have received exactly two reviews and list the names of the reviewers.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business {city: 'Missoula'})<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review)<-[:WROTE]-(u:User) WITH b, COUNT(r) AS reviewCount, COLLECT(u.name) AS reviewers WHERE reviewCount = 2 RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewers
template_key: find businesses in <value> that have received exactly two reviews and list the names of the reviewers

question: Find the questions with a creation date greater than the average creation date.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WITH avg(q.creation_date) AS average_creation_date MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.creation_date > average_creation_date RETURN q
template_key: find the questions with a creation date greater than the average creation date

question: Find all movies that have been released in both the 'United States of America' and 'Canada'. (first 3)
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(country1:Country) WHERE country1.name = 'United States of America' WITH m MATCH (m)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(country2:Country) WHERE country2.name = 'Canada' WITH collect(m.title) AS usaMovies, collect(m.title) AS canadaMovies WITH apoc.coll.intersection(usaMovies, canadaMovies) AS commonMovies UNWIND commonMovies AS movieTitle RETURN movieTitle LIMIT 3
template_key: find all movies that have been released in both the <value> and <value>. (first <num>)

question: Find the display names of users who have provided answers to their own questions.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer) WHERE (u)-[:PROVIDED]->(a) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
template_key: find the display names of users who have provided answers to their own questions

question: Find the answers with a score greater than 1 and are not marked as accepted.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.score > 1 AND NOT a.is_accepted RETURN a
template_key: find the answers with a score greater than <num> and are not marked as accepted

question: Find the questions that have more upvotes than downvotes.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.upVotes > q.downVotes RETURN q
template_key: find the questions that have more upvotes than downvotes

question: Find the question with the least number of favorites.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.favorites ASC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the question with the least number of favorites

question: Find the `customerID` and `shipCity` for the customer with the highest total order value (sum of `unitPrice` * `quantity` for all their orders).
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c, o, sum(toFloat(orders.unitPrice) * orders.quantity) AS totalOrderValue WITH c, max(totalOrderValue) AS maxTotalOrderValue, collect(o.shipCity) AS shipCities WHERE size(shipCities) > 0 RETURN c.customerID, shipCities[0] AS shipCity ORDER BY maxTotalOrderValue DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the `customerid` and `shipcity` for the customer with the highest total order value (sum of `unitprice` * `quantity` for all their orders)

question: Find the entities with the country_codes 'HKG' and service provider 'Mossack Fonseca'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.country_codes = 'HKG' AND e.service_provider = 'Mossack Fonseca' RETURN e
template_key: find the entities with the country_codes <value> and service provider <value>

question: Find the questions with the same number of favorites as the question with id 62220505.
query_text: MATCH (targetQuestion:Question {id: 62220505}) WITH targetQuestion.favorites AS targetFavorites MATCH (question:Question) WHERE question.favorites = targetFavorites RETURN question.id, question.text
template_key: find the questions with the same number of favorites as the question with id <num>

question: Find streams where the user 'itsbigchase' is both a moderator and a chatter.
query_text: MATCH (u:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}) MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE exists{(u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s)} AND exists{(u)-[:CHATTER]->(s)} RETURN s
template_key: find streams where the user <value> is both a moderator and a chatter

question: Find the streams that have a chatter who also chatters on a stream with the game "Rust" and has more than 5,000 followers and have the language "ru".
query_text: MATCH (stream)-[:CHATTER]->(chatter:User)-[:CHATTER]->(target_stream:Stream) MATCH (target_stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game {name: 'Rust'}) WHERE target_stream.followers > 5000 MATCH (stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {name: 'ru'}) RETURN DISTINCT stream.name
template_key: find the streams that have a chatter who also chatters on a stream with the game <value> and has more than <num>,<num> followers and have the language <value>

question: Find the organizations that are located in countries other than the United States of America.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.name <> "United States of America" RETURN DISTINCT o
template_key: find the organizations that are located in countries other than the united states of america

question: Find the customer who placed the order with the highest total quantity of products.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder WITH max(totalQuantityPerOrder) AS maxQuantity MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder, maxQuantity MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) WHERE totalQuantityPerOrder = maxQuantity RETURN c.customerID, c.companyName
template_key: find the customer who placed the order with the highest total quantity of products

question: Find all movies that have a title containing a number.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.title =~ '.*[0-9].*' RETURN m
template_key: find all movies that have a title containing a number

question: Find the streams that have a creation date before 2015 and have more than 10000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2015-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND s.followers > 10000 RETURN s
template_key: find the streams that have a creation date before <num> and have more than <num> followers

question: Find the top 3 Filings with the smallest amount.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount ASC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> filings with the smallest amount

question: Find the streams that are created before 2018 and are part of a team that has more than 10 streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z') WITH t, count(s) AS streamCount WHERE streamCount > 10 RETURN t.name
template_key: find the streams that are created before <num> and are part of a team that has more than <num> streams

question: Find the tweets that contain links and have been posted by users who follow "Neo4j".
query_text: MATCH (neo:User {screen_name: "neo4j"})-[:FOLLOWS]->(follower:User) MATCH (follower)-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(link:Link) RETURN DISTINCT tweet
template_key: find the tweets that contain links and have been posted by users who follow <value>

question: Find the character with the name 'Ryman-Frey' and return their centrality.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Ryman-Frey'}) RETURN c.centrality
template_key: find the character with the name <value> and return their centrality

question: Find the top 5 streams with the highest total view count that have a chatter who also chatters on a stream with the game "Rust".
query_text: MATCH (s1:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game {name: "Rust"}) WITH s1 MATCH (s1)<-[:CHATTER]-(u:User)-[:CHATTER]->(s2:Stream) WITH DISTINCT s2 ORDER BY s2.total_view_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s2
template_key: find the top <num> streams with the highest total view count that have a chatter who also chatters on a stream with the game <value>

question: Find the filings where the originator entity's name contains "Bank" and the beneficiary entity's country is 'GBR'.
query_text: MATCH (filing:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity), (filing2:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE originator.name CONTAINS 'Bank' AND country.code = 'GBR' RETURN DISTINCT filing
template_key: find the filings where the originator entity<value>bank<value>s country is <value>

question: Display movies that have been rated after January 1, 2015.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(u:User) WHERE r.timestamp >= date('2015-01-01') RETURN m.title, m.id, r.rating, r.timestamp
template_key: display movies that have been rated after january <num>, <num>

question: Find the actors who have starred in movies with a release date before their birth.
query_text: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE date(m.released) < a.born RETURN DISTINCT a.name
template_key: find the actors who have starred in movies with a release date before their birth

question: Find the first 3 organizations that have CEOs named 'Julie Spellman Sweet' and are based in 'Seattle'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CEO]->(p:Person {name: "Julie Spellman Sweet"}), (o)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City {name: "Seattle"}) RETURN o LIMIT 3
template_key: find the first <num> organizations that have ceos named <value> and are based in <value>

question: Find the 'fastrf_embedding' of the character named 'Jaime-Lannister'.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Jaime-Lannister'}) RETURN c.fastrf_embedding
template_key: find the <value> of the character named <value>

question: Find the title of the question that has been tagged with the most tags.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WITH q, size(collect(t)) AS tagCount ORDER BY tagCount DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN q.title
template_key: find the title of the question that has been tagged with the most tags

question: Find the answers with a score greater than 2 that are not accepted.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WHERE a.score > 2 AND NOT a.is_accepted RETURN a
template_key: find the answers with a score greater than <num> that are not accepted

question: Find all entities that share the same address as other entities.
query_text: MATCH (e1:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address)<-[:registered_address]-(e2:Entity) WHERE e1.node_id <> e2.node_id RETURN e1, a, e2
template_key: find all entities that share the same address as other entities

question: Find the questions that have the same number of upvotes and downvotes.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.upVotes = q.downVotes RETURN q.title
template_key: find the questions that have the same number of upvotes and downvotes

question: Find the characters with the lowest `book1PageRank` who interact with "Stevron-Frey" in any book.
query_text: MATCH (target:Character {name: "Stevron-Frey"}) MATCH (target)-[:INTERACTS*1..5]-(other) WITH other, other.book1PageRank AS pageRank RETURN other.name, pageRank ORDER BY pageRank ASC LIMIT 10
template_key: find the characters with the lowest `book1pagerank` who interact with <value> in any book

question: Find the people who have followed someone with the same birth year.
query_text: MATCH (p1:Person)-[:FOLLOWS]->(p2:Person) WHERE p1.born = p2.born RETURN p1, p2
template_key: find the people who have followed someone with the same birth year

question: Find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses with an average rating higher than 4.5.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review) WITH u, avg(r.stars) AS average_rating WHERE average_rating > 4.5 MATCH (u)-[:WROTE]->(r2:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN DISTINCT b.name
template_key: find the businesses that have received reviews from users who have also reviewed businesses with an average rating higher than <num>

question: Find all products that have the same supplier as 'Chai'.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product {productName: 'Chai'})-[:SUPPLIES]-(s:Supplier) MATCH (s)-[:SUPPLIES]-(otherProducts:Product) RETURN DISTINCT otherProducts.productName
template_key: find all products that have the same supplier as <value>

question: "Which pair of users reply to each other's tweets most often?"
query_text: MATCH (u1:User)-[:POSTS]->(t1:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(t2:Tweet)<-[:POSTS]-(u2:User) WHERE u1 <> u2 RETURN u1.screen_name AS User1, u2.screen_name AS User2, COUNT(*) AS Replies ORDER BY Replies DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: <value>s tweets most often?"

question: Find all entities that have an officer with the country_codes 'WSM' and a registered address with the country_codes 'WSM'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity)<-[:officer_of]-(o:Officer) WHERE o.country_codes = 'WSM' MATCH (e)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.country_codes = 'WSM' RETURN DISTINCT e
template_key: find all entities that have an officer with the country_codes <value> and a registered address with the country_codes <value>

question: Find the names of all articles that mention organizations with a revenue greater than $1 billion.
query_text: MATCH (org:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(article:Article) WHERE org.revenue > 1E9 RETURN article.title
template_key: find the names of all articles that mention organizations with a revenue greater than $<num> billion

question: Find all games played by streams that have at least one VIP who is also a chatter in a stream that belongs to a team created before 2018.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:VIP]->(u:User)-[:CHATTER]->(s) MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) WHERE t.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
template_key: find all games played by streams that have at least one vip who is also a chatter in a stream that belongs to a team created before <num>

question: Find the character with the name 'Aegon-V-Targaryen' and return their community value.
query_text: MATCH (c:Character {name: 'Aegon-V-Targaryen'}) RETURN c.community
template_key: find the character with the name <value> and return their community value

question: Find the tweets posted by "Neo4j" that contain links.
query_text: MATCH (u:User {name: "Neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(l:Link) RETURN t
template_key: find the tweets posted by <value> that contain links

question: Find the 3 oldest movies reviewed by someone born after 1970.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) WHERE p.born > 1970 RETURN m ORDER BY m.released ASC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the <num> oldest movies reviewed by someone born after <num>

question: Find the customer who placed the order with the earliest 'orderDate'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order) WITH min(o.orderDate) AS earliestOrderDate MATCH (o:Order {orderDate: earliestOrderDate})-[p:PURCHASED]-(c:Customer) RETURN c.customerID, c.companyName
template_key: find the customer who placed the order with the earliest <value>

question: Find the link of the answer with the score of 6.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer {score: 6}) RETURN a.link
template_key: find the link of the answer with the score of <num>

question: Find all customers who have placed orders that include products from both the 'Confections' category and a supplier from 'Sweden'.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category {categoryName: 'Confections'}), (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p) WITH collect(DISTINCT o.orderID) AS confectionOrders MATCH (s:Supplier {country: 'Sweden'})-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product), (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p) WITH confectionOrders, collect(DISTINCT o.orderID) AS swedishOrders WITH [orderId IN confectionOrders WHERE orderId IN swedishOrders] AS commonOrders UNWIND commonOrders AS orderId MATCH (cust:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order {orderID: orderId}) RETURN DISTINCT cust.companyName
template_key: find all customers who have placed orders that include products from both the <value> category and a supplier from <value>

question: Find the orders that have a 'shipRegion' value of 'NULL'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order {shipRegion: 'NULL'}) RETURN o.orderID
template_key: find the orders that have a <value> value of <value>

question: Find all movies that have the same release year as 'Toy Story' and list their titles and genres.
query_text: MATCH (toyStory:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'}) WITH toyStory, toyStory.released AS toyStoryYear MATCH (otherMovies:Movie {released: toyStoryYear}) WITH otherMovies, toyStoryYear, [(otherMovies)-[:IN_GENRE]->(genres) | genres.name] AS genres RETURN otherMovies.title AS movieTitle, genres, toyStoryYear
template_key: find all movies that have the same release year as <value> and list their titles and genres

question: Find all movies where the director is also listed as an actor.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m) WHERE (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT m.title
template_key: find all movies where the director is also listed as an actor

question: Find all people who have both produced and directed movies.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(:Movie) WITH p MATCH (p)-[:PRODUCED]->(:Movie) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
template_key: find all people who have both produced and directed movies

question: Find the movie with the highest number of votes that has the word "Welcome" in its tagline.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'Welcome' RETURN m.title, m.votes ORDER BY m.votes DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the highest number of votes that has the word <value> in its tagline

question: Find the question with the least number of upvotes and a score greater than the average score of questions tagged with 'aws-lambda'.
query_text: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WITH avg(q.score) AS average_score MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score > average_score WITH q ORDER BY q.upVotes ASC RETURN q LIMIT 1
template_key: find the question with the least number of upvotes and a score greater than the average score of questions tagged with <value>

question: Find the questions that have comments with a score greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q:Question) WHERE c.score > 2 RETURN DISTINCT q
template_key: find the questions that have comments with a score greater than <num>

question: Find the actors who have acted in movies directed by a director born before 1950.
query_text: MATCH (actor:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(director:Director) WHERE director.born < date('1950-01-01') RETURN DISTINCT actor.name
template_key: find the actors who have acted in movies directed by a director born before <num>

question: Find the characters with the lowest 'degree' who have interacted with 'Stevron-Frey'.
query_text: MATCH (stevron:Character {name: 'Stevron-Frey'})-[r]->(other:Character) WITH min(other.degree) AS min_degree MATCH (stevron:Character {name: 'Stevron-Frey'})-[r]->(other:Character) WHERE other.degree = min_degree RETURN other.name, other.degree
template_key: find the characters with the lowest <value> who have interacted with <value>

question: "give me information of \"Wipro\""
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization {name: "Wipro"}) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subsidiary:Organization) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(supplier:Organization) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_INVESTOR]->(investor) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(board_member:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(competitor:Organization) RETURN o.name AS OrganizationName, o.revenue AS Revenue, o.motto AS Motto, o.isDissolved AS IsDissolved, o.nbrEmployees AS NumberOfEmployees, o.summary AS Summary, o.isPublic AS IsPublic, c.name AS CityName, ceo.name AS CEOName, ic.name AS IndustryCategory, collect(distinct subsidiary.name) AS Subsidiaries, collect(distinct supplier.name) AS Suppliers, collect(distinct investor.name) AS Investors, collect(distinct board_member.name) AS BoardMembers, collect(distinct competitor.name) AS Competitors
template_key: <value>wipro\""

question: Find the movie with the lowest number of votes that has the word "times" in its review summary.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[r:REVIEWED]-() WHERE r.summary CONTAINS 'times' RETURN m.title AS movieTitle, m.votes AS movieVotes ORDER BY movieVotes LIMIT 1
template_key: find the movie with the lowest number of votes that has the word <value> in its review summary

question: Can you list the top 5 adult films with the highest popularity?
query_text: MATCH (a:Adult) RETURN a.title, a.popularity ORDER BY a.popularity DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: can you list the top <num> adult films with the highest popularity

question: Find the question with the oldest creation date.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.createdAt ASC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the question with the oldest creation date

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_bank' and 'beneficiary_bank' are both located in the same city.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank IS NOT NULL AND f.beneficiary_bank IS NOT NULL MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity {name: f.originator_bank}) MATCH (f)-[:CONCERNS]->(beneficiary:Entity {name: f.beneficiary_bank}) WHERE originator.location = beneficiary.location RETURN f.id
template_key: find the filings where the <value> and <value> are both located in the same city

question: Find all filings where the beneficiary bank country is 'United States'.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = 'United States' RETURN f
template_key: find all filings where the beneficiary bank country is <value>

question: Find the movies that have a release date after the year 2010.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date.year > 2010 RETURN m
template_key: find the movies that have a release date after the year <num>

question: Find the articles that mention organizations that have a revenue that is higher than the average revenue of organizations in their industry category.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory) WITH ic, avg(o.revenue) AS avgRevenue MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.revenue > avgRevenue RETURN DISTINCT a
template_key: find the articles that mention organizations that have a revenue that is higher than the average revenue of organizations in their industry category

question: Find the top 3 users who have a label containing 'bsky.social'.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.label CONTAINS 'bsky.social' RETURN u ORDER BY u.size DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> users who have a label containing <value>

question: Find the streams that were created before 2018 and have more than 5,000 followers.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z') AND s.followers > 5000 RETURN s
template_key: find the streams that were created before <num> and have more than <num>,<num> followers

question: Find the actors who have acted in movies with a release year that is a prime number.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE all(i IN range(2, toInteger(ceil(sqrt(m.released)))) WHERE m.released % i <> 0) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
template_key: find the actors who have acted in movies with a release year that is a prime number

question: Find the filings where the originator bank and beneficiary bank are the same entity.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity)<-[:BENEFITS]-(f) RETURN f.sar_id
template_key: find the filings where the originator bank and beneficiary bank are the same entity

question: Display all Filings where the originator and beneficiary banks are different.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank <> f.beneficiary_bank RETURN f
template_key: display all filings where the originator and beneficiary banks are different

question: Find the articles that mention organizations that have a subsidiary that is also a competitor.
query_text: MATCH (o1:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(o2:Organization) WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (o1)-[:HAS_COMPETITOR]->(o2) } WITH o1 MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o1) RETURN a
template_key: find the articles that mention organizations that have a subsidiary that is also a competitor

question: Find the streams that have a chatter user who is also a VIP of another stream playing the same game.
query_text: MATCH (stream:Stream)<-[:CHATTER]-(chatter:User) MATCH (chatter)-[:VIP]->(other_stream:Stream) MATCH (stream)-[:PLAYS]->(game:Game)<-[:PLAYS]-(other_stream) WHERE id(stream) <> id(other_stream) RETURN DISTINCT stream.name
template_key: find the streams that have a chatter user who is also a vip of another stream playing the same game

question: Find the body_markdown of the answer with the highest score.
query_text: MATCH (a:Answer) WITH a, a.score AS score ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN a.body_markdown
template_key: find the body_markdown of the answer with the highest score

question: Find the `customerID` and `contactName` of customers who have only placed one order.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WITH c, size(collect(o.orderID)) AS orderCount WHERE orderCount = 1 RETURN c.customerID, c.contactName
template_key: find the `customerid` and `contactname` of customers who have only placed one order

question: Find all streams that have a 'CHATTER' relationship with a user whose name contains the substring 'john'.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE toLower(u.name) CONTAINS 'john' MATCH (u)-[:CHATTER]->(s:Stream) RETURN DISTINCT s
template_key: find all streams that have a <value> relationship with a user whose name contains the substring <value>

question: Find the `productName` and `categoryID` of the product with the highest `unitsOnOrder` that is not discontinued.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.discontinued = false WITH p ORDER BY p.unitsOnOrder DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN p.productName, p.categoryID
template_key: find the `productname` and `categoryid` of the product with the highest `unitsonorder` that is not discontinued

question: Find the hashtags that are commonly used in tweets that mention 'neo4j'.
query_text: MATCH (tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'}),       (tweet)-[:TAGS]->(hashtag:Hashtag) WITH hashtag,       count(DISTINCT tweet) AS tweetCount RETURN hashtag.name, tweetCount ORDER BY tweetCount DESC
template_key: find the hashtags that are commonly used in tweets that mention <value>

question: Find the top 5 customers who have ordered products where the discount was not applied.
query_text: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[r:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE r.discount = "0" WITH c, COUNT(o) AS orderCount ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.customerID, c.companyName, orderCount
template_key: find the top <num> customers who have ordered products where the discount was not applied

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_entity' and 'beneficiary_entity' are located in the same country but different cities.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(originatorCountry:Country),       (f)-[:BENEFITS]->(beneficiary:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(beneficiaryCountry:Country) WHERE originatorCountry.code = beneficiaryCountry.code   AND originator.location <> beneficiary.location RETURN f.sar_id
template_key: find the filings where the <value> and <value> are located in the same country but different cities

question: Find the top 5 orders with the most units ordered.
query_text: MATCH (o:Order)-[r:ORDERS]->(p:Product) RETURN o.orderID AS orderID, SUM(r.quantity) AS totalUnitsOrdered ORDER BY totalUnitsOrdered DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> orders with the most units ordered

question: Find all movies that have a release date in a leap year.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date.year % 4 = 0 RETURN m.title
template_key: find all movies that have a release date in a leap year

question: Find the body_markdown of answers provided to questions that have been asked by users who have commented on questions that have been answered by the user with the highest number of provided answers and have a view count greater than 50.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) WITH u, count(a) AS provided_answer_count ORDER BY provided_answer_count DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (u)-[:PROVIDED]->(answer:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment)<-[:COMMENTED]-(commenter:User) MATCH (commenter)-[:COMMENTED]->(comment:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(target_question:Question) WHERE target_question.view_count > 50 MATCH (target_question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(final_answer:Answer) RETURN final_answer.body_markdown
template_key: find the body_markdown of answers provided to questions that have been asked by users who have commented on questions that have been answered by the user with the highest number of provided answers and have a view count greater than <num>

question: Display all products that are not discontinued and have a 'unitPrice' above 35.
query_text: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.discontinued = false AND p.unitPrice > 35 RETURN p.productName, p.unitPrice
template_key: display all products that are not discontinued and have a <value> above <num>

question: Find the businesses that share the same category with 'Imagine Nation Brewing'.
query_text: MATCH (b1:Business {name: 'Imagine Nation Brewing'})-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) MATCH (b2:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c) WHERE b1 <> b2 RETURN DISTINCT b2.name
template_key: find the businesses that share the same category with <value>

question: Find the top 5 questions with the highest score that are tagged with 'graphql'.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'graphql'}) WITH q ORDER BY q.score DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN q
template_key: find the top <num> questions with the highest score that are tagged with <value>

question: Find the questions with an answer count greater than 3 that have no comments.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count > 3 AND NOT EXISTS {   (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(:Comment) } RETURN q.title
template_key: find the questions with an answer count greater than <num> that have no comments

question: "What is the shortest distance between the statue of Sir Walter Scott and the statue of the poet who wrote \"My Love Is Like A Red Red Rose\"?"
query_text: MATCH (scott:PointOfInterest)-[:TAGS]->(scottTags:OSMTags {name: "Sir Walter Scott"}),       (poet:PointOfInterest)-[:TAGS]->(poetTags:OSMTags {name: "Robert Burns"}),       p = shortestPath((scott)-[:ROUTE*]-(poet)) WITH p, reduce(s = 0, r IN relationships(p) | s + r.distance) AS totalDistance RETURN totalDistance AS shortestDistance
template_key: <value>my love is like a red red rose\<value>

question: Find the names of all articles that mention organizations that are dissolved.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization {isDissolved: true})<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) RETURN a.title
template_key: find the names of all articles that mention organizations that are dissolved

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the lowest IMDb rating.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie) WITH m ORDER BY m.imdbRating ASC LIMIT 1 WITH m.year AS lowestRatedYear MATCH (movie:Movie {year: lowestRatedYear}) RETURN movie.title
template_key: find the movies that have been released in the same year as the movie with the lowest imdb rating

question: Find all entities with a service provider of 'Mossack Fonseca' and a registered address in 'Samoa'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity { service_provider: 'Mossack Fonseca' }) MATCH (e)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address { countries: 'Samoa' }) RETURN e.name
template_key: find all entities with a service provider of <value> and a registered address in <value>

question: Find the question with the least number of downvotes and is tagged with 'react-apollo'.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = 'react-apollo' WITH min(q.downVotes) AS minDownvotes MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.name = 'react-apollo' AND q.downVotes = minDownvotes RETURN q
template_key: find the question with the least number of downvotes and is tagged with <value>

question: Find the games that are played by streams with more than 100 chatters.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User) WITH s, count(*) AS chatter_count WHERE chatter_count > 100 MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN DISTINCT g.name
template_key: find the games that are played by streams with more than <num> chatters

question: Find the officers who are 'officer_of' entities that have a 'same_as' relationship with entities that have a 'registered_address' in 'Hong Kong'.
query_text: MATCH (o:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(e1:Entity)-[:same_as]->(e2:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) WHERE a.countries = 'Hong Kong' RETURN DISTINCT o.name
template_key: find the officers who are <value> entities that have a <value> relationship with entities that have a <value> in <value>

question: Find the top 5 filings with the largest amounts that concern entities in 'China'.
query_text: MATCH (c:Country {name: 'China'})<-[:COUNTRY]-(e:Entity)<-[:CONCERNS]-(f:Filing) RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: find the top <num> filings with the largest amounts that concern entities in <value>

question: Find the businesses with addresses starting with '301' and list their categories.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) WHERE b.address STARTS WITH '301' RETURN b.name AS businessName, c.name AS categoryName
template_key: find the businesses with addresses starting with <value> and list their categories

question: Can you list the top 5 movies that are part of more than one collection?
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_COLLECTION]->(c:Collection) WITH m, count(c) AS num_collections WHERE num_collections > 1 RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, num_collections ORDER BY num_collections DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: can you list the top <num> movies that are part of more than one collection

question: Find all entities with a struck_off_date in February 2013 and a service provider of 'Mossack Fonseca'.
query_text: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.struck_off_date STARTS WITH "15-FEB-2013" AND e.service_provider = "Mossack Fonseca" RETURN e.name
template_key: find all entities with a struck_off_date in february <num> and a service provider of <value>

question: Can you list all tags associated with questions asked by the user 'Anu'?
query_text: MATCH (u:User {display_name: 'Anu'})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) RETURN t.name AS tag_name
template_key: can you list all tags associated with questions asked by the user <value>

question: Find the questions with no answers.
query_text: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE NOT EXISTS ((q)-[:ANSWERED]->()) RETURN q
template_key: find the questions with no answers

question: Find the average latitude (`beneficiary_lat`) for filings where the `originator_bank_country` is "Singapore" and the `beneficiary_bank_country` is "United Kingdom".
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank_country = "Singapore" AND f.beneficiary_bank_country = "United Kingdom" RETURN avg(toFloat(f.beneficiary_lat)) AS average_latitude
template_key: find the average latitude (`beneficiary_lat`) for filings where the `originator_bank_country` is <value> and the `beneficiary_bank_country` is <value>

question: Find the streams that are created before 2019 and are chatted in by users who are also VIPs of other streams and are moderators of those streams.
query_text: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2019-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z') MATCH (s)<-[:CHATTER]-(u:User)-[:VIP]->(s2:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u) RETURN DISTINCT s
template_key: find the streams that are created before <num> and are chatted in by users who are also vips of other streams and are moderators of those streams

question: Find all actors who have starred in at least 3 movies with an average vote higher than 7.5.
query_text: MATCH (p:Person)-[:CAST_FOR]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.average_vote > 7.5 WITH p, count(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount >= 3 RETURN p.name
template_key: find all actors who have starred in at least <num> movies with an average vote higher than <num>

question: Find the movies that have been released in the same year that a user rated a movie.
query_text: MATCH (u:User {userId: "1"})-[:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH collect(DISTINCT m.year) AS user_rated_movie_years MATCH (m2:Movie) WHERE m2.year IN user_rated_movie_years RETURN m2.title, m2.year
template_key: find the movies that have been released in the same year that a user rated a movie

question: Find all actors who have starred in movies belonging to the 'Animation' genre.
query_text: MATCH (g:Genre {name: 'Animation'})<-[:IN_GENRE]-(m:Movie)<-[:CAST_FOR]-(a:Person) RETURN DISTINCT a.name
template_key: find all actors who have starred in movies belonging to the <value> genre

question: "provide all interface IP's exposed by the process 'webserver' , also grub the datacenter informations"
query_text: MATCH (p:Process {name: 'webserver'})-[:RUNS]->(m:Machine)-[:ROUTES]->(i:Interface)-[:EXPOSES]->(port:Port),       (dc:DataCenter)-[:CONTAINS]->(m) RETURN i.ip AS InterfaceIP, dc.name AS DataCenterName, dc.location AS DataCenterLocation
template_key: <value>s exposed by the process <value> , also grub the datacenter informations"

question: Find the names of all articles that mention organizations with a motto.
query_text: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.motto IS NOT NULL WITH o MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o) RETURN DISTINCT a.title
template_key: find the names of all articles that mention organizations with a motto

question: Find all movies that have been rated by more than 1000 users.
query_text: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(u:User) WITH m, count(u) AS userCount WHERE userCount > 1000 RETURN m
template_key: find all movies that have been rated by more than <num> users

question: Find the businesses with the highest average star rating for reviews written in 2016.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE r.date.year = 2016 WITH b, avg(r.stars) AS average_rating ORDER BY average_rating DESC RETURN b.name, average_rating LIMIT 3
template_key: find the businesses with the highest average star rating for reviews written in <num>

question: Find businesses that have been reviewed by users whose name starts with 'J'.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE u.name STARTS WITH 'J' RETURN b.name AS businessName, b.address AS businessAddress, b.city AS businessCity, b.state AS businessState
template_key: find businesses that have been reviewed by users whose name starts with <value>

question: Find the names of businesses that have received reviews from more than one user.
query_text: MATCH (user:User)-[:WROTE]->(review:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(business:Business) WITH business, count(DISTINCT user) AS numUsers WHERE numUsers > 1 RETURN business.name
template_key: find the names of businesses that have received reviews from more than one user

question: Can you list all officers with a 'probably_same_officer_as' relationship?
query_text: MATCH (o1:Officer)-[:same_id_as]->(o2:Officer) RETURN o1, o2
template_key: can you list all officers with a <value> relationship

question: Find the streams that are moderated by users who have a total view count greater than 1 million.
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(s:Stream) WHERE u.total_view_count > 1000000 RETURN s.name
template_key: find the streams that are moderated by users who have a total view count greater than <num> million

question: Find the top 3 filings with the earliest begin dates and amounts over 100000.
query_text: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.amount > 100000 RETURN f ORDER BY f.begin ASC LIMIT 3
template_key: find the top <num> filings with the earliest begin dates and amounts over <num>

question: Find the business with the most reviews.
query_text: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review) WITH b, count(review) AS reviewCount RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find the business with the most reviews

question: How many departments are led by heads who are not mentioned?
query_text: SELECT count(*) FROM department WHERE department_id NOT IN (SELECT department_id FROM management)
template_key: how many departments are led by heads who are not mentioned

question: Find id of the candidate whose email is stanley.monahan@example.org?
query_text: SELECT T2.candidate_id FROM people AS T1 JOIN candidates AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.candidate_id WHERE T1.email_address = 'stanley.monahan@example.org'
template_key: find id of the candidate whose email is stanley.monahan@example.org

question: Find id of the candidate who most recently accessed the course?
query_text: SELECT candidate_id FROM candidate_assessments ORDER BY assessment_date DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: find id of the candidate who most recently accessed the course

question: Find id of candidates whose assessment code is 'Pass'?
query_text: SELECT candidate_id FROM candidate_assessments WHERE asessment_outcome_code = 'Pass'
template_key: find id of candidates whose assessment code is <value>

question: Find the cell mobile number of the candidates whose assessment code is 'Fail'?
query_text: SELECT T3.cell_mobile_number FROM candidates AS T1 JOIN candidate_assessments AS T2 ON T1.candidate_id = T2.candidate_id JOIN people AS T3 ON T1.candidate_id = T3.person_id WHERE T2.asessment_outcome_code = 'Fail'
template_key: find the cell mobile number of the candidates whose assessment code is <value>

question: Find distinct cities of addresses of people?
query_text: SELECT DISTINCT T1.city FROM addresses AS T1 JOIN people_addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id
template_key: find distinct cities of addresses of people

question: Find distinct cities of address of students?
query_text: SELECT DISTINCT T1.city FROM addresses AS T1 JOIN people_addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id JOIN students AS T3 ON T2.person_id = T3.student_id
template_key: find distinct cities of address of students

question: Find the id of courses which are registered or attended by student whose id is 121?
query_text: SELECT course_id FROM student_course_registrations WHERE student_id = 121 UNION SELECT course_id FROM student_course_attendance WHERE student_id = 121
template_key: find the id of courses which are registered or attended by student whose id is <num>

question: List the publisher of the publication with the highest price.
query_text: SELECT Publisher FROM publication ORDER BY Price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the name of the train whose route runs through greatest number of stations.

template_key: find the name of the train whose route runs through greatest number of stations

question: Find names and times of trains that run through stations for the local authority Chiltern.
query_text: SELECT t3.name , t3.time FROM station AS t1 JOIN route AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.station_id JOIN train AS t3 ON t2.train_id = t3.id WHERE t1.local_authority = 'Chiltern'

question: Find the id and local authority of the station with has the highest average high temperature.

template_key: find the id and local authority of the station with has the highest average high temperature

question: Find the id and local authority of the station whose maximum precipitation is higher than 50.
query_text: SELECT t2.id , t2.local_authority FROM weekly_weather AS t1 JOIN station AS t2 ON t1.station_id = t2.id GROUP BY t1.station_id HAVING max(t1.precipitation) > 50

question: Find the origins from which more than 1 train starts.

question: Among observations in 2011, provide the names and ages of patients whose Systolic Blood Pressures are 200mmHg.

question: Calculate the average number of complaints received from New Bedford each year which are closed with explanation.

question: Compute the run rate at the end of 16 overs of the match ID 335999. Please include the name of the "Man of_the Match".

question: What is the id and name of the browser that is compatible with the most web accelerators?
query_text: SELECT T1.id , T1.name FROM browser AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
template_key: what is the id and name of the browser that is compatible with the most web accelerators

question: How many accelerators are not compatible with the browsers listed ?
query_text: SELECT count(*) FROM web_client_accelerator WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT accelerator_id FROM accelerator_compatible_browser )
template_key: how many accelerators are not compatible with the browsers listed

question: What distinct accelerator names are compatible with the browswers that have market share higher than 15?
query_text: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM web_client_accelerator AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T2.accelerator_id = T1.id JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id = T3.id WHERE T3.market_share > 15
template_key: what distinct accelerator names are compatible with the browswers that have market share higher than <num>

question: List the names of the browser that are compatible with both 'CACHEbox' and 'Fasterfox'.
query_text: SELECT T3.name FROM web_client_accelerator AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T2.accelerator_id = T1.id JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'CACHEbox' INTERSECT SELECT T3.name FROM web_client_accelerator AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T2.accelerator_id = T1.id JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Fasterfox'
template_key: list the names of the browser that are compatible with both <value> and <value>

question: Show the accelerator names and supporting operating systems that are not compatible with the browser named 'Opera'.
query_text: SELECT name , operating_system FROM web_client_accelerator EXCEPT SELECT T1.name , T1.operating_system FROM web_client_accelerator AS T1 JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T2.accelerator_id = T1.id JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id = T3.id WHERE T3.name = 'Opera'
template_key: show the accelerator names and supporting operating systems that are not compatible with the browser named <value>

question: Which accelerator name contains substring 'Opera'?
query_text: SELECT name FROM web_client_accelerator WHERE name LIKE '%Opera%'
template_key: which accelerator name contains substring <value>

question: give me names of all compatible browsers and accelerators in the descending order of compatible year
query_text: SELECT T2.name , T3.name FROM accelerator_compatible_browser AS T1 JOIN browser AS T2 ON T1.browser_id = T2.id JOIN web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T1.accelerator_id = T3.id ORDER BY T1.compatible_since_year DESC
template_key: give me names of all compatible browsers and accelerators in the descending order of compatible year

question: What is the id and last name of the driver who participated in the most races after 2010?

question: What are the ids, scores, and dates of the games which caused at least two injury accidents?

question: What are the id and name of the stadium where the most injury accidents happened?

query_text: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.`Complaint ID`) AS REAL) / 3 AS average FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.Client_ID WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.`Date received`) BETWEEN '2015' AND '2017' AND T1.city = 'New York City' AND T2.Product = 'Credit card'
template_key: what is the average number of complaints on credit cards filed by clients from new york in the <num> consecutive years starting from <num>

question: What is the percentage of the increase of complaints filed by the clients from New York from the year 2016 to the year 2017?
query_text: SELECT 100.0 * (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.`Date received`) = '2017' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.`Date received`) = '2016' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.`Date received`) = '2016' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.Client_ID WHERE T1.city = 'New York City'
template_key: what is the percentage of the increase of complaints filed by the clients from new york from the year <num> to the year <num>

question: Which state does the owner of "wyatt.collins@gmail.com" live in? Give the full name of the state.
query_text: SELECT T1.state FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.email = 'wyatt.collins@gmail.com'
template_key: which state does the owner of <value> live in? give the full name of the state

question: What was the detailed issue did Mr Gunner Omer Fuller complain about?
query_text: SELECT T2.`Sub-issue` FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.Client_ID WHERE T1.first = 'Gunner' AND T1.middle = 'Omer' AND T1.last = 'Fuller' AND T1.sex = 'Male'
template_key: what was the detailed issue did mr gunner omer fuller complain about

question: How many days delay for the complaint call from Mr. Brantley Julian Stanley on 2012/5/18?
query_text: SELECT 365 * (strftime('%Y', T2.`Date sent to company`) - strftime('%Y', T2.`Date received`)) + 30 * (strftime('%M', T2.`Date sent to company`) - strftime('%M', T2.`Date received`)) + (strftime('%d', T2.`Date sent to company`) - strftime('%d', T2.`Date received`)) AS days FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN events AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.Client_ID WHERE T2.`Date received` = '2012-05-18' AND T1.sex = 'Male' AND T1.first = 'Brantley' AND T1.middle = 'Julian' AND T1.last = 'Stanley'
template_key: how many days delay for the complaint call from mr. brantley julian stanley on <num>/<num>/<num>

question: What are the movie popularity of the movies released in 2021 that were directed by Steven Spielberg? List the names of the movies and their corresponding popularity.
query_text: SELECT movie_title, movie_popularity FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year = 2021 AND director_name = 'Steven Spielberg'
template_key: what are the movie popularity of the movies released in <num> that were directed by steven spielberg? list the names of the movies and their corresponding popularity

question: When was the first movie released and who directed it?
query_text: SELECT movie_release_year, director_name FROM movies WHERE movie_release_year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY movie_release_year ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many users gave "Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl" movie a rating score of 4?
query_text: SELECT COUNT(T2.user_id) FROM movies AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_title = 'Pavee Lackeen: The Traveller Girl' AND T2.rating_score = 4

question: Was the user who created the "World War 2 and Kids" list eligible for trial when he created the list? Indicate how many followers does the said list has.
query_text: SELECT T2.user_eligible_for_trial, T1.list_followers FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T1.user_id AND T1.list_id = T2.list_id WHERE T1.list_title = 'World War 2 and Kids'

question: Which year was the third movie directed by Quentin Tarantino released? Indicate the user ids of the user who gave it a rating score of 4.
query_text: SELECT T2.movie_release_year, T1.user_id FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN movies AS T2 ON T1.movie_id = T2.movie_id WHERE T1.movie_id = ( SELECT movie_id FROM movies WHERE director_name = 'Quentin Tarantino' ORDER BY movie_release_year ASC LIMIT 2, 1 ) AND T1.rating_score = 4
