question: How many movies were added to the list with the most number of movies? Indicate whether the user was a paying subscriber or not when he created the list.
query_text: SELECT T1.list_movie_number, T2.user_has_payment_method FROM lists AS T1 INNER JOIN lists_users AS T2 ON T1.list_id = T2.list_id ORDER BY T1.list_movie_number DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the URL to the user profile image on Mubi of the user who gave the movie id of 1103 a 5 ratinng score on 4/19/2020?
query_text: SELECT T2.user_avatar_image_url FROM ratings AS T1 INNER JOIN ratings_users AS T2 ON T1.user_id = T2.user_id WHERE T2.user_id = 1103 AND rating_score = 5 AND T2.rating_date_utc = '2020-04-19'

question: List the name of all customers who had made orders online.
query_text: SELECT T FROM ( SELECT CASE  WHEN T2.`Sales Channel` = 'Online' THEN T1.`Customer Names` ELSE NULL END AS T FROM Customers T1 INNER JOIN `Sales Orders` T2 ON T2._CustomerID = T1.CustomerID ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL

question: Sate the order number and calculate the net profit for each order under Joshua Bennett.
query_text: SELECT T1.OrderNumber , REPLACE(T1.`Unit Price`, ',', '') - REPLACE(T1.`Unit Cost`, ',', '')  FROM `Sales Orders` AS T1 INNER JOIN `Sales Team` AS T2 ON T2.SalesTeamID = T1._SalesTeamID WHERE T2.`Sales Team` = 'Joshua Bennett'

question: List down the customer IDs and names that start with alphabet "W".

question: List down the product IDs and names that include the word "Outdoor".
query_text: SELECT ProductID, T FROM ( SELECT ProductID , CASE  WHEN `Product Name` LIKE '%Outdoor%' THEN `Product Name` ELSE NULL END AS T FROM Products ) WHERE T IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T DESC

question: Mention the most populated city and median income of the store in Florida state.

question: List the ID, city, state and region for the store type which is fewer between borough and CDP.
query_text: SELECT DISTINCT T2.StoreID, T2.`City Name`, T1.State, T2.Type FROM Regions AS T1 INNER JOIN `Store Locations` AS T2 ON T2.StateCode = T1.StateCode WHERE T2.Type = 'Borough' OR T2.Type = 'CDP'

question: Write down the region and name of the sale team ID of 18 and compare their orders between in-store and online.
query_text: SELECT T2.Region, T2.`Sales Team` FROM `Sales Orders` AS T1 INNER JOIN `Sales Team` AS T2 ON T2.SalesTeamID = T1._SalesTeamID WHERE T2.SalesTeamID = 18 AND T1.`Sales Channel` = 'In-Store' OR T1.`Sales Channel` = 'Online'

question: For patient with albumin level lower than 3.5, list their ID, sex and diagnosis.
query_text: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALB < 3.5

question: What is the percentage of female patient had total protein not within the normal range?
query_text: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND (T2.TP < 6.0 OR T2.TP > 8.5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F'
template_key: what is the percentage of female patient had total protein not within the normal range

question: For in-patient age 50 and above, what is their average anti-cardiolipin antibody (IgG) concentration?
query_text: SELECT AVG(T2.`aCL IgG`) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) >= 50 AND T1.Admission = '+'
template_key: for in-patient age <num> and above, what is their average anti-cardiolipin antibody (igg) concentration

question: How many female patients who came at the hospital in 1997 was immediately followed at the outpatient clinic?
query_text: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Description) = '1997' AND SEX = 'F' AND Admission = '-'

question: How many of the patients with the most serious thrombosis cases examined in 1997 are women?
query_text: SELECT  COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) = '1997' AND T2.Thrombosis = 1

question: What is the age gap between the youngest and oldest patient with a normal triglyceride recorded?

question: For the year that concluded on December 31, 1998, how many male patients on average were tested in the lab each month?

question: What are the unique official languages of countries where the same politician has served as both head of state and head of government at some point in time?
query_text: MATCH (n:Country)-[r0:hasHeadOfState]->(m0:Politician),(n:Country)-[r1:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(m0:Politician) WITH DISTINCT n UNWIND n.official_language AS prop RETURN DISTINCT prop
template_key: what are the unique official languages of countries where the same politician has served as both head of state and head of government at some point in time

question: What are the unique schools attended by politicians who have served as heads of government in countries where the Christian National Union operates?
query_text: MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r0:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m0:Country)<-[r1:operatesIn]-(m1:PoliticalParty {name: 'Christian National Union'}) WITH DISTINCT n UNWIND n.schools_attended AS prop RETURN DISTINCT prop
template_key: what are the unique schools attended by politicians who have served as heads of government in countries where the christian national union operates

question: How many positions has Per-Samuel Nisser held, either currently or in the past?
query_text: MATCH (n:Position)<-[r0:holdsPosition]-(m0:Politician {name: 'Per-Samuel Nisser'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)
template_key: how many positions has per-samuel nisser held, either currently or in the past

question: How many political parties were either founded or led by Sam Nujoma at any time?
query_text: CALL { MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r0:foundedBy]->(m0:Politician {name: 'Sam Nujoma'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:PoliticalParty)-[r1:headedBy]->(m1:Politician {name: 'Sam Nujoma'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
template_key: how many political parties were either founded or led by sam nujoma at any time

question: What are the top 3 heaviest INTERACTED relationships by ogWeight?
query_text: MATCH (u1:User)-[r:INTERACTED]->(u2:User) RETURN u1, r, u2 ORDER BY r.ogWeight DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: what are the top <num> heaviest interacted relationships by ogweight

question: Which users have interacted with users with an area greater than 5?
query_text: MATCH (u1:User)-[i:INTERACTED]->(u2:User) WHERE u2.area > 5 RETURN DISTINCT u1.label
template_key: which users have interacted with users with an area greater than <num>

question: How many INTERACTED relationships have a 'weight' greater than 1?
query_text: MATCH (u:User)-[r:INTERACTED]->(v:User) WHERE r.weight > 1 RETURN count(r)
template_key: how many interacted relationships have a <value> greater than <num>

question: What is the sum of the sizes of the first 3 users who have interacted with users with a color of '#4A708B'?
query_text: MATCH (u:User {color: '#4A708B'})<-[:INTERACTED]-(other:User) WITH other LIMIT 3 RETURN sum(other.size)
template_key: what is the sum of the sizes of the first <num> users who have interacted with users with a color of <value>

question: List the labels of the first 3 users with a color other than '#3CB371' and a size greater than 2.
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.color <> '#3CB371' AND u.size > 2 WITH u ORDER BY u.key LIMIT 3 RETURN u.label
template_key: list the labels of the first <num> users with a color other than <value> and a size greater than <num>

question: Which 3 users have the largest size and a color of '#3CB371'?
query_text: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.color = '#3CB371' RETURN u.label, u.size ORDER BY u.size DESC LIMIT 3
template_key: which <num> users have the largest size and a color of <value>

question: Show 3 users who have interacted with users located at x-coordinates greater than -500.
query_text: MATCH (u1:User)-[:INTERACTED]->(u2:User) WHERE u2.x > -500 RETURN u1 LIMIT 3
template_key: show <num> users who have interacted with users located at x-coordinates greater than -<num>

question: What are the top 5 users who have interacted with others at y-coordinates less than 0?
query_text: MATCH (u1:User)-[r:INTERACTED]->(u2:User) WHERE u2.y < 0 RETURN u1.label AS user, COUNT(r) AS interactions ORDER BY interactions DESC LIMIT 5
template_key: what are the top <num> users who have interacted with others at y-coordinates less than <num>

question: "How many points of interests are there for each type?"
query_text: MATCH (poi:PointOfInterest) RETURN poi.type AS Type, COUNT(poi) AS NumberOfPOIs ORDER BY NumberOfPOIs DESC
template_key: <value>

question: "I want to talk from the statue of Walter Scott to the statue of Richard Morris Hunt on the shortest route. Are there other points of interest accessible from intersections along the way?"
query_text: MATCH p=shortestPath((walterScott:PointOfInterest)-[:ROUTE*]-(richardMorrisHunt:PointOfInterest)) WHERE walterScott.name = 'Walter Scott' AND richardMorrisHunt.name = 'Richard Morris Hunt' WITH [node IN nodes(p) WHERE node:Intersection] AS intersections MATCH (poi:PointOfInterest)-[:ROUTE]->(i:Intersection) WHERE i IN intersections RETURN DISTINCT poi
template_key: <value>
